295private static void setVector(Object row,
296                                StructObjectInspector oi,
297                                StructField field,
298                                VectorizedRowBatch batch,
299                                DataOutputBuffer buffer,
300                                int rowIndex,
301                                int colIndex,
302                                int offset) throws HiveException {
303 
304    Object fieldData = oi.getStructFieldData(row, field);
305    ObjectInspector foi = field.getFieldObjectInspector();
306 
307    // Vectorization only supports PRIMITIVE data types. Assert the same
308    assert (foi.getCategory() == Category.PRIMITIVE);
309 
310    // Get writable object
311    PrimitiveObjectInspector poi = (PrimitiveObjectInspector) foi;
312    Object writableCol = poi.getPrimitiveWritableObject(fieldData);
313 
314    // NOTE: The default value for null fields in vectorization is 1 for int types, NaN for
315    // float/double. String types have no default value for null.
316    switch (poi.getPrimitiveCategory()) {
317    case BOOLEAN: {
318      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
319      if (writableCol != null) {
320        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((BooleanWritable) writableCol).get() ? 1 : 0;
321        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
322      } else {
323        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
324        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
325      }
326    }
327      break;
328    case BYTE: {
329      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
330      if (writableCol != null) {
331        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((ByteWritable) writableCol).get();
332        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
333      } else {
334        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
335        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
336      }
337    }
338      break;
339    case SHORT: {
340      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
341      if (writableCol != null) {
342        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((ShortWritable) writableCol).get();
343        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
344      } else {
345        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
346        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
347      }
348    }
349      break;
350    case INT: {
351      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
352      if (writableCol != null) {
353        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((IntWritable) writableCol).get();
354        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
355      } else {
356        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
357        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
358      }
359    }
360      break;
361    case LONG: {
362      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
363      if (writableCol != null) {
364        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((LongWritable) writableCol).get();
365        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
366      } else {
367        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
368        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
369      }
370    }
371      break;
372    case DATE: {
373      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
374      if (writableCol != null) {
375        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((DateWritableV2) writableCol).getDays();
376        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
377      } else {
378        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
379        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
380      }
381    }
382      break;
383    case FLOAT: {
384      DoubleColumnVector dcv = (DoubleColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
385      if (writableCol != null) {
386        dcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((FloatWritable) writableCol).get();
387        dcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
388      } else {
389        dcv.vector[rowIndex] = Double.NaN;
390        setNullColIsNullValue(dcv, rowIndex);
391      }
392    }
393      break;
394    case DOUBLE: {
395      DoubleColumnVector dcv = (DoubleColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
396      if (writableCol != null) {
397        dcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((DoubleWritable) writableCol).get();
398        dcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
399      } else {
400        dcv.vector[rowIndex] = Double.NaN;
401        setNullColIsNullValue(dcv, rowIndex);
402      }
403    }
404      break;
405    case TIMESTAMP: {
406      TimestampColumnVector lcv = (TimestampColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
407      if (writableCol != null) {
408        lcv.set(rowIndex, ((TimestampWritableV2) writableCol).getTimestamp().toSqlTimestamp());
409        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
410      } else {
411        lcv.setNullValue(rowIndex);
412        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
413      }
414    }
415      break;
416    case INTERVAL_YEAR_MONTH: {
417      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
418      if (writableCol != null) {
419        HiveIntervalYearMonth i = ((HiveIntervalYearMonthWritable) writableCol).getHiveIntervalYearMonth();
420        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = i.getTotalMonths();
421        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
422      } else {
423        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
424        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
425      }
426    }
427      break;
428    case INTERVAL_DAY_TIME: {
429      IntervalDayTimeColumnVector icv = (IntervalDayTimeColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
430      if (writableCol != null) {
431        HiveIntervalDayTime idt = ((HiveIntervalDayTimeWritable) writableCol).getHiveIntervalDayTime();
432        icv.set(rowIndex, idt);
433        icv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
434      } else {
435        icv.setNullValue(rowIndex);
436        setNullColIsNullValue(icv, rowIndex);
437      }
438    }
439      break;
440    case BINARY: {
441      BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
442      if (writableCol != null) {
443          bcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
444          BytesWritable bw = (BytesWritable) writableCol;
445          byte[] bytes = bw.getBytes();
446          int start = buffer.getLength();
447          int length = bw.getLength();
448          try {
449            buffer.write(bytes, 0, length);
450          } catch (IOException ioe) {
451            throw new IllegalStateException("bad write", ioe);
452          }
453          bcv.setRef(rowIndex, buffer.getData(), start, length);
454      } else {
455        setNullColIsNullValue(bcv, rowIndex);
456      }
457    }
458      break;
459    case STRING: {
460      BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
461      if (writableCol != null) {
462        bcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
463        Text colText = (Text) writableCol;
464        int start = buffer.getLength();
465        int length = colText.getLength();
466        try {
467          buffer.write(colText.getBytes(), 0, length);
468        } catch (IOException ioe) {
469          throw new IllegalStateException("bad write", ioe);
470        }
471        bcv.setRef(rowIndex, buffer.getData(), start, length);
472      } else {
473        setNullColIsNullValue(bcv, rowIndex);
474      }
475    }
476      break;
477    case CHAR: {
478      BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
479      if (writableCol != null) {
480        bcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
481        HiveChar colHiveChar = ((HiveCharWritable) writableCol).getHiveChar();
482        byte[] bytes = colHiveChar.getStrippedValue().getBytes();
483 
484        // We assume the CHAR maximum length was enforced when the object was created.
485        int length = bytes.length;
486 
487        int start = buffer.getLength();
488        try {
489          // In vector mode, we store CHAR as unpadded.
490          buffer.write(bytes, 0, length);
491        } catch (IOException ioe) {
492          throw new IllegalStateException("bad write", ioe);
493        }
494        bcv.setRef(rowIndex, buffer.getData(), start, length);
495      } else {
496        setNullColIsNullValue(bcv, rowIndex);
497      }
498    }
499      break;
500    case VARCHAR: {
501        BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
502        if (writableCol != null) {
503          bcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
504          HiveVarchar colHiveVarchar = ((HiveVarcharWritable) writableCol).getHiveVarchar();
505          byte[] bytes = colHiveVarchar.getValue().getBytes();
506 
507          // We assume the VARCHAR maximum length was enforced when the object was created.
508          int length = bytes.length;
509 
510          int start = buffer.getLength();
511          try {
512            buffer.write(bytes, 0, length);
513          } catch (IOException ioe) {
514            throw new IllegalStateException("bad write", ioe);
515          }
516          bcv.setRef(rowIndex, buffer.getData(), start, length);
517        } else {
518          setNullColIsNullValue(bcv, rowIndex);
519        }
520      }
521        break;
522    case DECIMAL:
523      DecimalColumnVector dcv = (DecimalColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
524      if (writableCol != null) {
525        dcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
526        HiveDecimalWritable wobj = (HiveDecimalWritable) writableCol;
527        dcv.set(rowIndex, wobj);
528      } else {
529        setNullColIsNullValue(dcv, rowIndex);
530      }
531      break;
532    default:
533      throw new HiveException("Vectorizaton is not supported for datatype:" +
534          poi.getPrimitiveCategory());
535    }
536  }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private static void extracted(VectorizedRowBatch batch, int rowIndex, int colIndex, int offset, Object writableCol) {
    TimestampColumnVector lcv = (TimestampColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
    if (writableCol != null) {
      lcv.set(rowIndex, ((TimestampWritableV2) writableCol).getTimestamp().toSqlTimestamp());
      lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
    } else {
      lcv.setNullValue(rowIndex);
      setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
    }
  }

295private static void setVector(Object row,
296                                StructObjectInspector oi,
297                                StructField field,
298                                VectorizedRowBatch batch,
299                                DataOutputBuffer buffer,

303

318      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];

485        int length = bytes.length;

Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private static void extracted(VectorizedRowBatch batch, int rowIndex, int colIndex, int offset, Object writableCol) {
    LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
    if (writableCol != null) {
      lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((IntWritable) writableCol).get();
      lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
    } else {
      lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
      setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
    }
  }

272private void createBuildGradle(Path settings, Path gradleBuild, Set<String> deps) throws Exception {
273        String[] ids = gav.split(":");
274 
275        InputStream is = ExportSpringBoot.class.getClassLoader().getResourceAsStream("templates/quarkus-build-gradle.tmpl");
276        String context = IOHelper.loadText(is);
277        IOHelper.close(is);
278 
279        Properties prop = new CamelCaseOrderedProperties();
280        RuntimeUtil.loadProperties(prop, settings.toFile());
281        // quarkus controls the camel version
282        String repos = getMavenRepositories(settings, prop, quarkusVersion);
283 
284        CamelCatalog catalog = CatalogLoader.loadQuarkusCatalog(repos, quarkusVersion, quarkusGroupId, download);
285        if (camelVersion == null) {
286            camelVersion = catalog.getCatalogVersion();
287        }
288 
289        context = context.replaceFirst("\\{\\{ \\.GroupId }}", ids[0]);
290        context = context.replaceFirst("\\{\\{ \\.ArtifactId }}", ids[1]);
291        context = context.replaceFirst("\\{\\{ \\.Version }}", ids[2]);
292        context = context.replaceFirst("\\{\\{ \\.QuarkusGroupId }}", quarkusGroupId);
293        context = context.replaceFirst("\\{\\{ \\.QuarkusArtifactId }}", quarkusArtifactId);
294        context = context.replaceAll("\\{\\{ \\.QuarkusVersion }}", quarkusVersion);
295        context = context.replaceAll("\\{\\{ \\.JavaVersion }}", javaVersion);
296        context = context.replaceAll("\\{\\{ \\.CamelVersion }}", camelVersion);
297 
298        if (repos == null || repos.isEmpty()) {
299            context = context.replaceFirst("\\{\\{ \\.MavenRepositories }}", "");
300        } else {
301            StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
302            for (String repo : repos.split(",")) {
303                sb.append("    maven {\n");
304                sb.append("        url '").append(repo).append("'\n");
305                if (repo.contains("snapshots")) {
306                    sb.append("        mavenContent {\n");
307                    sb.append("            snapshotsOnly()\n");
308                    sb.append("        }\n");
309                }
310                sb.append("    }\n");
311            }
312            context = context.replaceFirst("\\{\\{ \\.MavenRepositories }}", sb.toString());
313        }
314 
315        List<MavenGav> gavs = new ArrayList<>();
316        for (String dep : deps) {
317            MavenGav gav = parseMavenGav(dep);
318            String gid = gav.getGroupId();
319            String aid = gav.getArtifactId();
320            // transform to camel-quarkus extension GAV
321            if ("org.apache.camel".equals(gid)) {
322                String qaid = aid.replace("camel-", "camel-quarkus-");
323                ArtifactModel<?> am = catalog.modelFromMavenGAV("org.apache.camel.quarkus", qaid, null);
324                if (am != null) {
325                    // use quarkus extension
326                    gav.setGroupId(am.getGroupId());
327                    gav.setArtifactId(am.getArtifactId());
328                    gav.setVersion(null); // uses BOM so version should not be included
329                } else {
330                    // there is no quarkus extension so use plain camel
331                    gav.setVersion(camelVersion);
332                }
333            }
334            gavs.add(gav);
335        }
336 
337        // replace dependencies with special quarkus dependencies if we can find any
338        replaceQuarkusDependencies(gavs);
339 
340        // sort artifacts
341        gavs.sort(mavenGavComparator());
342 
343        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
344        for (MavenGav gav : gavs) {
345            if ("lib".equals(gav.getPackaging())) {
346                // special for lib JARs
347                sb.append("    implementation files('lib/").append(gav.getArtifactId())
348                        .append("-").append(gav.getVersion()).append(".jar')\n");
349            } else if ("camel-kamelets-utils".equals(gav.getArtifactId())) {
350                // special for camel-kamelets-utils
351                sb.append("    implementation ('").append(gav).append("') {\n");
352                sb.append("        exclude group: 'org.apache.camel', module: '*'\n");
353                sb.append("    }\n");
354            } else {
355                sb.append("    implementation '").append(gav).append("'\n");
356            }
357        }
358        context = context.replaceFirst("\\{\\{ \\.CamelDependencies }}", sb.toString());
359 
360        Files.writeString(gradleBuild, context);
361    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(Set<String> deps, CamelCatalog catalog, List<MavenGav> gavs) {
        for (String dep : deps) {
            MavenGav gav = parseMavenGav(dep);
            String gid = gav.getGroupId();
            String aid = gav.getArtifactId();
            // transform to camel-quarkus extension GAV
            if ("org.apache.camel".equals(gid)) {
                String qaid = aid.replace("camel-", "camel-quarkus-");
                ArtifactModel<?> am = catalog.modelFromMavenGAV("org.apache.camel.quarkus", qaid, null);
                if (am != null) {
                    // use quarkus extension
                    gav.setGroupId(am.getGroupId());
                    gav.setArtifactId(am.getArtifactId());
                    gav.setVersion(null); // uses BOM so version should not be included
                } else {
                    // there is no quarkus extension so use plain camel
                    gav.setVersion(camelVersion);
                }
            }
            gavs.add(gav);
        }
    }

Original Clone: 
433private void createMavenPom(Path settings, Path pom, Set<String> deps) throws Exception {
434        String[] ids = gav.split(":");
435 
436        InputStream is = ExportQuarkus.class.getClassLoader().getResourceAsStream("templates/" + pomTemplateName);
437        String context = IOHelper.loadText(is);
438        IOHelper.close(is);
439 
440        Properties prop = new CamelCaseOrderedProperties();
441        RuntimeUtil.loadProperties(prop, settings);
442        // quarkus controls the camel version
443        String repos = getMavenRepositories(settings, prop, quarkusVersion);
444 
445        CamelCatalog catalog = CatalogLoader.loadQuarkusCatalog(repos, quarkusVersion, quarkusGroupId, download);
446        if (camelVersion == null) {
447            camelVersion = catalog.getCatalogVersion();
448        }
449 
450        String mp = prop.getProperty("quarkus.management.port");
451        if (mp == null) {
452            mp = "9876";
453        }
454 
455        context = context.replaceAll("\\{\\{ \\.GroupId }}", ids[0]);
456        context = context.replaceAll("\\{\\{ \\.ArtifactId }}", ids[1]);
457        context = context.replaceAll("\\{\\{ \\.Version }}", ids[2]);
458        context = context.replaceAll("\\{\\{ \\.QuarkusGroupId }}", quarkusGroupId);
459        context = context.replaceAll("\\{\\{ \\.QuarkusArtifactId }}", quarkusArtifactId);
460        context = context.replaceAll("\\{\\{ \\.QuarkusVersion }}", quarkusVersion);
461        context = context.replaceAll("\\{\\{ \\.QuarkusManagementPort }}", mp);
462        context = context.replaceAll("\\{\\{ \\.JavaVersion }}", javaVersion);
463        context = context.replaceAll("\\{\\{ \\.CamelVersion }}", camelVersion);
464        context = context.replaceAll("\\{\\{ \\.ProjectBuildOutputTimestamp }}", this.getBuildMavenProjectDate());
465 
466        context = replaceBuildProperties(context);
467 
468        if (repos == null || repos.isEmpty()) {
469            context = context.replaceFirst("\\{\\{ \\.MavenRepositories }}", "");
470        } else {
471            String s = mavenRepositoriesAsPomXml(repos);
472            context = context.replaceFirst("\\{\\{ \\.MavenRepositories }}", s);
473        }
474 
475        List<MavenGav> gavs = new ArrayList<>();
476        for (String dep : deps) {
477            MavenGav gav = parseMavenGav(dep);
478            String gid = gav.getGroupId();
479            String aid = gav.getArtifactId();
480            // transform to camel-quarkus extension GAV
481            if ("org.apache.camel".equals(gid)) {
482                String qaid = aid.replace("camel-", "camel-quarkus-");
483                ArtifactModel<?> am = catalog.modelFromMavenGAV("org.apache.camel.quarkus", qaid, null);
484                if (am != null) {
485                    // use quarkus extension
486                    gav.setGroupId(am.getGroupId());
487                    gav.setArtifactId(am.getArtifactId());
488                    gav.setVersion(null); // uses BOM so version should not be included
489                } else {
490                    // there is no quarkus extension so use plain camel
491                    gav.setVersion(camelVersion);
492                }
493            }
494            gavs.add(gav);
495        }
496 
497        // replace dependencies with special quarkus dependencies if we can find any
498        replaceQuarkusDependencies(gavs);
499 
500        // sort artifacts
501        gavs.sort(mavenGavComparator());
502 
503        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
504        for (MavenGav gav : gavs) {
505            //Special case, quarkus-pom.tmpl already have them included.
506            if ("camel-quarkus-core".equals(gav.getArtifactId())
507                    || "camel-quarkus-microprofile-health".equals(gav.getArtifactId())) {
508                continue;
509            }
510            sb.append("        <dependency>\n");
511            sb.append("            <groupId>").append(gav.getGroupId()).append("</groupId>\n");
512            sb.append("            <artifactId>").append(gav.getArtifactId()).append("</artifactId>\n");
513            if (gav.getVersion() != null) {
514                sb.append("            <version>").append(gav.getVersion()).append("</version>\n");
515            }
516            if (gav.getScope() != null) {
517                sb.append("            <scope>").append(gav.getScope()).append("</scope>\n");
518            }
519            if ("lib".equals(gav.getPackaging())) {
520                // special for lib JARs
521                sb.append("            <scope>system</scope>\n");
522                sb.append("            <systemPath>\\$\\{project.basedir}/lib/").append(gav.getArtifactId()).append("-")
523                        .append(gav.getVersion()).append(".jar</systemPath>\n");
524            } else if ("camel-kamelets-utils".equals(gav.getArtifactId())) {
525                // special for camel-kamelets-utils
526                sb.append("            <exclusions>\n");
527                sb.append("                <exclusion>\n");
528                sb.append("                    <groupId>org.apache.camel</groupId>\n");
529                sb.append("                    <artifactId>*</artifactId>\n");
530                sb.append("                </exclusion>\n");
531                sb.append("            </exclusions>\n");
532            }
533            sb.append("        </dependency>\n");
534        }
535        context = context.replaceFirst("\\{\\{ \\.CamelDependencies }}", sb.toString());
536 
537        Files.writeString(pom, context);
538    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(Set<String> deps, CamelCatalog catalog, List<MavenGav> gavs) {
        for (String dep : deps) {
            MavenGav gav = parseMavenGav(dep);
            String gid = gav.getGroupId();
            String aid = gav.getArtifactId();
            // transform to camel-quarkus extension GAV
            if ("org.apache.camel".equals(gid)) {
                String qaid = aid.replace("camel-", "camel-quarkus-");
                ArtifactModel<?> am = catalog.modelFromMavenGAV("org.apache.camel.quarkus", qaid, null);
                if (am != null) {
                    // use quarkus extension
                    gav.setGroupId(am.getGroupId());
                    gav.setArtifactId(am.getArtifactId());
                    gav.setVersion(null); // uses BOM so version should not be included
                } else {
                    // there is no quarkus extension so use plain camel
                    gav.setVersion(camelVersion);
                }
            }
            gavs.add(gav);
        }
    }

482public EmbeddedServletOptions(ServletConfig config, ServletContext context) {
483 
484        Enumeration<String> enumeration = config.getInitParameterNames();
485        while (enumeration.hasMoreElements()) {
486            String k = enumeration.nextElement();
487            String v = config.getInitParameter(k);
488            setProperty(k, v);
489        }
490 
491        String keepgen = config.getInitParameter("keepgenerated");
492        if (keepgen != null) {
493            if (keepgen.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
494                this.keepGenerated = true;
495            } else if (keepgen.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
496                this.keepGenerated = false;
497            } else {
498                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
499                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.keepgen"));
500                }
501            }
502        }
503 
504 
505        String trimsp = config.getInitParameter("trimSpaces");
506        if (trimsp != null) {
507            try {
508                trimSpaces = TrimSpacesOption.valueOf(trimsp.toUpperCase(Locale.ENGLISH));
509            } catch (IllegalArgumentException iae) {
510                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
511                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.trimspaces"), iae);
512                }
513            }
514        }
515 
516        this.isPoolingEnabled = true;
517        String poolingEnabledParam = config.getInitParameter("enablePooling");
518        if (poolingEnabledParam != null && !poolingEnabledParam.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
519            if (poolingEnabledParam.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
520                this.isPoolingEnabled = false;
521            } else {
522                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
523                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.enablePooling"));
524                }
525            }
526        }
527 
528        String mapFile = config.getInitParameter("mappedfile");
529        if (mapFile != null) {
530            if (mapFile.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
531                this.mappedFile = true;
532            } else if (mapFile.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
533                this.mappedFile = false;
534            } else {
535                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
536                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.mappedFile"));
537                }
538            }
539        }
540 
541        String debugInfo = config.getInitParameter("classdebuginfo");
542        if (debugInfo != null) {
543            if (debugInfo.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
544                this.classDebugInfo = true;
545            } else if (debugInfo.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
546                this.classDebugInfo = false;
547            } else {
548                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
549                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.classDebugInfo"));
550                }
551            }
552        }
553 
554        String checkInterval = config.getInitParameter("checkInterval");
555        if (checkInterval != null) {
556            try {
557                this.checkInterval = Integer.parseInt(checkInterval);
558            } catch (NumberFormatException ex) {
559                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
560                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.checkInterval"));
561                }
562            }
563        }
564 
565        String modificationTestInterval = config.getInitParameter("modificationTestInterval");
566        if (modificationTestInterval != null) {
567            try {
568                this.modificationTestInterval = Integer.parseInt(modificationTestInterval);
569            } catch (NumberFormatException ex) {
570                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
571                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.modificationTestInterval"));
572                }
573            }
574        }
575 
576        String recompileOnFail = config.getInitParameter("recompileOnFail");
577        if (recompileOnFail != null) {
578            if (recompileOnFail.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
579                this.recompileOnFail = true;
580            } else if (recompileOnFail.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
581                this.recompileOnFail = false;
582            } else {
583                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
584                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.recompileOnFail"));
585                }
586            }
587        }
588        String development = config.getInitParameter("development");
589        if (development != null) {
590            if (development.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
591                this.development = true;
592            } else if (development.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
593                this.development = false;
594            } else {
595                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
596                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.development"));
597                }
598            }
599        }
600 
601        String suppressSmap = config.getInitParameter("suppressSmap");
602        if (suppressSmap != null) {
603            if (suppressSmap.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
604                isSmapSuppressed = true;
605            } else if (suppressSmap.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
606                isSmapSuppressed = false;
607            } else {
608                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
609                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.suppressSmap"));
610                }
611            }
612        }
613 
614        String dumpSmap = config.getInitParameter("dumpSmap");
615        if (dumpSmap != null) {
616            if (dumpSmap.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
617                isSmapDumped = true;
618            } else if (dumpSmap.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
619                isSmapDumped = false;
620            } else {
621                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
622                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.dumpSmap"));
623                }
624            }
625        }
626 
627        String genCharArray = config.getInitParameter("genStringAsCharArray");
628        if (genCharArray != null) {
629            if (genCharArray.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
630                genStringAsCharArray = true;
631            } else if (genCharArray.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
632                genStringAsCharArray = false;
633            } else {
634                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
635                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.genchararray"));
636                }
637            }
638        }
639 
640        String errBeanClass = config.getInitParameter("errorOnUseBeanInvalidClassAttribute");
641        if (errBeanClass != null) {
642            if (errBeanClass.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
643                errorOnUseBeanInvalidClassAttribute = true;
644            } else if (errBeanClass.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
645                errorOnUseBeanInvalidClassAttribute = false;
646            } else {
647                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
648                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.errBean"));
649                }
650            }
651        }
652 
653        String classpath = config.getInitParameter("classpath");
654        if (classpath != null) {
655            this.classpath = classpath;
656        }
657 
658        String useNonstandardTagOptimizations = config.getInitParameter("useNonstandardTagOptimizations");
659        if (useNonstandardTagOptimizations != null) {
660            this.useNonstandardTagOptimizations = useNonstandardTagOptimizations;
661        }
662 
663        /*
664         * scratchdir
665         */
666        String dir = config.getInitParameter("scratchdir");
667        if (dir != null) {
668            scratchDir = new File(dir);
669        } else {
670            scratchDir = (File) context.getAttribute(ServletContext.TEMPDIR);
671        }
672        if (scratchDir == null) {
673            log.fatal(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.error.no.scratch.dir"));
674            return;
675        }
676 
677        if (!(scratchDir.exists() && scratchDir.canRead() && scratchDir.canWrite() && scratchDir.isDirectory())) {
678            log.fatal(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.error.bad.scratch.dir", scratchDir.getAbsolutePath()));
679        }
680 
681        this.compiler = config.getInitParameter("compiler");
682 
683        String compilerTargetVM = config.getInitParameter("compilerTargetVM");
684        if (compilerTargetVM != null) {
685            this.compilerTargetVM = compilerTargetVM;
686        }
687 
688        String compilerSourceVM = config.getInitParameter("compilerSourceVM");
689        if (compilerSourceVM != null) {
690            this.compilerSourceVM = compilerSourceVM;
691        }
692 
693        String javaEncoding = config.getInitParameter("javaEncoding");
694        if (javaEncoding != null) {
695            this.javaEncoding = javaEncoding;
696        }
697 
698        String compilerClassName = config.getInitParameter("compilerClassName");
699        if (compilerClassName != null) {
700            this.compilerClassName = compilerClassName;
701        }
702 
703        String fork = config.getInitParameter("fork");
704        if (fork != null) {
705            if (fork.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
706                this.fork = true;
707            } else if (fork.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
708                this.fork = false;
709            } else {
710                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
711                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.fork"));
712                }
713            }
714        }
715 
716        String xpoweredBy = config.getInitParameter("xpoweredBy");
717        if (xpoweredBy != null) {

719                this.xpoweredBy = true;
720            } else if (xpoweredBy.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {

751        }

754        if (jspIdleTimeout != null) {

792            this.variableForExpressionFactory = variableForExpressionFactory;
793        }

796        if (variableForInstanceManager != null) {

865        if (generatedTagFilePackageName != null) {

870        if (tempVariableNamePrefix != null) {
871            this.tempVariableNamePrefix = tempVariableNamePrefix;
872        }

875        if (useInstanceManagerForTags != null) {
876            if (useInstanceManagerForTags.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
877                this.useInstanceManagerForTags = true;
878            } else if (useInstanceManagerForTags.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
879                this.useInstanceManagerForTags = false;
880            } else {

882                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.useInstanceManagerForTags"));
883                }
884            }
885        }
886 
887        // Set up the global Tag Libraries location cache for this
888        // web-application.
889        tldCache = TldCache.getInstance(context);

482public EmbeddedServletOptions(ServletConfig config, ServletContext context) {
483 
484        Enumeration<String> enumeration = config.getInitParameterNames();
485        while (enumeration.hasMoreElements()) {
486            String k = enumeration.nextElement();
487            String v = config.getInitParameter(k);
488            setProperty(k, v);
489        }
490 
491        String keepgen = config.getInitParameter("keepgenerated");
492        if (keepgen != null) {
493            if (keepgen.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
494                this.keepGenerated = true;
495            } else if (keepgen.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
496                this.keepGenerated = false;
497            } else {
498                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
499                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.keepgen"));
500                }
501            }
502        }
503 
504 
505        String trimsp = config.getInitParameter("trimSpaces");
506        if (trimsp != null) {
507            try {
508                trimSpaces = TrimSpacesOption.valueOf(trimsp.toUpperCase(Locale.ENGLISH));
509            } catch (IllegalArgumentException iae) {
510                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
511                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.trimspaces"), iae);
512                }
513            }
514        }
515 
516        this.isPoolingEnabled = true;
517        String poolingEnabledParam = config.getInitParameter("enablePooling");
518        if (poolingEnabledParam != null && !poolingEnabledParam.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
519            if (poolingEnabledParam.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
520                this.isPoolingEnabled = false;

Original Clone: 
965void GenerateMatchingTupleHelper(Tuple t, BinaryExpression pred,
966            boolean invert) throws FrontendException, ExecException {
967 
968        if (pred instanceof AndExpression) {
969            GenerateMatchingTupleHelper(t, (AndExpression) pred, invert);
970            return;
971        } else if (pred instanceof OrExpression) {
972            GenerateMatchingTupleHelper(t, (OrExpression) pred, invert);
973            return;
974        }
975 
976        // now we are sure that the expression operators are the roots of the
977        // plan
978 
979        boolean leftIsConst = false, rightIsConst = false;
980        Object leftConst = null, rightConst = null;
981        byte leftDataType = 0, rightDataType = 0;
982 
983        int leftCol = -1, rightCol = -1;
984 
985        if (pred instanceof AddExpression || pred instanceof SubtractExpression
986                || pred instanceof MultiplyExpression || pred instanceof DivideExpression
987                || pred instanceof ModExpression || pred instanceof RegexExpression)
988            return; // We don't try to work around these operators right now
989 
990        if (pred.getLhs() instanceof ConstantExpression) {
991            leftIsConst = true;
992            leftConst = ((ConstantExpression) (pred.getLhs())).getValue();
993        } else {
994            LogicalExpression lhs = pred.getLhs();
995            if (lhs instanceof CastExpression)
996                lhs = ((CastExpression) lhs).getExpression();
997            // if (!(pred.getLhsOperand() instanceof ProjectExpression && ((ProjectExpression)
998            // pred
999            // .getLhsOperand()).getProjection().size() == 1))
1000            // return; // too hard
1001            if (!(lhs instanceof ProjectExpression))
1002                return;
1003            leftCol = ((ProjectExpression) lhs).getColNum();
1004            leftDataType = ((ProjectExpression) lhs).getType();
1005 
1006            Object d = t.get(leftCol);
1007            if (d != null) {
1008                leftIsConst = true;
1009                leftConst = d;
1010            }
1011        }
1012 
1013        if (pred.getRhs() instanceof ConstantExpression) {
1014            rightIsConst = true;
1015            rightConst = ((ConstantExpression) (pred.getRhs())).getValue();
1016        } else {
1017            Operator rhs = pred.getRhs();
1018            if (rhs instanceof CastExpression)
1019                rhs = ((CastExpression) rhs).getExpression();
1020            // if (!(pred.getRhsOperand() instanceof ProjectExpression && ((ProjectExpression)
1021            // pred
1022            // .getRhsOperand()).getProjection().size() == 1))
1023            // return; // too hard
1024            if (!(rhs instanceof ProjectExpression))
1025                return;
1026            rightCol = ((ProjectExpression) rhs).getColNum();
1027            rightDataType = ((ProjectExpression) rhs).getType();
1028 
1029            Object d = t.get(rightCol);
1030            if (d != null) {
1031                rightIsConst = true;
1032                rightConst = d;
1033            }
1034        }
1035 
1036        if (leftIsConst && rightIsConst)
1037            return; // can't really change the result if both are constants
1038 
1039        // now we try to change some nulls to constants
1040 
1041        // convert some nulls to constants
1042        if (!invert) {
1043            if (pred instanceof EqualExpression) {
1044                if (leftIsConst) {
1045                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, leftConst
1046                            .toString()));
1047                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1048                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, rightConst
1049                            .toString()));
1050                } else {
1051                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));
1052                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "0"));
1053                }
1054            } else if (pred instanceof NotEqualExpression) {
1055                if (leftIsConst) {
1056                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType,
1057                            GetUnequalValue(leftConst).toString()));
1058                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1059                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetUnequalValue(
1060                            rightConst).toString()));
1061                } else {
1062                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));
1063                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "1"));
1064                }
1065            } else if (pred instanceof GreaterThanExpression
1066                    || pred instanceof GreaterThanEqualExpression) {
1067                if (leftIsConst) {
1068                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType,
1069                            GetSmallerValue(leftConst).toString()));
1070                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1071                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetLargerValue(
1072                            rightConst).toString()));
1073                } else {
1074                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "1"));
1075                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "0"));
1076                }
1077            } else if (pred instanceof LessThanExpression
1078                    || pred instanceof LessThanEqualExpression) {
1079                if (leftIsConst) {
1080                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, GetLargerValue(
1081                            leftConst).toString()));
1082                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1083                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetSmallerValue(
1084                            rightConst).toString()));
1085                } else {
1086                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));
1087                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "1"));
1088                }
1089            }
1090        } else {
1091            if (pred instanceof EqualExpression) {
1092                if (leftIsConst) {
1093                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType,
1094                            GetUnequalValue(leftConst).toString()));
1095                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1096                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetUnequalValue(
1097                            rightConst).toString()));
1098                } else {
1099                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));
1100                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "1"));
1101                }
1102            } else if (pred instanceof NotEqualExpression) {
1103                if (leftIsConst) {
1104                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, leftConst
1105                            .toString()));
1106                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1107                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, rightConst
1108                            .toString()));
1109                } else {
1110                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));
1111                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "0"));
1112                }
1113            } else if (pred instanceof GreaterThanExpression
1114                    || pred instanceof GreaterThanEqualExpression) {
1115                if (leftIsConst) {
1116                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, GetLargerValue(
1117                            leftConst).toString()));
1118                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1119                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetSmallerValue(
1120                            rightConst).toString()));
1121                } else {
1122                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));
1123                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "1"));
1124                }
1125            } else if (pred instanceof LessThanExpression
1126                    || pred instanceof LessThanEqualExpression) {
1127                if (leftIsConst) {
1128                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType,
1129                            GetSmallerValue(leftConst).toString()));
1130                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1131                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetLargerValue(
1132                            rightConst).toString()));
1133                } else {
1134                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "1"));
1135                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "0"));
1136                }
1137            }
1138        }
1139 
1140    }

private void extracted(Tuple t, boolean leftIsConst, boolean rightIsConst, Object leftConst, Object rightConst,
            byte leftDataType, byte rightDataType, int leftCol, int rightCol) {
        if (leftIsConst) {
            t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, leftConst
                    .toString()));
        } else if (rightIsConst) {
            t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, rightConst
                    .toString()));
        } else {
            t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));
            t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "0"));
        }
    }

965void GenerateMatchingTupleHelper(Tuple t, BinaryExpression pred,
966            boolean invert) throws FrontendException, ExecException {
967 
968        if (pred instanceof AndExpression) {
969            GenerateMatchingTupleHelper(t, (AndExpression) pred, invert);
970            return;
971        } else if (pred instanceof OrExpression) {
972            GenerateMatchingTupleHelper(t, (OrExpression) pred, invert);
973            return;
974        }
975 
976        // now we are sure that the expression operators are the roots of the
977        // plan
978 
979        boolean leftIsConst = false, rightIsConst = false;
980        Object leftConst = null, rightConst = null;
981        byte leftDataType = 0, rightDataType = 0;
982 
983        int leftCol = -1, rightCol = -1;
984 
985        if (pred instanceof AddExpression || pred instanceof SubtractExpression
986                || pred instanceof MultiplyExpression || pred instanceof DivideExpression
987                || pred instanceof ModExpression || pred instanceof RegexExpression)
988            return; // We don't try to work around these operators right now
989 
990        if (pred.getLhs() instanceof ConstantExpression) {
991            leftIsConst = true;
992            leftConst = ((ConstantExpression) (pred.getLhs())).getValue();
993        } else {
994            LogicalExpression lhs = pred.getLhs();
995            if (lhs instanceof CastExpression)
996                lhs = ((CastExpression) lhs).getExpression();
997            // if (!(pred.getLhsOperand() instanceof ProjectExpression && ((ProjectExpression)
998            // pred
999            // .getLhsOperand()).getProjection().size() == 1))
1000            // return; // too hard
1001            if (!(lhs instanceof ProjectExpression))
1002                return;
1003            leftCol = ((ProjectExpression) lhs).getColNum();
1004            leftDataType = ((ProjectExpression) lhs).getType();
1005 
1006            Object d = t.get(leftCol);
1007            if (d != null) {
1008                leftIsConst = true;
1009                leftConst = d;
1010            }
1011        }
1012 
1013        if (pred.getRhs() instanceof ConstantExpression) {
1014            rightIsConst = true;
1015            rightConst = ((ConstantExpression) (pred.getRhs())).getValue();
1016        } else {
1017            Operator rhs = pred.getRhs();
1018            if (rhs instanceof CastExpression)
1019                rhs = ((CastExpression) rhs).getExpression();
1020            // if (!(pred.getRhsOperand() instanceof ProjectExpression && ((ProjectExpression)
1021            // pred
1022            // .getRhsOperand()).getProjection().size() == 1))
1023            // return; // too hard
1024            if (!(rhs instanceof ProjectExpression))
1025                return;
1026            rightCol = ((ProjectExpression) rhs).getColNum();
1027            rightDataType = ((ProjectExpression) rhs).getType();
1028 
1029            Object d = t.get(rightCol);
1030            if (d != null) {
1031                rightIsConst = true;
1032                rightConst = d;
1033            }
1034        }
1035 
1036        if (leftIsConst && rightIsConst)
1037            return; // can't really change the result if both are constants
1038 
1039        // now we try to change some nulls to constants
1040 
1041        // convert some nulls to constants
1042        if (!invert) {
1043            if (pred instanceof EqualExpression) {
1044                if (leftIsConst) {
1045                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, leftConst
1046                            .toString()));
1047                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1048                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, rightConst
1049                            .toString()));
1050                } else {
1051                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));
1052                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "0"));
1053                }
1054            } else if (pred instanceof NotEqualExpression) {
1055                if (leftIsConst) {
1056                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType,
1057                            GetUnequalValue(leftConst).toString()));
1058                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1059                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetUnequalValue(
1060                            rightConst).toString()));
1061                } else {
1062                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));
1063                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "1"));
1064                }
1065            } else if (pred instanceof GreaterThanExpression
1066                    || pred instanceof GreaterThanEqualExpression) {
1067                if (leftIsConst) {
1068                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType,
1069                            GetSmallerValue(leftConst).toString()));
1070                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1071                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetLargerValue(
1072                            rightConst).toString()));
1073                } else {
1074                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "1"));
1075                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "0"));
1076                }
1077            } else if (pred instanceof LessThanExpression
1078                    || pred instanceof LessThanEqualExpression) {
1079                if (leftIsConst) {
1080                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, GetLargerValue(
1081                            leftConst).toString()));
1082                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1083                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetSmallerValue(
1084                            rightConst).toString()));
1085                } else {
1086                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));
1087                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "1"));
1088                }
1089            }
1090        } else {
1091            if (pred instanceof EqualExpression) {
1092                if (leftIsConst) {
1093                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType,
1094                            GetUnequalValue(leftConst).toString()));
1095                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1096                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetUnequalValue(
1097                            rightConst).toString()));
1098                } else {
1099                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));
1100                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "1"));
1101                }
1102            } else if (pred instanceof NotEqualExpression) {
1103                if (leftIsConst) {
1104                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, leftConst
1105                            .toString()));
1106                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1107                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, rightConst
1108                            .toString()));
1109                } else {
1110                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));
1111                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "0"));
1112                }
1113            } else if (pred instanceof GreaterThanExpression
1114                    || pred instanceof GreaterThanEqualExpression) {
1115                if (leftIsConst) {
1116                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, GetLargerValue(
1117                            leftConst).toString()));
1118                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1119                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetSmallerValue(
1120                            rightConst).toString()));
1121                } else {
1122                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));
1123                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "1"));
1124                }
1125            } else if (pred instanceof LessThanExpression
1126                    || pred instanceof LessThanEqualExpression) {
1127                if (leftIsConst) {
1128                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType,
1129                            GetSmallerValue(leftConst).toString()));
1130                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1131                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetLargerValue(
1132                            rightConst).toString()));
1133                } else {
1134                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "1"));
1135                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "0"));

1137            }
1138        }

private void extracted(Tuple t, boolean leftIsConst, boolean rightIsConst, Object leftConst, Object rightConst,
            byte leftDataType, byte rightDataType, int leftCol, int rightCol) {
        if (leftIsConst) {
            t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, GetLargerValue(
                    leftConst).toString()));
        } else if (rightIsConst) {
            t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetSmallerValue(
                    rightConst).toString()));
        } else {
            t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));
            t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "1"));
        }
    }

public Thread extractedClone(ExecutorRequest executorRequest, CountDownLatch latch, Process p)

Return Derivation (Out(i)):

Original Clone: 
175protected CountDownLatch pump(Process p, ExecutorRequest executorRequest) {
176        CountDownLatch latch = new CountDownLatch(3);
177        String suffix = "-pump-" + p.pid();
178        Thread stdoutPump = new Thread(() -> {
179            try {
180                OutputStream stdout = executorRequest.stdOut().orElse(OutputStream.nullOutputStream());
181                p.getInputStream().transferTo(stdout);
182                stdout.flush();
183            } catch (IOException e) {
184                throw new UncheckedIOException(e);
185            } finally {
186                latch.countDown();
187            }
188        });
189        stdoutPump.setName("stdout" + suffix);
190        stdoutPump.start();
191        Thread stderrPump = new Thread(() -> {
192            try {
193                OutputStream stderr = executorRequest.stdErr().orElse(OutputStream.nullOutputStream());
194                p.getErrorStream().transferTo(stderr);
195                stderr.flush();
196            } catch (IOException e) {
197                throw new UncheckedIOException(e);
198            } finally {
199                latch.countDown();
200            }
201        });
202        stderrPump.setName("stderr" + suffix);
203        stderrPump.start();
204        Thread stdinPump = new Thread(() -> {
205            try {
206                OutputStream in = p.getOutputStream();
207                executorRequest.stdIn().orElse(InputStream.nullInputStream()).transferTo(in);
208                in.flush();
209            } catch (IOException e) {
210                throw new UncheckedIOException(e);
211            } finally {
212                latch.countDown();
213            }
214        });
215        stdinPump.setName("stdin" + suffix);
216        stdinPump.start();
217        return latch;
218    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private Thread getStdoutPump(Process p, ExecutorRequest executorRequest, CountDownLatch latch) {
        Thread stdoutPump = new Thread(() -> {
            try {
                OutputStream stdout = executorRequest.stdOut().orElse(OutputStream.nullOutputStream());
                p.getInputStream().transferTo(stdout);
                stdout.flush();
            } catch (IOException e) {
                throw new UncheckedIOException(e);
            } finally {
                latch.countDown();
            }
        });
        return stdoutPump;
    }

175protected CountDownLatch pump(Process p, ExecutorRequest executorRequest) {
176        CountDownLatch latch = new CountDownLatch(3);
177        String suffix = "-pump-" + p.pid();
178        Thread stdoutPump = new Thread(() -> {
179            try {
180                OutputStream stdout = executorRequest.stdOut().orElse(OutputStream.nullOutputStream());
181                p.getInputStream().transferTo(stdout);
182                stdout.flush();
183            } catch (IOException e) {
184                throw new UncheckedIOException(e);
185            } finally {
186                latch.countDown();
187            }
188        });
189        stdoutPump.setName("stdout" + suffix);
190        stdoutPump.start();
191        Thread stderrPump = new Thread(() -> {
192            try {
193                OutputStream stderr = executorRequest.stdErr().orElse(OutputStream.nullOutputStream());
194                p.getErrorStream().transferTo(stderr);
195                stderr.flush();
196            } catch (IOException e) {
197                throw new UncheckedIOException(e);
198            } finally {
199                latch.countDown();
200            }
201        });
202        stderrPump.setName("stderr" + suffix);
203        stderrPump.start();
204        Thread stdinPump = new Thread(() -> {
205            try {
206                OutputStream in = p.getOutputStream();
207                executorRequest.stdIn().orElse(InputStream.nullInputStream()).transferTo(in);
208                in.flush();
209            } catch (IOException e) {
210                throw new UncheckedIOException(e);
211            } finally {
212                latch.countDown();
213            }
214        });
215        stdinPump.setName("stdin" + suffix);
216        stdinPump.start();
217        return latch;
218    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private Thread getStderrPump(Process p, ExecutorRequest executorRequest, CountDownLatch latch) {
        Thread stderrPump = new Thread(() -> {
            try {
                OutputStream stderr = executorRequest.stdErr().orElse(OutputStream.nullOutputStream());
                p.getErrorStream().transferTo(stderr);
                stderr.flush();
            } catch (IOException e) {
                throw new UncheckedIOException(e);
            } finally {
                latch.countDown();
            }
        });
        return stderrPump;
    }

35@Override
36    public void registerMetrics(TopologyContext topologyContext) {
37        if (enabled) {
38            topologyContext.registerGauge("CGroupCpu.user-ms", new Gauge<Long>() {
39                @Override
40                public Long getValue() {
41                    CpuacctCore cpu = (CpuacctCore) core;
42                    try {
43                        Map<CpuacctCore.StatType, Long> stat = cpu.getCpuStat();
44                        long userHz = stat.get(CpuacctCore.StatType.user);
45                        long hz = getUserHz();
46                        return userHz * 1000 / hz;
47                    } catch (IOException e) {
48                        throw new RuntimeException("Failed to get metric value", e);
49                    }
50                }
51            });
52 
53            topologyContext.registerGauge("CGroupCpu.sys-ms", new Gauge<Long>() {
54                @Override
55                public Long getValue() {
56                    CpuacctCore cpu = (CpuacctCore) core;
57                    try {
58                        Map<CpuacctCore.StatType, Long> stat = cpu.getCpuStat();
59                        long systemHz = stat.get(CpuacctCore.StatType.system);
60                        long hz = getUserHz();
61                        return systemHz * 1000 / hz;
62                    } catch (IOException e) {
63                        throw new RuntimeException("Failed to get metric value", e);
64                    }
65                }
66            });
67        }
68    }

35@Override
36    public void registerMetrics(TopologyContext topologyContext) {
37        if (enabled) {
38            topologyContext.registerGauge("CGroupCpu.user-ms", new Gauge<Long>() {
39                @Override
40                public Long getValue() {
41                    CpuacctCore cpu = (CpuacctCore) core;
42                    try {
43                        Map<CpuacctCore.StatType, Long> stat = cpu.getCpuStat();
44                        long userHz = stat.get(CpuacctCore.StatType.user);
45                        long hz = getUserHz();
46                        return userHz * 1000 / hz;
47                    } catch (IOException e) {
48                        throw new RuntimeException("Failed to get metric value", e);
49                    }
50                }
51            });
52 
53            topologyContext.registerGauge("CGroupCpu.sys-ms", new Gauge<Long>() {
54                @Override
55                public Long getValue() {
56                    CpuacctCore cpu = (CpuacctCore) core;
57                    try {
58                        Map<CpuacctCore.StatType, Long> stat = cpu.getCpuStat();
59                        long systemHz = stat.get(CpuacctCore.StatType.system);
60                        long hz = getUserHz();
61                        return systemHz * 1000 / hz;
62                    } catch (IOException e) {
63                        throw new RuntimeException("Failed to get metric value", e);
64                    }
65                }
66            });
67        }
68    }

295private static void setVector(Object row,
296                                StructObjectInspector oi,
297                                StructField field,
298                                VectorizedRowBatch batch,
299                                DataOutputBuffer buffer,
300                                int rowIndex,
301                                int colIndex,
302                                int offset) throws HiveException {
303 
304    Object fieldData = oi.getStructFieldData(row, field);
305    ObjectInspector foi = field.getFieldObjectInspector();
306 
307    // Vectorization only supports PRIMITIVE data types. Assert the same
308    assert (foi.getCategory() == Category.PRIMITIVE);
309 
310    // Get writable object
311    PrimitiveObjectInspector poi = (PrimitiveObjectInspector) foi;
312    Object writableCol = poi.getPrimitiveWritableObject(fieldData);
313 
314    // NOTE: The default value for null fields in vectorization is 1 for int types, NaN for
315    // float/double. String types have no default value for null.
316    switch (poi.getPrimitiveCategory()) {
317    case BOOLEAN: {
318      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
319      if (writableCol != null) {
320        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((BooleanWritable) writableCol).get() ? 1 : 0;
321        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
322      } else {
323        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
324        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
325      }
326    }
327      break;
328    case BYTE: {
329      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
330      if (writableCol != null) {
331        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((ByteWritable) writableCol).get();
332        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
333      } else {
334        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
335        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
336      }
337    }
338      break;
339    case SHORT: {
340      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
341      if (writableCol != null) {
342        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((ShortWritable) writableCol).get();
343        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
344      } else {
345        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
346        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
347      }
348    }
349      break;
350    case INT: {
351      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
352      if (writableCol != null) {
353        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((IntWritable) writableCol).get();
354        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
355      } else {
356        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
357        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
358      }
359    }
360      break;
361    case LONG: {
362      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
363      if (writableCol != null) {
364        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((LongWritable) writableCol).get();
365        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
366      } else {
367        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
368        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
369      }
370    }
371      break;
372    case DATE: {
373      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
374      if (writableCol != null) {
375        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((DateWritableV2) writableCol).getDays();
376        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
377      } else {
378        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
379        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
380      }
381    }
382      break;
383    case FLOAT: {
384      DoubleColumnVector dcv = (DoubleColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
385      if (writableCol != null) {
386        dcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((FloatWritable) writableCol).get();
387        dcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
388      } else {
389        dcv.vector[rowIndex] = Double.NaN;
390        setNullColIsNullValue(dcv, rowIndex);
391      }
392    }
393      break;
394    case DOUBLE: {
395      DoubleColumnVector dcv = (DoubleColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
396      if (writableCol != null) {
397        dcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((DoubleWritable) writableCol).get();
398        dcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
399      } else {
400        dcv.vector[rowIndex] = Double.NaN;
401        setNullColIsNullValue(dcv, rowIndex);
402      }
403    }
404      break;
405    case TIMESTAMP: {
406      TimestampColumnVector lcv = (TimestampColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
407      if (writableCol != null) {
408        lcv.set(rowIndex, ((TimestampWritableV2) writableCol).getTimestamp().toSqlTimestamp());
409        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
410      } else {
411        lcv.setNullValue(rowIndex);
412        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
413      }
414    }
415      break;
416    case INTERVAL_YEAR_MONTH: {
417      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
418      if (writableCol != null) {
419        HiveIntervalYearMonth i = ((HiveIntervalYearMonthWritable) writableCol).getHiveIntervalYearMonth();
420        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = i.getTotalMonths();
421        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
422      } else {
423        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
424        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
425      }
426    }
427      break;
428    case INTERVAL_DAY_TIME: {
429      IntervalDayTimeColumnVector icv = (IntervalDayTimeColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
430      if (writableCol != null) {
431        HiveIntervalDayTime idt = ((HiveIntervalDayTimeWritable) writableCol).getHiveIntervalDayTime();
432        icv.set(rowIndex, idt);
433        icv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
434      } else {
435        icv.setNullValue(rowIndex);
436        setNullColIsNullValue(icv, rowIndex);
437      }
438    }
439      break;
440    case BINARY: {
441      BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
442      if (writableCol != null) {
443          bcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
444          BytesWritable bw = (BytesWritable) writableCol;
445          byte[] bytes = bw.getBytes();
446          int start = buffer.getLength();
447          int length = bw.getLength();
448          try {
449            buffer.write(bytes, 0, length);
450          } catch (IOException ioe) {
451            throw new IllegalStateException("bad write", ioe);
452          }
453          bcv.setRef(rowIndex, buffer.getData(), start, length);
454      } else {
455        setNullColIsNullValue(bcv, rowIndex);
456      }
457    }
458      break;
459    case STRING: {
460      BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
461      if (writableCol != null) {
462        bcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
463        Text colText = (Text) writableCol;
464        int start = buffer.getLength();
465        int length = colText.getLength();
466        try {
467          buffer.write(colText.getBytes(), 0, length);
468        } catch (IOException ioe) {
469          throw new IllegalStateException("bad write", ioe);
470        }
471        bcv.setRef(rowIndex, buffer.getData(), start, length);
472      } else {
473        setNullColIsNullValue(bcv, rowIndex);
474      }
475    }
476      break;
477    case CHAR: {
478      BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
479      if (writableCol != null) {
480        bcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
481        HiveChar colHiveChar = ((HiveCharWritable) writableCol).getHiveChar();
482        byte[] bytes = colHiveChar.getStrippedValue().getBytes();
483 
484        // We assume the CHAR maximum length was enforced when the object was created.
485        int length = bytes.length;
486 
487        int start = buffer.getLength();
488        try {
489          // In vector mode, we store CHAR as unpadded.
490          buffer.write(bytes, 0, length);
491        } catch (IOException ioe) {
492          throw new IllegalStateException("bad write", ioe);
493        }
494        bcv.setRef(rowIndex, buffer.getData(), start, length);
495      } else {
496        setNullColIsNullValue(bcv, rowIndex);
497      }
498    }
499      break;
500    case VARCHAR: {
501        BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
502        if (writableCol != null) {
503          bcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
504          HiveVarchar colHiveVarchar = ((HiveVarcharWritable) writableCol).getHiveVarchar();
505          byte[] bytes = colHiveVarchar.getValue().getBytes();
506 
507          // We assume the VARCHAR maximum length was enforced when the object was created.
508          int length = bytes.length;
509 
510          int start = buffer.getLength();
511          try {
512            buffer.write(bytes, 0, length);
513          } catch (IOException ioe) {
514            throw new IllegalStateException("bad write", ioe);
515          }
516          bcv.setRef(rowIndex, buffer.getData(), start, length);
517        } else {
518          setNullColIsNullValue(bcv, rowIndex);
519        }
520      }
521        break;
522    case DECIMAL:
523      DecimalColumnVector dcv = (DecimalColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
524      if (writableCol != null) {
525        dcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
526        HiveDecimalWritable wobj = (HiveDecimalWritable) writableCol;
527        dcv.set(rowIndex, wobj);
528      } else {
529        setNullColIsNullValue(dcv, rowIndex);
530      }
531      break;
532    default:
533      throw new HiveException("Vectorizaton is not supported for datatype:" +
534          poi.getPrimitiveCategory());
535    }
536  }

private static void extracted(VectorizedRowBatch batch, int rowIndex, int colIndex, int offset, Object writableCol) {
    LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
    if (writableCol != null) {
      lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((BooleanWritable) writableCol).get() ? 1 : 0;
      lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
    } else {
      lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
      setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
    }
  }
