295private static void setVector(Object row,
296                                StructObjectInspector oi,
297                                StructField field,
298                                VectorizedRowBatch batch,
299                                DataOutputBuffer buffer,
300                                int rowIndex,
301                                int colIndex,
302                                int offset) throws HiveException {
303 
304    Object fieldData = oi.getStructFieldData(row, field);
305    ObjectInspector foi = field.getFieldObjectInspector();
306 
307    // Vectorization only supports PRIMITIVE data types. Assert the same
308    assert (foi.getCategory() == Category.PRIMITIVE);
309 
310    // Get writable object
311    PrimitiveObjectInspector poi = (PrimitiveObjectInspector) foi;
312    Object writableCol = poi.getPrimitiveWritableObject(fieldData);
313 
314    // NOTE: The default value for null fields in vectorization is 1 for int types, NaN for
315    // float/double. String types have no default value for null.
316    switch (poi.getPrimitiveCategory()) {
317    case BOOLEAN: {
318      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
319      if (writableCol != null) {
320        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((BooleanWritable) writableCol).get() ? 1 : 0;
321        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
322      } else {
323        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
324        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
325      }
326    }
327      break;
328    case BYTE: {
329      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
330      if (writableCol != null) {
331        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((ByteWritable) writableCol).get();
332        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
333      } else {
334        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
335        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
336      }
337    }
338      break;
339    case SHORT: {
340      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
341      if (writableCol != null) {
342        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((ShortWritable) writableCol).get();
343        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
344      } else {
345        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
346        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
347      }
348    }
349      break;
350    case INT: {
351      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
352      if (writableCol != null) {
353        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((IntWritable) writableCol).get();
354        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
355      } else {
356        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
357        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
358      }
359    }
360      break;
361    case LONG: {
362      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
363      if (writableCol != null) {
364        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((LongWritable) writableCol).get();
365        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
366      } else {
367        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
368        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
369      }
370    }
371      break;
372    case DATE: {
373      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
374      if (writableCol != null) {
375        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((DateWritableV2) writableCol).getDays();
376        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
377      } else {
378        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
379        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
380      }
381    }
382      break;
383    case FLOAT: {
384      DoubleColumnVector dcv = (DoubleColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
385      if (writableCol != null) {
386        dcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((FloatWritable) writableCol).get();
387        dcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
388      } else {
389        dcv.vector[rowIndex] = Double.NaN;
390        setNullColIsNullValue(dcv, rowIndex);
391      }
392    }
393      break;
394    case DOUBLE: {
395      DoubleColumnVector dcv = (DoubleColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
396      if (writableCol != null) {
397        dcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((DoubleWritable) writableCol).get();
398        dcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
399      } else {
400        dcv.vector[rowIndex] = Double.NaN;
401        setNullColIsNullValue(dcv, rowIndex);
402      }
403    }
404      break;
405    case TIMESTAMP: {
406      TimestampColumnVector lcv = (TimestampColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
407      if (writableCol != null) {
408        lcv.set(rowIndex, ((TimestampWritableV2) writableCol).getTimestamp().toSqlTimestamp());
409        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
410      } else {
411        lcv.setNullValue(rowIndex);
412        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
413      }
414    }
415      break;
416    case INTERVAL_YEAR_MONTH: {
417      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
418      if (writableCol != null) {
419        HiveIntervalYearMonth i = ((HiveIntervalYearMonthWritable) writableCol).getHiveIntervalYearMonth();
420        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = i.getTotalMonths();
421        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
422      } else {
423        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
424        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
425      }
426    }
427      break;
428    case INTERVAL_DAY_TIME: {
429      IntervalDayTimeColumnVector icv = (IntervalDayTimeColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
430      if (writableCol != null) {
431        HiveIntervalDayTime idt = ((HiveIntervalDayTimeWritable) writableCol).getHiveIntervalDayTime();
432        icv.set(rowIndex, idt);
433        icv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
434      } else {
435        icv.setNullValue(rowIndex);
436        setNullColIsNullValue(icv, rowIndex);
437      }
438    }
439      break;
440    case BINARY: {
441      BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
442      if (writableCol != null) {
443          bcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
444          BytesWritable bw = (BytesWritable) writableCol;
445          byte[] bytes = bw.getBytes();
446          int start = buffer.getLength();
447          int length = bw.getLength();
448          try {
449            buffer.write(bytes, 0, length);
450          } catch (IOException ioe) {
451            throw new IllegalStateException("bad write", ioe);
452          }
453          bcv.setRef(rowIndex, buffer.getData(), start, length);
454      } else {
455        setNullColIsNullValue(bcv, rowIndex);
456      }
457    }
458      break;
459    case STRING: {
460      BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
461      if (writableCol != null) {
462        bcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
463        Text colText = (Text) writableCol;
464        int start = buffer.getLength();
465        int length = colText.getLength();
466        try {
467          buffer.write(colText.getBytes(), 0, length);
468        } catch (IOException ioe) {
469          throw new IllegalStateException("bad write", ioe);
470        }
471        bcv.setRef(rowIndex, buffer.getData(), start, length);
472      } else {
473        setNullColIsNullValue(bcv, rowIndex);
474      }
475    }
476      break;
477    case CHAR: {
478      BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
479      if (writableCol != null) {
480        bcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
481        HiveChar colHiveChar = ((HiveCharWritable) writableCol).getHiveChar();
482        byte[] bytes = colHiveChar.getStrippedValue().getBytes();
483 
484        // We assume the CHAR maximum length was enforced when the object was created.
485        int length = bytes.length;
486 
487        int start = buffer.getLength();
488        try {
489          // In vector mode, we store CHAR as unpadded.
490          buffer.write(bytes, 0, length);
491        } catch (IOException ioe) {
492          throw new IllegalStateException("bad write", ioe);
493        }
494        bcv.setRef(rowIndex, buffer.getData(), start, length);
495      } else {
496        setNullColIsNullValue(bcv, rowIndex);
497      }
498    }
499      break;
500    case VARCHAR: {
501        BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
502        if (writableCol != null) {
503          bcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
504          HiveVarchar colHiveVarchar = ((HiveVarcharWritable) writableCol).getHiveVarchar();
505          byte[] bytes = colHiveVarchar.getValue().getBytes();
506 
507          // We assume the VARCHAR maximum length was enforced when the object was created.
508          int length = bytes.length;
509 
510          int start = buffer.getLength();
511          try {
512            buffer.write(bytes, 0, length);
513          } catch (IOException ioe) {
514            throw new IllegalStateException("bad write", ioe);
515          }
516          bcv.setRef(rowIndex, buffer.getData(), start, length);
517        } else {
518          setNullColIsNullValue(bcv, rowIndex);
519        }
520      }
521        break;
522    case DECIMAL:
523      DecimalColumnVector dcv = (DecimalColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
524      if (writableCol != null) {
525        dcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
526        HiveDecimalWritable wobj = (HiveDecimalWritable) writableCol;
527        dcv.set(rowIndex, wobj);
528      } else {
529        setNullColIsNullValue(dcv, rowIndex);
530      }
531      break;
532    default:
533      throw new HiveException("Vectorizaton is not supported for datatype:" +
534          poi.getPrimitiveCategory());
535    }

private static void extracted(VectorizedRowBatch batch, int rowIndex, int colIndex, int offset, Object writableCol) {
    LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
    if (writableCol != null) {
      lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((IntWritable) writableCol).get();
      lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
    } else {
      lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
      setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
    }
  }

514            throw new IllegalStateException("bad write", ioe);
515          }
516          bcv.setRef(rowIndex, buffer.getData(), start, length);
517        } else {
518          setNullColIsNullValue(bcv, rowIndex);
519        }
520      }
521        break;
522    case DECIMAL:
523      DecimalColumnVector dcv = (DecimalColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
524      if (writableCol != null) {
525        dcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
526        HiveDecimalWritable wobj = (HiveDecimalWritable) writableCol;
527        dcv.set(rowIndex, wobj);
528      } else {
529        setNullColIsNullValue(dcv, rowIndex);
530      }
531      break;
532    default:
533      throw new HiveException("Vectorizaton is not supported for datatype:" +
534          poi.getPrimitiveCategory());
535    }
536  }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private static void extracted(VectorizedRowBatch batch, int rowIndex, int colIndex, int offset, Object writableCol) {
    LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
    if (writableCol != null) {
      lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((BooleanWritable) writableCol).get() ? 1 : 0;
      lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
    } else {
      lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
      setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
    }
  }

295private static void setVector(Object row,
296                                StructObjectInspector oi,
297                                StructField field,
298                                VectorizedRowBatch batch,
299                                DataOutputBuffer buffer,
300                                int rowIndex,
301                                int colIndex,
302                                int offset) throws HiveException {
303 
304    Object fieldData = oi.getStructFieldData(row, field);
305    ObjectInspector foi = field.getFieldObjectInspector();
306 
307    // Vectorization only supports PRIMITIVE data types. Assert the same
308    assert (foi.getCategory() == Category.PRIMITIVE);
309 
310    // Get writable object
311    PrimitiveObjectInspector poi = (PrimitiveObjectInspector) foi;
312    Object writableCol = poi.getPrimitiveWritableObject(fieldData);
313 
314    // NOTE: The default value for null fields in vectorization is 1 for int types, NaN for
315    // float/double. String types have no default value for null.
316    switch (poi.getPrimitiveCategory()) {
317    case BOOLEAN: {
318      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
319      if (writableCol != null) {
320        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((BooleanWritable) writableCol).get() ? 1 : 0;
321        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
322      } else {
323        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
324        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
325      }
326    }
327      break;
328    case BYTE: {
329      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
330      if (writableCol != null) {
331        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((ByteWritable) writableCol).get();
332        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
333      } else {
334        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
335        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
336      }
337    }
338      break;
339    case SHORT: {
340      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
341      if (writableCol != null) {
342        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((ShortWritable) writableCol).get();
343        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
344      } else {
345        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
346        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
347      }
348    }
349      break;
350    case INT: {
351      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
352      if (writableCol != null) {
353        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((IntWritable) writableCol).get();
354        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
355      } else {
356        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
357        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
358      }
359    }
360      break;
361    case LONG: {
362      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
363      if (writableCol != null) {
364        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((LongWritable) writableCol).get();
365        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
366      } else {
367        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
368        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
369      }
370    }
371      break;
372    case DATE: {
373      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
374      if (writableCol != null) {
375        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((DateWritableV2) writableCol).getDays();
376        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
377      } else {
378        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
379        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
380      }
381    }
382      break;
383    case FLOAT: {
384      DoubleColumnVector dcv = (DoubleColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
385      if (writableCol != null) {
386        dcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((FloatWritable) writableCol).get();
387        dcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
388      } else {
389        dcv.vector[rowIndex] = Double.NaN;
390        setNullColIsNullValue(dcv, rowIndex);
391      }
392    }
393      break;
394    case DOUBLE: {
395      DoubleColumnVector dcv = (DoubleColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
396      if (writableCol != null) {
397        dcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((DoubleWritable) writableCol).get();
398        dcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
399      } else {
400        dcv.vector[rowIndex] = Double.NaN;
401        setNullColIsNullValue(dcv, rowIndex);
402      }
403    }
404      break;
405    case TIMESTAMP: {
406      TimestampColumnVector lcv = (TimestampColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
407      if (writableCol != null) {
408        lcv.set(rowIndex, ((TimestampWritableV2) writableCol).getTimestamp().toSqlTimestamp());
409        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
410      } else {
411        lcv.setNullValue(rowIndex);
412        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
413      }
414    }
415      break;
416    case INTERVAL_YEAR_MONTH: {
417      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
418      if (writableCol != null) {
419        HiveIntervalYearMonth i = ((HiveIntervalYearMonthWritable) writableCol).getHiveIntervalYearMonth();
420        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = i.getTotalMonths();
421        lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
422      } else {
423        lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
424        setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
425      }
426    }
427      break;
428    case INTERVAL_DAY_TIME: {
429      IntervalDayTimeColumnVector icv = (IntervalDayTimeColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
430      if (writableCol != null) {
431        HiveIntervalDayTime idt = ((HiveIntervalDayTimeWritable) writableCol).getHiveIntervalDayTime();
432        icv.set(rowIndex, idt);
433        icv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
434      } else {
435        icv.setNullValue(rowIndex);
436        setNullColIsNullValue(icv, rowIndex);
437      }
438    }
439      break;
440    case BINARY: {
441      BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
442      if (writableCol != null) {
443          bcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
444          BytesWritable bw = (BytesWritable) writableCol;
445          byte[] bytes = bw.getBytes();
446          int start = buffer.getLength();
447          int length = bw.getLength();
448          try {
449            buffer.write(bytes, 0, length);
450          } catch (IOException ioe) {
451            throw new IllegalStateException("bad write", ioe);
452          }
453          bcv.setRef(rowIndex, buffer.getData(), start, length);
454      } else {
455        setNullColIsNullValue(bcv, rowIndex);
456      }
457    }
458      break;
459    case STRING: {
460      BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
461      if (writableCol != null) {
462        bcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
463        Text colText = (Text) writableCol;
464        int start = buffer.getLength();
465        int length = colText.getLength();
466        try {
467          buffer.write(colText.getBytes(), 0, length);
468        } catch (IOException ioe) {
469          throw new IllegalStateException("bad write", ioe);
470        }
471        bcv.setRef(rowIndex, buffer.getData(), start, length);
472      } else {
473        setNullColIsNullValue(bcv, rowIndex);
474      }
475    }
476      break;
477    case CHAR: {
478      BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
479      if (writableCol != null) {
480        bcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
481        HiveChar colHiveChar = ((HiveCharWritable) writableCol).getHiveChar();
482        byte[] bytes = colHiveChar.getStrippedValue().getBytes();
483 
484        // We assume the CHAR maximum length was enforced when the object was created.
485        int length = bytes.length;
486 
487        int start = buffer.getLength();
488        try {
489          // In vector mode, we store CHAR as unpadded.
490          buffer.write(bytes, 0, length);
491        } catch (IOException ioe) {
492          throw new IllegalStateException("bad write", ioe);
493        }
494        bcv.setRef(rowIndex, buffer.getData(), start, length);
495      } else {
496        setNullColIsNullValue(bcv, rowIndex);
497      }
498    }
499      break;
500    case VARCHAR: {
501        BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
502        if (writableCol != null) {
503          bcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
504          HiveVarchar colHiveVarchar = ((HiveVarcharWritable) writableCol).getHiveVarchar();
505          byte[] bytes = colHiveVarchar.getValue().getBytes();
506 
507          // We assume the VARCHAR maximum length was enforced when the object was created.
508          int length = bytes.length;
509 
510          int start = buffer.getLength();
511          try {
512            buffer.write(bytes, 0, length);
513          } catch (IOException ioe) {
514            throw new IllegalStateException("bad write", ioe);
515          }
516          bcv.setRef(rowIndex, buffer.getData(), start, length);
517        } else {
518          setNullColIsNullValue(bcv, rowIndex);
519        }
520      }
521        break;
522    case DECIMAL:
523      DecimalColumnVector dcv = (DecimalColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
524      if (writableCol != null) {
525        dcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
526        HiveDecimalWritable wobj = (HiveDecimalWritable) writableCol;
527        dcv.set(rowIndex, wobj);
528      } else {
529        setNullColIsNullValue(dcv, rowIndex);
530      }
531      break;
532    default:
533      throw new HiveException("Vectorizaton is not supported for datatype:" +
534          poi.getPrimitiveCategory());
535    }
536  }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private static void extracted(VectorizedRowBatch batch, int rowIndex, int colIndex, int offset, Object writableCol) {
    LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) batch.cols[offset + colIndex];
    if (writableCol != null) {
      lcv.vector[rowIndex] = ((LongWritable) writableCol).get();
      lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
    } else {
      lcv.vector[rowIndex] = 1;
      setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
    }
  }

539public void validateServiceModel() {
540 
541        for (ServiceInfo si : getService().getServiceInfos()) {
542            validateSchemas(si.getXmlSchemaCollection());
543 
544            for (OperationInfo opInfo : si.getInterface().getOperations()) {
545                for (MessagePartInfo mpi : opInfo.getInput().getMessageParts()) {
546                    assert mpi.getXmlSchema() != null;
547                    if (mpi.isElement()) {
548                        assert mpi.getXmlSchema() instanceof XmlSchemaElement;
549                    } else {
550                        assert !(mpi.getXmlSchema() instanceof XmlSchemaElement);
551                    }
552                }
553                if (opInfo.hasOutput()) {
554                    for (MessagePartInfo mpi : opInfo.getOutput().getMessageParts()) {
555                        assert mpi.getXmlSchema() != null;
556                        if (mpi.isElement()) {
557                            assert mpi.getXmlSchema() instanceof XmlSchemaElement;
558                        } else {
559                            assert !(mpi.getXmlSchema() instanceof XmlSchemaElement);
560                        }
561                    }
562                }
563                if (opInfo.isUnwrappedCapable()) {
564                    opInfo = opInfo.getUnwrappedOperation();
565                    for (MessagePartInfo mpi : opInfo.getInput().getMessageParts()) {
566                        assert mpi.getXmlSchema() != null;
567                        if (mpi.isElement()) {
568                            assert mpi.getXmlSchema() instanceof XmlSchemaElement;
569                        } else {
570                            assert !(mpi.getXmlSchema() instanceof XmlSchemaElement);
571                        }
572                    }
573                    if (opInfo.hasOutput()) {
574                        for (MessagePartInfo mpi : opInfo.getOutput().getMessageParts()) {
575                            assert mpi.getXmlSchema() != null;
576                            if (mpi.isElement()) {
577                                assert mpi.getXmlSchema() instanceof XmlSchemaElement;
578                            } else {
579                                assert !(mpi.getXmlSchema() instanceof XmlSchemaElement);
580                            }
581                        }
582                    }
583                }
584                if (opInfo.hasFaults()) {
585                    // check to make sure the faults are elements
586                    for (FaultInfo fault : opInfo.getFaults()) {
587                        MessagePartInfo mpi = fault.getFirstMessagePart();
588                        assert mpi != null;
589                        assert mpi.getXmlSchema() != null;
590                        assert mpi.isElement();
591                        assert mpi.getXmlSchema() instanceof XmlSchemaElement;
592                    }
593                }
594 
595            }
596        }
597    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(OperationInfo opInfo) {
        if (opInfo.hasOutput()) {
            for (MessagePartInfo mpi : opInfo.getOutput().getMessageParts()) {
                assert mpi.getXmlSchema() != null;
                if (mpi.isElement()) {
                    assert mpi.getXmlSchema() instanceof XmlSchemaElement;
                } else {
                    assert !(mpi.getXmlSchema() instanceof XmlSchemaElement);
                }
            }
        }
    }

544            for (OperationInfo opInfo : si.getInterface().getOperations()) {

private void extracted(OperationInfo opInfo) {
        if (opInfo.hasOutput()) {
            for (MessagePartInfo mpi : opInfo.getOutput().getMessageParts()) {
                assert mpi.getXmlSchema() != null;
                if (mpi.isElement()) {
                    assert mpi.getXmlSchema() instanceof XmlSchemaElement;
                } else {
                    assert !(mpi.getXmlSchema() instanceof XmlSchemaElement);
                }
            }
        }
    }

222@Override
223        public IndexFieldData.Builder fielddataBuilder(FieldDataContext fieldDataContext) {
224            failIfNoDocValues();
225            // TODO - This needs to be changed to a custom values source type
226            return (cache, breakerService) -> new IndexHistogramFieldData(name(), AnalyticsValuesSourceType.HISTOGRAM) {
227 
228                @Override
229                public LeafHistogramFieldData load(LeafReaderContext context) {
230                    return new LeafHistogramFieldData() {
231                        @Override
232                        public HistogramValues getHistogramValues() throws IOException {
233                            try {
234                                final BinaryDocValues values = DocValues.getBinary(context.reader(), fieldName);
235                                final InternalTDigestValue value = new InternalTDigestValue();
236                                return new HistogramValues() {
237 
238                                    @Override
239                                    public boolean advanceExact(int doc) throws IOException {
240                                        return values.advanceExact(doc);
241                                    }
242 
243                                    @Override
244                                    public HistogramValue histogram() throws IOException {
245                                        try {
246                                            value.reset(values.binaryValue());
247                                            return value;
248                                        } catch (IOException e) {
249                                            throw new IOException("Cannot load doc value", e);
250                                        }
251                                    }
252                                };
253                            } catch (IOException e) {
254                                throw new IOException("Cannot load doc values", e);
255                            }
256                        }
257 
258                        @Override
259                        public DocValuesScriptFieldFactory getScriptFieldFactory(String name) {
260                            throw new UnsupportedOperationException("The [" + CONTENT_TYPE + "] field does not " + "support scripts");
261                        }
262 
263                        @Override
264                        public FormattedDocValues getFormattedValues(DocValueFormat format) {
265                            try {
266                                final BinaryDocValues values = DocValues.getBinary(context.reader(), fieldName);
267                                final InternalTDigestValue value = new InternalTDigestValue();
268                                return new FormattedDocValues() {
269                                    @Override
270                                    public boolean advanceExact(int docId) throws IOException {
271                                        return values.advanceExact(docId);
272                                    }
273 
274                                    @Override
275                                    public int docValueCount() {
276                                        return 1;
277                                    }
278 
279                                    @Override
280                                    public Object nextValue() throws IOException {
281                                        value.reset(values.binaryValue());
282                                        return value;
283                                    }
284                                };
285                            } catch (IOException e) {
286                                throw new UncheckedIOException("Unable to loead histogram doc values", e);
287                            }
288                        }
289 
290                        @Override
291                        public SortedBinaryDocValues getBytesValues() {
292                            throw new UnsupportedOperationException(
293                                "String representation of doc values " + "for [" + CONTENT_TYPE + "] fields is not supported"
294                            );
295                        }
296 
297                        @Override
298                        public long ramBytesUsed() {
299                            return 0; // Unknown
300                        }
301 
302                    };
303                }
304 
305                @Override
306                public LeafHistogramFieldData loadDirect(LeafReaderContext context) {
307                    return load(context);
308                }
309 
310                @Override
311                public SortField sortField(Object missingValue, MultiValueMode sortMode, Nested nested, boolean reverse) {
312                    throw new IllegalArgumentException("can't sort on the [" + CONTENT_TYPE + "] field");
313                }
314 
315                @Override
316                public BucketedSort newBucketedSort(
317                    BigArrays bigArrays,
318                    Object missingValue,
319                    MultiValueMode sortMode,
320                    Nested nested,
321                    SortOrder sortOrder,
322                    DocValueFormat format,
323                    int bucketSize,
324                    BucketedSort.ExtraData extra
325                ) {
326                    throw new IllegalArgumentException("can't sort on the [" + CONTENT_TYPE + "] field");
327                }
328            };
329        }

222@Override
223        public IndexFieldData.Builder fielddataBuilder(FieldDataContext fieldDataContext) {
224            failIfNoDocValues();
225            // TODO - This needs to be changed to a custom values source type
226            return (cache, breakerService) -> new IndexHistogramFieldData(name(), AnalyticsValuesSourceType.HISTOGRAM) {
227 
228                @Override
229                public LeafHistogramFieldData load(LeafReaderContext context) {
230                    return new LeafHistogramFieldData() {
231                        @Override
232                        public HistogramValues getHistogramValues() throws IOException {
233                            try {
234                                final BinaryDocValues values = DocValues.getBinary(context.reader(), fieldName);
235                                final InternalTDigestValue value = new InternalTDigestValue();
236                                return new HistogramValues() {
237 
238                                    @Override
239                                    public boolean advanceExact(int doc) throws IOException {
240                                        return values.advanceExact(doc);
241                                    }
242 
243                                    @Override
244                                    public HistogramValue histogram() throws IOException {
245                                        try {
246                                            value.reset(values.binaryValue());
247                                            return value;
248                                        } catch (IOException e) {
249                                            throw new IOException("Cannot load doc value", e);
250                                        }
251                                    }
252                                };
253                            } catch (IOException e) {

261                        }

263                        @Override
264                        public FormattedDocValues getFormattedValues(DocValueFormat format) {
265                            try {
266                                final BinaryDocValues values = DocValues.getBinary(context.reader(), fieldName);
267                                final InternalTDigestValue value = new InternalTDigestValue();
268                                return new FormattedDocValues() {
269                                    @Override
270                                    public boolean advanceExact(int docId) throws IOException {
271                                        return values.advanceExact(docId);
272                                    }
273 
274                                    @Override
275                                    public int docValueCount() {
276                                        return 1;
277                                    }
278 
279                                    @Override
280                                    public Object nextValue() throws IOException {
281                                        value.reset(values.binaryValue());
282                                        return value;
283                                    }
284                                };
285                            } catch (IOException e) {
286                                throw new UncheckedIOException("Unable to loead histogram doc values", e);
287                            }
288                        }
289 
290                        @Override
291                        public SortedBinaryDocValues getBytesValues() {
292                            throw new UnsupportedOperationException(
293                                "String representation of doc values " + "for [" + CONTENT_TYPE + "] fields is not supported"
294                            );
295                        }
296 
297                        @Override
298                        public long ramBytesUsed() {
299                            return 0; // Unknown
300                        }
301 
302                    };
303                }
304 
305                @Override
306                public LeafHistogramFieldData loadDirect(LeafReaderContext context) {
307                    return load(context);
308                }
309 
310                @Override
311                public SortField sortField(Object missingValue, MultiValueMode sortMode, Nested nested, boolean reverse) {
312                    throw new IllegalArgumentException("can't sort on the [" + CONTENT_TYPE + "] field");
313                }
314 
315                @Override
316                public BucketedSort newBucketedSort(
317                    BigArrays bigArrays,
318                    Object missingValue,
319                    MultiValueMode sortMode,
320                    Nested nested,
321                    SortOrder sortOrder,
322                    DocValueFormat format,
323                    int bucketSize,
324                    BucketedSort.ExtraData extra
325                ) {
326                    throw new IllegalArgumentException("can't sort on the [" + CONTENT_TYPE + "] field");
327                }
328            };
329        }

        Object columnGap = this.getColumnGap();
        sb.append(", ColumnGap=");
        if (columnGap instanceof float[])
        {

        }
        else
        {
            sb.append(columnGap);

    }

1051@Override
1052    public SortedNumericDocValues getSortedNumeric(FieldInfo field) throws IOException {
1053        SortedSetEntry ss = sortedNumerics.get(field.name);
1054        if (ss.format == Lucene54DocValuesFormat.SORTED_SINGLE_VALUED) {
1055            NumericEntry numericEntry = numerics.get(field.name);
1056            final LongValues values = getNumeric(numericEntry);
1057            if (numericEntry.format == Lucene54DocValuesFormat.SPARSE_COMPRESSED) {
1058                SparseNumericDocValues sparseValues = ((SparseNumericDocValuesRandomAccessWrapper) values).values;
1059                return new SortedNumericDocValues() {
1060 
1061                    @Override
1062                    public long nextValue() throws IOException {
1063                        return sparseValues.longValue();
1064                    }
1065 
1066                    @Override
1067                    public int docValueCount() {
1068                        return 1;
1069                    }
1070 
1071                    @Override
1072                    public int docID() {
1073                        return sparseValues.docID();
1074                    }
1075 
1076                    @Override
1077                    public int nextDoc() throws IOException {
1078                        return sparseValues.nextDoc();
1079                    }
1080 
1081                    @Override
1082                    public int advance(int target) throws IOException {
1083                        return sparseValues.advance(target);
1084                    }
1085 
1086                    @Override
1087                    public boolean advanceExact(int target) throws IOException {
1088                        return sparseValues.advanceExact(target);
1089                    }
1090 
1091                    @Override
1092                    public long cost() {
1093                        return sparseValues.cost();
1094                    }
1095 
1096                };
1097            }
1098            final Bits docsWithField = getLiveBits(numericEntry.missingOffset, maxDoc);
1099            return new SortedNumericDocValues() {
1100                int docID = -1;
1101 
1102                @Override
1103                public int docID() {
1104                    return docID;
1105                }
1106 
1107                @Override
1108                public int nextDoc() {
1109                    while (true) {
1110                        docID++;
1111                        if (docID == maxDoc) {
1112                            docID = NO_MORE_DOCS;
1113                            break;
1114                        }
1115 
1116                        if (docsWithField.get(docID)) {
1117                            // TODO: use .nextSetBit here, at least!!
1118                            break;
1119                        }
1120                    }
1121                    return docID;
1122                }
1123 
1124                @Override
1125                public int advance(int target) {
1126                    if (target >= maxDoc) {
1127                        docID = NO_MORE_DOCS;
1128                        return docID;
1129                    } else {
1130                        docID = target - 1;
1131                        return nextDoc();
1132                    }
1133                }
1134 
1135                @Override
1136                public boolean advanceExact(int target) throws IOException {
1137                    docID = target;
1138                    return docsWithField.get(docID);
1139                }
1140 
1141                @Override
1142                public long cost() {
1143                    // TODO
1144                    return 0;
1145                }
1146 
1147                @Override
1148                public int docValueCount() {
1149                    return 1;
1150                }
1151 
1152                @Override
1153                public long nextValue() {
1154                    return values.get(docID);
1155                }
1156            };
1157        } else if (ss.format == Lucene54DocValuesFormat.SORTED_WITH_ADDRESSES) {
1158            NumericEntry numericEntry = numerics.get(field.name);
1159            final LongValues values = getNumeric(numericEntry);
1160            final LongValues ordIndex = getOrdIndexInstance(field, ordIndexes.get(field.name));
1161 
1162            return new SortedNumericDocValues() {
1163                long startOffset;
1164                long endOffset;
1165                int docID = -1;
1166                long upto;
1167 
1168                @Override
1169                public int docID() {
1170                    return docID;
1171                }
1172 
1173                @Override
1174                public int nextDoc() {
1175                    while (true) {
1176                        docID++;
1177                        if (docID == maxDoc) {
1178                            docID = NO_MORE_DOCS;
1179                            return docID;
1180                        }
1181                        startOffset = ordIndex.get(docID);
1182                        endOffset = ordIndex.get(docID + 1L);
1183                        if (endOffset > startOffset) {
1184                            break;
1185                        }
1186                    }
1187                    upto = startOffset;
1188                    return docID;
1189                }
1190 
1191                @Override
1192                public int advance(int target) {
1193                    if (target >= maxDoc) {
1194                        docID = NO_MORE_DOCS;
1195                        return docID;
1196                    } else {
1197                        docID = target - 1;
1198                        return nextDoc();
1199                    }
1200                }
1201 
1202                @Override
1203                public boolean advanceExact(int target) throws IOException {
1204                    docID = target;
1205                    startOffset = ordIndex.get(docID);
1206                    endOffset = ordIndex.get(docID + 1L);
1207                    upto = startOffset;
1208                    return endOffset > startOffset;
1209                }
1210 
1211                @Override

1213                    // TODO

1215                }
1216

1219                    return (int) (endOffset - startOffset);

1221 
1222                @Override
1223                public long nextValue() {
1224                    return values.get(upto++);
1225                }
1226            };

1244                @Override

1267                        return docID;
1268                    } else {

1270                        return nextDoc();

1272                }

1278                    startOffset = offsets[ord];
1279                    endOffset = offsets[ord + 1];

1292                    return endOffset - startOffset;
1293                }

1296                public long nextValue() {
1297                    return table[upto++];
1298                }

1301            throw new AssertionError();

482public EmbeddedServletOptions(ServletConfig config, ServletContext context) {
483 
484        Enumeration<String> enumeration = config.getInitParameterNames();
485        while (enumeration.hasMoreElements()) {
486            String k = enumeration.nextElement();
487            String v = config.getInitParameter(k);
488            setProperty(k, v);
489        }
490 
491        String keepgen = config.getInitParameter("keepgenerated");
492        if (keepgen != null) {
493            if (keepgen.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
494                this.keepGenerated = true;
495            } else if (keepgen.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
496                this.keepGenerated = false;
497            } else {
498                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
499                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.keepgen"));
500                }
501            }
502        }
503 
504 
505        String trimsp = config.getInitParameter("trimSpaces");
506        if (trimsp != null) {
507            try {
508                trimSpaces = TrimSpacesOption.valueOf(trimsp.toUpperCase(Locale.ENGLISH));
509            } catch (IllegalArgumentException iae) {
510                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
511                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.trimspaces"), iae);
512                }
513            }
514        }
515 
516        this.isPoolingEnabled = true;
517        String poolingEnabledParam = config.getInitParameter("enablePooling");
518        if (poolingEnabledParam != null && !poolingEnabledParam.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
519            if (poolingEnabledParam.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
520                this.isPoolingEnabled = false;
521            } else {
522                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
523                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.enablePooling"));
524                }
525            }
526        }
527 
528        String mapFile = config.getInitParameter("mappedfile");
529        if (mapFile != null) {
530            if (mapFile.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
531                this.mappedFile = true;
532            } else if (mapFile.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
533                this.mappedFile = false;
534            } else {
535                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
536                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.mappedFile"));
537                }
538            }
539        }
540 
541        String debugInfo = config.getInitParameter("classdebuginfo");
542        if (debugInfo != null) {
543            if (debugInfo.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
544                this.classDebugInfo = true;
545            } else if (debugInfo.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
546                this.classDebugInfo = false;
547            } else {
548                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
549                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.classDebugInfo"));
550                }
551            }
552        }
553 
554        String checkInterval = config.getInitParameter("checkInterval");
555        if (checkInterval != null) {
556            try {
557                this.checkInterval = Integer.parseInt(checkInterval);
558            } catch (NumberFormatException ex) {
559                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
560                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.checkInterval"));
561                }
562            }
563        }
564 
565        String modificationTestInterval = config.getInitParameter("modificationTestInterval");
566        if (modificationTestInterval != null) {
567            try {
568                this.modificationTestInterval = Integer.parseInt(modificationTestInterval);
569            } catch (NumberFormatException ex) {
570                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
571                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.modificationTestInterval"));
572                }
573            }
574        }
575 
576        String recompileOnFail = config.getInitParameter("recompileOnFail");
577        if (recompileOnFail != null) {
578            if (recompileOnFail.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
579                this.recompileOnFail = true;
580            } else if (recompileOnFail.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
581                this.recompileOnFail = false;

584                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.recompileOnFail"));
585                }
586            }
587        }
588        String development = config.getInitParameter("development");
589        if (development != null) {
590            if (development.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
591                this.development = true;
592            } else if (development.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
593                this.development = false;
594            } else {
595                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
596                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.development"));
597                }
598            }
599        }
600 
601        String suppressSmap = config.getInitParameter("suppressSmap");
602        if (suppressSmap != null) {
603            if (suppressSmap.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
604                isSmapSuppressed = true;
605            } else if (suppressSmap.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
606                isSmapSuppressed = false;
607            } else {
608                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
609                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.suppressSmap"));
610                }
611            }
612        }
613 
614        String dumpSmap = config.getInitParameter("dumpSmap");
615        if (dumpSmap != null) {
616            if (dumpSmap.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
617                isSmapDumped = true;
618            } else if (dumpSmap.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {

623                }

627        String genCharArray = config.getInitParameter("genStringAsCharArray");
628        if (genCharArray != null) {

631            } else if (genCharArray.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {

635                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.genchararray"));
636                }
637            }
638        }
639

641        if (errBeanClass != null) {

643                errorOnUseBeanInvalidClassAttribute = true;
644            } else if (errBeanClass.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
645                errorOnUseBeanInvalidClassAttribute = false;
646            } else {

648                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.errBean"));
649                }

653        String classpath = config.getInitParameter("classpath");
654        if (classpath != null) {
655            this.classpath = classpath;
656        }
657 
658        String useNonstandardTagOptimizations = config.getInitParameter("useNonstandardTagOptimizations");
659        if (useNonstandardTagOptimizations != null) {
660            this.useNonstandardTagOptimizations = useNonstandardTagOptimizations;
661        }
662 
663        /*
664         * scratchdir
665         */
666        String dir = config.getInitParameter("scratchdir");
667        if (dir != null) {
668            scratchDir = new File(dir);
669        } else {
670            scratchDir = (File) context.getAttribute(ServletContext.TEMPDIR);
671        }
672        if (scratchDir == null) {
673            log.fatal(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.error.no.scratch.dir"));
674            return;
675        }
676 
677        if (!(scratchDir.exists() && scratchDir.canRead() && scratchDir.canWrite() && scratchDir.isDirectory())) {
678            log.fatal(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.error.bad.scratch.dir", scratchDir.getAbsolutePath()));
679        }
680

686        }

872        }
873 
874        String useInstanceManagerForTags = config.getInitParameter("useInstanceManagerForTags");
875        if (useInstanceManagerForTags != null) {
876            if (useInstanceManagerForTags.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
877                this.useInstanceManagerForTags = true;
878            } else if (useInstanceManagerForTags.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
879                this.useInstanceManagerForTags = false;
880            } else {
881                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
882                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.useInstanceManagerForTags"));
883                }
884            }
885        }
886 
887        // Set up the global Tag Libraries location cache for this
888        // web-application.
889        tldCache = TldCache.getInstance(context);
890 
891        // Set up the jsp config info for this web app.
892        jspConfig = new JspConfig(context);
893 
894        // Create a Tag plugin instance
895        tagPluginManager = new TagPluginManager(context);
896    }

482public EmbeddedServletOptions(ServletConfig config, ServletContext context) {
483 
484        Enumeration<String> enumeration = config.getInitParameterNames();
485        while (enumeration.hasMoreElements()) {
486            String k = enumeration.nextElement();
487            String v = config.getInitParameter(k);
488            setProperty(k, v);
489        }
490 
491        String keepgen = config.getInitParameter("keepgenerated");
492        if (keepgen != null) {
493            if (keepgen.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
494                this.keepGenerated = true;
495            } else if (keepgen.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
496                this.keepGenerated = false;
497            } else {
498                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
499                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.keepgen"));
500                }
501            }
502        }
503 
504 
505        String trimsp = config.getInitParameter("trimSpaces");
506        if (trimsp != null) {
507            try {
508                trimSpaces = TrimSpacesOption.valueOf(trimsp.toUpperCase(Locale.ENGLISH));
509            } catch (IllegalArgumentException iae) {
510                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
511                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.trimspaces"), iae);
512                }
513            }
514        }
515 
516        this.isPoolingEnabled = true;
517        String poolingEnabledParam = config.getInitParameter("enablePooling");
518        if (poolingEnabledParam != null && !poolingEnabledParam.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {
519            if (poolingEnabledParam.equalsIgnoreCase("false")) {
520                this.isPoolingEnabled = false;
521            } else {
522                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {
523                    log.warn(Localizer.getMessage("jsp.warning.enablePooling"));
524                }
525            }
526        }
527

533                this.mappedFile = false;

535                if (log.isWarnEnabled()) {

543            if (debugInfo.equalsIgnoreCase("true")) {

561                }
562            }
563        }

Original Clone: 
180public static void setField(Field f, Object instance, Object value) {
181        try {
182            if (!Modifier.isPublic(f.getModifiers()) && !f.canAccess(instance)) {
183                f.setAccessible(true);
184            }
185            // must use fine-grained for the correct type when setting a field value via reflection
186            Class<?> type = f.getType();
187            if (boolean.class == type) {
188                boolean val;
189                if (value instanceof Boolean) {
190                    val = (boolean) value;
191                } else {
192                    val = Boolean.parseBoolean(value.toString());
193                }
194                f.setBoolean(instance, val);
195            } else if (byte.class == type) {
196                byte val;
197                if (value instanceof Byte) {
198                    val = (byte) value;
199                } else {
200                    val = Byte.parseByte(value.toString());
201                }
202                f.setByte(instance, val);
203            } else if (int.class == type) {
204                int val;
205                if (value instanceof Integer) {
206                    val = (int) value;
207                } else {
208                    val = Integer.parseInt(value.toString());
209                }
210                f.setInt(instance, val);
211            } else if (long.class == type) {
212                long val;
213                if (value instanceof Long) {
214                    val = (long) value;
215                } else {
216                    val = Long.parseLong(value.toString());
217                }
218                f.setLong(instance, val);
219            } else if (float.class == type) {
220                float val;
221                if (value instanceof Float) {
222                    val = (float) value;
223                } else {
224                    val = Float.parseFloat(value.toString());
225                }
226                f.setFloat(instance, val);
227            } else if (double.class == type) {
228                double val;
229                if (value instanceof Double) {
230                    val = (double) value;
231                } else {
232                    val = Double.parseDouble(value.toString());
233                }
234                f.setDouble(instance, val);
235            } else {
236                f.set(instance, value);
237            }
238        } catch (Exception ex) {
239            throw new UnsupportedOperationException("Cannot inject value of class: " + value.getClass() + " into: " + f);
240        }
241    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(Object value, Field f, Object instance) throws IllegalArgumentException, IllegalAccessException {
    float val;
    if (value instanceof Float) {
        val = (float) value;
    } else {
        val = Float.parseFloat(value.toString());
    }
    f.setFloat(instance, val);
}

public void extractedClone(ExecutorService asyncExecutor, final TimeUnit timeUnit, final long timeout)

Original Clone: 
458@Override
459    public boolean releaseSub(final long timeout, final TimeUnit timeUnit) {
460        LOGGER.debug("Shutting down RollingFileManager {}", getName());
461        boolean stopped = true;
462        if (triggeringPolicy instanceof LifeCycle2) {
463            stopped &= ((LifeCycle2) triggeringPolicy).stop(timeout, timeUnit);
464        } else if (triggeringPolicy instanceof LifeCycle) {
465            ((LifeCycle) triggeringPolicy).stop();
466            stopped &= true;
467        }
468        final boolean status = super.releaseSub(timeout, timeUnit) && stopped;
469        asyncExecutor.shutdown();
470        try {
471            // Allow at least the minimum interval to pass so async actions can complete.
472            final long millis = timeUnit.toMillis(timeout);
473            final long waitInterval = MIN_DURATION < millis ? millis : MIN_DURATION;
474 
475            for (int count = 1; count <= MAX_TRIES && !asyncExecutor.isTerminated(); ++count) {
476                asyncExecutor.awaitTermination(waitInterval * count, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);
477            }
478            if (asyncExecutor.isTerminated()) {
479                LOGGER.debug("All asynchronous threads have terminated");
480            } else {
481                asyncExecutor.shutdownNow();
482                try {
483                    asyncExecutor.awaitTermination(timeout, timeUnit);
484                    if (asyncExecutor.isTerminated()) {
485                        LOGGER.debug("All asynchronous threads have terminated");
486                    } else {
487                        LOGGER.debug(
488                                "RollingFileManager shutting down but some asynchronous services may not have completed");
489                    }
490                } catch (final InterruptedException inner) {
491                    LOGGER.warn("RollingFileManager stopped but some asynchronous services may not have completed.");
492                }
493            }
494        } catch (final InterruptedException ie) {
495            asyncExecutor.shutdownNow();
496            try {
497                asyncExecutor.awaitTermination(timeout, timeUnit);
498                if (asyncExecutor.isTerminated()) {
499                    LOGGER.debug("All asynchronous threads have terminated");
500                }
501            } catch (final InterruptedException inner) {
502                LOGGER.warn("RollingFileManager stopped but some asynchronous services may not have completed.");
503            }
504            // Preserve interrupt status
505            Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
506        }
507        LOGGER.debug("RollingFileManager shutdown completed with status {}", status);
508        return status;
509    }

private void extracted(final long timeout, final TimeUnit timeUnit) {
        asyncExecutor.shutdownNow();
        try {
            asyncExecutor.awaitTermination(timeout, timeUnit);
            if (asyncExecutor.isTerminated()) {
                LOGGER.debug("All asynchronous threads have terminated");
            } else {
                LOGGER.debug(
                        "RollingFileManager shutting down but some asynchronous services may not have completed");
            }
        } catch (final InterruptedException inner) {
            LOGGER.warn("RollingFileManager stopped but some asynchronous services may not have completed.");
        }
    }

Func ID: logging-log4j2_273_376

public void extractedClone(ExecutorService asyncExecutor, final TimeUnit timeUnit, final long timeout)

Parameters Derivation (In(i)):
['asyncExecutor', 'timeUnit', 'timeout']

Original Clone: 
458@Override
459    public boolean releaseSub(final long timeout, final TimeUnit timeUnit) {
460        LOGGER.debug("Shutting down RollingFileManager {}", getName());
461        boolean stopped = true;
462        if (triggeringPolicy instanceof LifeCycle2) {
463            stopped &= ((LifeCycle2) triggeringPolicy).stop(timeout, timeUnit);
464        } else if (triggeringPolicy instanceof LifeCycle) {
465            ((LifeCycle) triggeringPolicy).stop();
466            stopped &= true;
467        }
468        final boolean status = super.releaseSub(timeout, timeUnit) && stopped;
469        asyncExecutor.shutdown();
470        try {
471            // Allow at least the minimum interval to pass so async actions can complete.
472            final long millis = timeUnit.toMillis(timeout);
473            final long waitInterval = MIN_DURATION < millis ? millis : MIN_DURATION;
474 
475            for (int count = 1; count <= MAX_TRIES && !asyncExecutor.isTerminated(); ++count) {
476                asyncExecutor.awaitTermination(waitInterval * count, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);
477            }
478            if (asyncExecutor.isTerminated()) {
479                LOGGER.debug("All asynchronous threads have terminated");
480            } else {
481                asyncExecutor.shutdownNow();
482                try {
483                    asyncExecutor.awaitTermination(timeout, timeUnit);
484                    if (asyncExecutor.isTerminated()) {
485                        LOGGER.debug("All asynchronous threads have terminated");
486                    } else {
487                        LOGGER.debug(
488                                "RollingFileManager shutting down but some asynchronous services may not have completed");
489                    }
490                } catch (final InterruptedException inner) {
491                    LOGGER.warn("RollingFileManager stopped but some asynchronous services may not have completed.");
492                }
493            }
494        } catch (final InterruptedException ie) {
495            asyncExecutor.shutdownNow();
496            try {
497                asyncExecutor.awaitTermination(timeout, timeUnit);
498                if (asyncExecutor.isTerminated()) {
499                    LOGGER.debug("All asynchronous threads have terminated");
500                }
501            } catch (final InterruptedException inner) {
502                LOGGER.warn("RollingFileManager stopped but some asynchronous services may not have completed.");
503            }
504            // Preserve interrupt status
505            Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
506        }
507        LOGGER.debug("RollingFileManager shutdown completed with status {}", status);
508        return status;
509    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(final long timeout, final TimeUnit timeUnit) {
        asyncExecutor.shutdownNow();
        try {
            asyncExecutor.awaitTermination(timeout, timeUnit);
            if (asyncExecutor.isTerminated()) {
                LOGGER.debug("All asynchronous threads have terminated");
            }
        } catch (final InterruptedException inner) {
            LOGGER.warn("RollingFileManager stopped but some asynchronous services may not have completed.");
        }
        // Preserve interrupt status
        Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
    }

170private static Class generateInternal(final ClassDefiningClassLoader cdcl, final int size, final String clsPath, final String clsName) {
171        // ensure only one thread will attempt to generate and define the new class
172        synchronized (cdcl) {
173            // create a new one
174            final String[] newFields = varList(size);
175 
176            final String baseName = p(DynamicScope.class);
177 
178            JiteClass jiteClass = new JiteClass(clsPath, baseName, new String[0]) {{
179                setSourceFile(clsPath + ".java");
180 
181                // parent class constructor
182                defineMethod("<init>", ACC_PUBLIC, sig(void.class, StaticScope.class, DynamicScope.class), new CodeBlock() {{
183                    aload(0);
184                    aload(1);
185                    aload(2);
186                    invokespecial(baseName, "<init>", sig(void.class, StaticScope.class, DynamicScope.class));
187                    voidreturn();
188                }});
189 
190                // required overrides
191                defineMethod("getValue", ACC_PUBLIC, sig(IRubyObject.class, int.class, int.class), new CodeBlock() {{
192                    LabelNode parentCall = new LabelNode(new Label());
193 
194                    line(0);
195 
196                    iload(2); // depth
197                    ifne(parentCall);
198 
199                    if (size > 0) genGetSwitch(clsPath, newFields, this, 1);
200 
201                    line(1);
202 
203                    invokestatic(clsPath, "sizeError", sig(RuntimeException.class));
204                    athrow();
205 
206                    label(parentCall);
207                    line(2);
208 
209                    aload(0);
210                    getfield(baseName, "parent", ci(DynamicScope.class));
211                    iload(1);
212                    iload(2);
213                    pushInt(1);
214                    isub();
215                    invokevirtual(baseName, "getValue", sig(IRubyObject.class, int.class, int.class));
216                    areturn();
217                }});
218 
219                defineMethod("setValueVoid", ACC_PUBLIC, sig(void.class, IRubyObject.class, int.class, int.class), new CodeBlock() {{
220                    LabelNode parentCall = new LabelNode(new Label());
221 
222                    line(3);
223                    iload(3); // depth
224                    ifne(parentCall);
225 
226                    if (size > 0) genPutSwitch(clsPath, newFields, this, 2);
227 
228                    line(4);
229 
230                    invokestatic(clsPath, "sizeError", sig(RuntimeException.class));
231                    athrow();
232 
233                    label(parentCall);
234                    line(5);
235 
236                    aload(0);
237                    getfield(baseName, "parent", ci(DynamicScope.class));
238                    aload(1);
239                    iload(2);
240                    iload(3);
241                    pushInt(1);
242                    isub();
243 
244                    line(6);
245                    invokevirtual(baseName, "setValueVoid", sig(void.class, IRubyObject.class, int.class, int.class));
246                    voidreturn();
247                }});
248 
249                // optional overrides
250                defineMethod("getValueDepthZero", ACC_PUBLIC, sig(IRubyObject.class, int.class), new CodeBlock() {{
251                    line(7);
252 
253                    if (size > 0) genGetSwitch(clsPath, newFields, this, 1);
254 
255                    line(8);
256 
257                    invokestatic(clsPath, "sizeError", sig(RuntimeException.class));
258                    athrow();
259                }});
260 
261                defineMethod("setValueDepthZeroVoid", ACC_PUBLIC, sig(void.class, IRubyObject.class, int.class), new CodeBlock() {{
262                    line(9);
263 
264                    if (size > 0) genPutSwitch(clsPath, newFields, this, 2);
265 
266                    line(10);
267 
268                    invokestatic(clsPath, "sizeError", sig(RuntimeException.class));
269                    athrow();
270                }});
271 
272                // utilities
273 
274                defineMethod("sizeError", ACC_PRIVATE | ACC_STATIC, sig(RuntimeException.class), new CodeBlock() {{
275                    line(11);
276                    newobj(p(RuntimeException.class));
277                    dup();
278                    ldc(clsName + " only supports scopes with " + size + " variables");
279 
280                    line(12);
281                    invokespecial(p(RuntimeException.class), "<init>", sig(void.class, String.class));
282                    areturn();
283                }});
284 
285                // specialized getters and setters
286 
287                for (int i = 0; i < SPECIALIZED_GETS.size(); i++) {
288                    final int offset = i;
289 
290                    defineMethod(SPECIALIZED_GETS.get(offset), ACC_PUBLIC, sig(IRubyObject.class), new CodeBlock() {{
291                        // line numbers for specialized getters are 100 + offset
292                        line(100 + offset);
293 
294                        if (size <= offset) {
295                            invokestatic(clsPath, "sizeError", sig(RuntimeException.class));
296                            athrow();
297                        } else {
298                            aload(0);
299                            getfield(clsPath, newFields[offset], ci(IRubyObject.class));
300                            areturn();
301                        }
302                    }});
303                }
304 
305                for (int i = 0; i < SPECIALIZED_GETS_OR_NIL.size(); i++) {
306                    final int offset = i;
307 
308                    defineMethod(SPECIALIZED_GETS_OR_NIL.get(offset), ACC_PUBLIC, sig(IRubyObject.class, IRubyObject.class), new CodeBlock() {{
309                        // line numbers for specialized get-or-nils are 200 + offset
310                        line(200 + offset);
311 
312                        if (size <= offset) {
313                            invokestatic(clsPath, "sizeError", sig(RuntimeException.class));
314                            athrow();
315                        } else {
316                            aload(0);
317                            getfield(clsPath, newFields[offset], ci(IRubyObject.class));
318 
319                            dup();
320 
321                            LabelNode ok = new LabelNode(new Label());
322                            ifnonnull(ok);
323 
324                            pop();
325 
326                            aload(0);
327                            aload(1);
328                            putfield(clsPath, newFields[offset], ci(IRubyObject.class));
329                            aload(1);
330 
331                            label(ok);
332                            areturn();
333                        }
334                    }});
335                }
336 
337                for (int i = 0; i < SPECIALIZED_SETS.size(); i++) {
338                    final int offset = i;
339 
340                    defineMethod(SPECIALIZED_SETS.get(offset), ACC_PUBLIC, sig(void.class, IRubyObject.class), new CodeBlock() {{
341                        // line numbers for specialized setters are 300 + offset
342                        line(300 + offset);
343 
344                        if (size <= offset) {
345                            invokestatic(clsPath, "sizeError", sig(RuntimeException.class));
346                            athrow();
347                        } else {
348                            aload(0);
349                            aload(1);
350                            putfield(clsPath, newFields[offset], ci(IRubyObject.class));
351                            voidreturn();
352                        }
353                    }});
354                }
355 
356                // fields
357 
358                for (String prop : newFields) {
359                    defineField(prop, ACC_PUBLIC, ci(IRubyObject.class), null);
360                }
361            }};
362 
363            return defineClass(cdcl, jiteClass);
364        }
365    }

170private static Class generateInternal(final ClassDefiningClassLoader cdcl, final int size, final String clsPath, final String clsName) {
171        // ensure only one thread will attempt to generate and define the new class
172        synchronized (cdcl) {
173            // create a new one
174            final String[] newFields = varList(size);
175 
176            final String baseName = p(DynamicScope.class);
177 
178            JiteClass jiteClass = new JiteClass(clsPath, baseName, new String[0]) {{
179                setSourceFile(clsPath + ".java");
180 
181                // parent class constructor
182                defineMethod("<init>", ACC_PUBLIC, sig(void.class, StaticScope.class, DynamicScope.class), new CodeBlock() {{
183                    aload(0);
184                    aload(1);
185                    aload(2);
186                    invokespecial(baseName, "<init>", sig(void.class, StaticScope.class, DynamicScope.class));
187                    voidreturn();

194                    line(0);

285                // specialized getters and setters
286 
287                for (int i = 0; i < SPECIALIZED_GETS.size(); i++) {
288                    final int offset = i;
289 
290                    defineMethod(SPECIALIZED_GETS.get(offset), ACC_PUBLIC, sig(IRubyObject.class), new CodeBlock() {{
291                        // line numbers for specialized getters are 100 + offset
292                        line(100 + offset);
293 
294                        if (size <= offset) {
295                            invokestatic(clsPath, "sizeError", sig(RuntimeException.class));
296                            athrow();
297                        } else {
298                            aload(0);
299                            getfield(clsPath, newFields[offset], ci(IRubyObject.class));
300                            areturn();
301                        }
302                    }});
303                }
304 
305                for (int i = 0; i < SPECIALIZED_GETS_OR_NIL.size(); i++) {
306                    final int offset = i;
307 
308                    defineMethod(SPECIALIZED_GETS_OR_NIL.get(offset), ACC_PUBLIC, sig(IRubyObject.class, IRubyObject.class), new CodeBlock() {{
309                        // line numbers for specialized get-or-nils are 200 + offset
310                        line(200 + offset);
311 
312                        if (size <= offset) {
313                            invokestatic(clsPath, "sizeError", sig(RuntimeException.class));
314                            athrow();
315                        } else {
316                            aload(0);
317                            getfield(clsPath, newFields[offset], ci(IRubyObject.class));
318 
319                            dup();
320 
321                            LabelNode ok = new LabelNode(new Label());
322                            ifnonnull(ok);
323 
324                            pop();
325 
326                            aload(0);
327                            aload(1);
328                            putfield(clsPath, newFields[offset], ci(IRubyObject.class));
329                            aload(1);
330 
331                            label(ok);
332                            areturn();
333                        }
334                    }});
335                }
336 
337                for (int i = 0; i < SPECIALIZED_SETS.size(); i++) {
338                    final int offset = i;
339 
340                    defineMethod(SPECIALIZED_SETS.get(offset), ACC_PUBLIC, sig(void.class, IRubyObject.class), new CodeBlock() {{
341                        // line numbers for specialized setters are 300 + offset
342                        line(300 + offset);
343 
344                        if (size <= offset) {
345                            invokestatic(clsPath, "sizeError", sig(RuntimeException.class));
346                            athrow();
347                        } else {
348                            aload(0);
349                            aload(1);
350                            putfield(clsPath, newFields[offset], ci(IRubyObject.class));
351                            voidreturn();
352                        }
353                    }});
354                }
355 
356                // fields
357 
358                for (String prop : newFields) {
359                    defineField(prop, ACC_PUBLIC, ci(IRubyObject.class), null);
360                }
361            }};
362 
363            return defineClass(cdcl, jiteClass);
364        }
365    }

public void extractedClone(int exprValue, int maxValue, int minValue, int numBuckets, IntWritable output)

Return Derivation (Out(i)):
[]
Original Clone: 
166private IntWritable evaluate(int exprValue, int minValue, int maxValue, int numBuckets) {
167 
168    Preconditions.checkArgument(numBuckets > 0, "numBuckets in width_bucket function must be above 0");
169    Preconditions.checkArgument(maxValue != minValue, "maxValue cannot be equal to minValue in width_bucket function");
170 
171    if (maxValue > minValue) {
172      if (exprValue < minValue) {
173        output.set(0);
174      } else if (exprValue >= maxValue) {
175        output.set(numBuckets + 1);
176      } else {
177        output.set((int) Math.floor((numBuckets * (exprValue - minValue) / (maxValue - minValue)) + 1));
178      }
179    } else {
180      if (exprValue > minValue) {
181        output.set(0);
182      } else if (exprValue <= maxValue) {
183        output.set(numBuckets + 1);
184      } else {
185        output.set((int) Math.floor((numBuckets * (minValue - exprValue) / (minValue - maxValue)) + 1));
186      }
187    }
188 
189    return output;
190  }

166private IntWritable evaluate(int exprValue, int minValue, int maxValue, int numBuckets) {
167 
168    Preconditions.checkArgument(numBuckets > 0, "numBuckets in width_bucket function must be above 0");
169    Preconditions.checkArgument(maxValue != minValue, "maxValue cannot be equal to minValue in width_bucket function");
170 
171    if (maxValue > minValue) {
172      if (exprValue < minValue) {
173        output.set(0);
174      } else if (exprValue >= maxValue) {
175        output.set(numBuckets + 1);
176      } else {
177        output.set((int) Math.floor((numBuckets * (exprValue - minValue) / (maxValue - minValue)) + 1));
178      }
179    } else {
180      if (exprValue > minValue) {
181        output.set(0);
182      } else if (exprValue <= maxValue) {
183        output.set(numBuckets + 1);
184      } else {
185        output.set((int) Math.floor((numBuckets * (minValue - exprValue) / (minValue - maxValue)) + 1));
186      }
187    }
188 
189    return output;
190  }
