1092private static boolean shouldSkipTest()
1093    {
1094	boolean result = false;
1095 
1096	// figure out if suite should be skipped ... adhoc rules
1097	boolean isJdk12 = false; // really now 'isJdk12orHigher'
1098	boolean isJdk118 = false;
1099	boolean isJdk117 = false;
1100	boolean isEncryption = false;
1101	boolean isJdk12Test = false;
1102	boolean isJdk12ExtTest = false;
1103	boolean isSyncTest = false;
1104	boolean isSyncProduct = false;
1105	boolean isExcludeJCC = false;
1106	// runwithibmjvm is really tri-state. null = run-anywhere,
1107	// true = only ibm jvms, false = only non-IBM jvms.
1108 
1109	// reset skip reason parameters
1110	driverNotFound = false;
1111	needSync = false;
1112	needJdk12 = false;
1113	needJdk12ext = false;
1114	excludedFromJCC = false;
1115	needIBMjvm = null;
1116 
1117 
1118	// Determine if this is jdk12 or higher (with or without extensions)
1119    if (iminor >= 2) isJdk12 = true;
1120    
1121	// if a test needs an ibm jvm, skip if runwithibmjvm is true.
1122	// if a test needs to not run in an ibm jvm, skip if runwithibmjvm is false.
1123	// if null, continue in all cases.
1124	if (runwithibmjvm != null) 
1125	{ 
1126	    if (runwithibmjvm.equals("")) { needIBMjvm = null; }
1127	    else { needIBMjvm = Boolean.valueOf(runwithibmjvm); }
1128	}
1129	if (runwithibmjvm == null) { needIBMjvm = null; }

private static boolean extracted(boolean result) {
        needJdk12ext = true;
            // Check for extensions
            try
            {
                Class jtaClass = Class.forName("javax.transaction.xa.Xid");
                Class jdbcClass = Class.forName("javax.sql.RowSet");
            } 
            catch (ClassNotFoundException cnfe)
            {
                // at least one of the extension classes was not found
                result = true; // skip this test
            }
        return result;
    }

            Class jceClass = Class.forName("javax.crypto.Cipher");

283private void readDocumentStylesElement(IXMLElement elem) throws IOException {
284        if (DEBUG) {
285            System.out.println("ODGStylesReader <" + elem.getName() + " ...>");
286        }
287        for (IXMLElement child : elem.getChildren()) {
288            String ns = child.getNamespace();
289            String name = child.getName();
290            if ("styles".equals(name) && (ns == null || ns.equals(OFFICE_NAMESPACE))) {
291                readStylesElement(child);
292            } else if ("automatic-styles".equals(name) && (ns == null || ns.equals(OFFICE_NAMESPACE))) {
293                readAutomaticStylesElement(child);
294            } else if ("master-styles".equals(name) && (ns == null || ns.equals(OFFICE_NAMESPACE))) {
295                readMasterStylesElement(child);
296            } else {
297                if (DEBUG) {
298                    System.out.println("ODGStylesReader unsupported <" + elem.getName() + "> child " + child);
299                }
300            }
301        }
302        if (DEBUG) {
303            System.out.println("ODGStylesReader </" + elem.getName() + ">");
304        }
305    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(IXMLElement elem) throws IOException {
        for (IXMLElement child : elem.getChildren()) {
            String ns = child.getNamespace();
            String name = child.getName();
            if ("styles".equals(name) && (ns == null || ns.equals(OFFICE_NAMESPACE))) {
                readStylesElement(child);
            } else if ("automatic-styles".equals(name) && (ns == null || ns.equals(OFFICE_NAMESPACE))) {
                readAutomaticStylesElement(child);
            } else if ("master-styles".equals(name) && (ns == null || ns.equals(OFFICE_NAMESPACE))) {
                readMasterStylesElement(child);
            } else {
                if (DEBUG) {
                    System.out.println("ODGStylesReader unsupported <" + elem.getName() + "> child " + child);
                }
            }
        }
    }

private void extracted(IXMLElement elem) throws IOException {
        for (IXMLElement child : elem.getChildren()) {
            String ns = child.getNamespace();
            String name = child.getName();
            if ("automatic-styles".equals(name) && (ns == null || ns.equals(OFFICE_NAMESPACE))) {
                readAutomaticStylesElement(child);
            } else if ("master-styles".equals(name) && (ns == null || ns.equals(OFFICE_NAMESPACE))) {
                readStylesElement(child);
            } else if ("styles".equals(name) && (ns == null || ns.equals(OFFICE_NAMESPACE))) {
                readStylesElement(child);
            }

        }
    }

852@Override
853  public DocValuesSkipper getSkipper(FieldInfo fieldInfo) {
854    final boolean numeric =
855        fieldInfo.getDocValuesType() == DocValuesType.NUMERIC
856            || fieldInfo.getDocValuesType() == DocValuesType.SORTED_NUMERIC;
857    final OneField field = fields.get(fieldInfo.name);
858 
859    // SegmentCoreReaders already verifies this field is
860    // valid:
861    assert field != null;
862 
863    return new DocValuesSkipper() {
864      int doc = -1;
865 
866      @Override
867      public int numLevels() {
868        return 1;
869      }
870 
871      @Override
872      public long minValue(int level) {
873        return minValue();
874      }
875 
876      @Override
877      public long maxValue(int level) {
878        return maxValue();
879      }
880 
881      @Override
882      public int docCount(int level) {
883        return docCount();
884      }
885 
886      @Override
887      public long minValue() {
888        return numeric ? field.minValue : 0;
889      }
890 
891      @Override
892      public long maxValue() {
893        return numeric ? field.maxValue : field.numValues - 1;
894      }
895 
896      @Override
897      public int docCount() {
898        return field.docCount;
899      }
900 
901      @Override
902      public int minDocID(int level) {
903        if (doc == -1) {
904          return -1;
905        } else if (doc >= maxDoc || field.docCount == 0) {
906          return DocIdSetIterator.NO_MORE_DOCS;
907        } else {
908          return 0;
909        }
910      }
911 
912      @Override
913      public int maxDocID(int level) {
914        if (doc == -1) {
915          return -1;
916        } else if (doc >= maxDoc || field.docCount == 0) {
917          return DocIdSetIterator.NO_MORE_DOCS;
918        } else {
919          return maxDoc;
920        }
921      }
922 
923      @Override
924      public void advance(int target) {
925        doc = target;
926      }
927    };
928  }

Original Clone: 
965void GenerateMatchingTupleHelper(Tuple t, BinaryExpression pred,
966            boolean invert) throws FrontendException, ExecException {
967 
968        if (pred instanceof AndExpression) {
969            GenerateMatchingTupleHelper(t, (AndExpression) pred, invert);
970            return;
971        } else if (pred instanceof OrExpression) {
972            GenerateMatchingTupleHelper(t, (OrExpression) pred, invert);
973            return;
974        }
975 
976        // now we are sure that the expression operators are the roots of the
977        // plan
978 
979        boolean leftIsConst = false, rightIsConst = false;
980        Object leftConst = null, rightConst = null;
981        byte leftDataType = 0, rightDataType = 0;
982 
983        int leftCol = -1, rightCol = -1;
984 
985        if (pred instanceof AddExpression || pred instanceof SubtractExpression
986                || pred instanceof MultiplyExpression || pred instanceof DivideExpression
987                || pred instanceof ModExpression || pred instanceof RegexExpression)
988            return; // We don't try to work around these operators right now
989 
990        if (pred.getLhs() instanceof ConstantExpression) {
991            leftIsConst = true;
992            leftConst = ((ConstantExpression) (pred.getLhs())).getValue();
993        } else {
994            LogicalExpression lhs = pred.getLhs();
995            if (lhs instanceof CastExpression)
996                lhs = ((CastExpression) lhs).getExpression();
997            // if (!(pred.getLhsOperand() instanceof ProjectExpression && ((ProjectExpression)
998            // pred
999            // .getLhsOperand()).getProjection().size() == 1))
1000            // return; // too hard
1001            if (!(lhs instanceof ProjectExpression))
1002                return;
1003            leftCol = ((ProjectExpression) lhs).getColNum();
1004            leftDataType = ((ProjectExpression) lhs).getType();
1005 
1006            Object d = t.get(leftCol);
1007            if (d != null) {
1008                leftIsConst = true;
1009                leftConst = d;
1010            }
1011        }
1012 
1013        if (pred.getRhs() instanceof ConstantExpression) {
1014            rightIsConst = true;
1015            rightConst = ((ConstantExpression) (pred.getRhs())).getValue();
1016        } else {
1017            Operator rhs = pred.getRhs();
1018            if (rhs instanceof CastExpression)
1019                rhs = ((CastExpression) rhs).getExpression();
1020            // if (!(pred.getRhsOperand() instanceof ProjectExpression && ((ProjectExpression)
1021            // pred
1022            // .getRhsOperand()).getProjection().size() == 1))
1023            // return; // too hard
1024            if (!(rhs instanceof ProjectExpression))
1025                return;
1026            rightCol = ((ProjectExpression) rhs).getColNum();
1027            rightDataType = ((ProjectExpression) rhs).getType();
1028 
1029            Object d = t.get(rightCol);
1030            if (d != null) {
1031                rightIsConst = true;
1032                rightConst = d;
1033            }
1034        }
1035 
1036        if (leftIsConst && rightIsConst)
1037            return; // can't really change the result if both are constants
1038 
1039        // now we try to change some nulls to constants
1040 
1041        // convert some nulls to constants
1042        if (!invert) {
1043            if (pred instanceof EqualExpression) {
1044                if (leftIsConst) {
1045                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, leftConst
1046                            .toString()));
1047                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1048                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, rightConst
1049                            .toString()));
1050                } else {
1051                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));
1052                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "0"));
1053                }
1054            } else if (pred instanceof NotEqualExpression) {
1055                if (leftIsConst) {
1056                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType,
1057                            GetUnequalValue(leftConst).toString()));
1058                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1059                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetUnequalValue(
1060                            rightConst).toString()));
1061                } else {
1062                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));
1063                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "1"));
1064                }
1065            } else if (pred instanceof GreaterThanExpression
1066                    || pred instanceof GreaterThanEqualExpression) {
1067                if (leftIsConst) {
1068                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType,
1069                            GetSmallerValue(leftConst).toString()));
1070                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1071                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetLargerValue(
1072                            rightConst).toString()));
1073                } else {
1074                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "1"));
1075                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "0"));
1076                }
1077            } else if (pred instanceof LessThanExpression
1078                    || pred instanceof LessThanEqualExpression) {
1079                if (leftIsConst) {
1080                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, GetLargerValue(
1081                            leftConst).toString()));
1082                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1083                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetSmallerValue(
1084                            rightConst).toString()));
1085                } else {
1086                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));
1087                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "1"));
1088                }
1089            }
1090        } else {
1091            if (pred instanceof EqualExpression) {
1092                if (leftIsConst) {
1093                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType,
1094                            GetUnequalValue(leftConst).toString()));
1095                } else if (rightIsConst) {
1096                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetUnequalValue(
1097                            rightConst).toString()));
1098                } else {

1101                }
1102            } else if (pred instanceof NotEqualExpression) {
1103                if (leftIsConst) {
1104                    t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, leftConst
1105                            .toString()));
1106                } else if (rightIsConst) {

1109                } else {
1110                    t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));

1113            } else if (pred instanceof GreaterThanExpression

private void extracted(Tuple t, boolean leftIsConst, boolean rightIsConst, Object leftConst, Object rightConst,
            byte leftDataType, byte rightDataType, int leftCol, int rightCol) {
        if (leftIsConst) {
            t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType,
                    GetSmallerValue(leftConst).toString()));
        } else if (rightIsConst) {
            t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetLargerValue(
                    rightConst).toString()));
        } else {
            t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "1"));
            t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "0"));
        }
    }

private void extracted(Tuple t, boolean leftIsConst, boolean rightIsConst, Object leftConst, Object rightConst,
            byte leftDataType, byte rightDataType, int leftCol, int rightCol) {
        if (leftIsConst) {
            t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, GetLargerValue(
                    leftConst).toString()));
        } else if (rightIsConst) {
            t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, GetSmallerValue(
                    rightConst).toString()));
        } else {
            t.set(leftCol, generateData(leftDataType, "0"));
            t.set(rightCol, generateData(rightDataType, "1"));
        }
    }

1449@Override
1450		public void onSensorChanged (SensorEvent event) {
1451			if (event.sensor.getType() == Sensor.TYPE_ACCELEROMETER) {
1452				if (nativeOrientation == Orientation.Portrait) {
1453					System.arraycopy(event.values, 0, accelerometerValues, 0, accelerometerValues.length);
1454				} else {
1455					accelerometerValues[0] = event.values[1];
1456					accelerometerValues[1] = -event.values[0];
1457					accelerometerValues[2] = event.values[2];
1458				}
1459			}
1460			if (event.sensor.getType() == Sensor.TYPE_MAGNETIC_FIELD) {
1461				System.arraycopy(event.values, 0, magneticFieldValues, 0, magneticFieldValues.length);
1462			}
1463			if (event.sensor.getType() == Sensor.TYPE_GYROSCOPE) {
1464				if (nativeOrientation == Orientation.Portrait) {
1465					System.arraycopy(event.values, 0, gyroscopeValues, 0, gyroscopeValues.length);
1466				} else {
1467					gyroscopeValues[0] = event.values[1];
1468					gyroscopeValues[1] = -event.values[0];
1469					gyroscopeValues[2] = event.values[2];
1470				}
1471			}
1472			if (event.sensor.getType() == Sensor.TYPE_ROTATION_VECTOR) {
1473				if (nativeOrientation == Orientation.Portrait) {
1474					System.arraycopy(event.values, 0, rotationVectorValues, 0, rotationVectorValues.length);
1475				} else {
1476					rotationVectorValues[0] = event.values[1];
1477					rotationVectorValues[1] = -event.values[0];
1478					rotationVectorValues[2] = event.values[2];
1479				}
1480			}
1481		}

309@Override
310        public void doJoin(
311                @Nullable Iterable<RowData> leftRecords, @Nullable Iterable<RowData> rightRecords) {
312            if (leftRecords == null) {
313                return;
314            }
315            if (rightRecords == null) {
316                outputNullPadding(leftRecords, true);
317            } else {
318                for (RowData leftRecord : leftRecords) {
319                    boolean matches = false;
320                    for (RowData rightRecord : rightRecords) {
321                        if (joinCondition.apply(leftRecord, rightRecord)) {
322                            output(leftRecord, rightRecord, true);
323                            matches = true;
324                        }
325                    }
326                    if (!matches) {
327                        // padding null for left side
328                        outputNullPadding(leftRecord, true);
329                    }
330                }
331            }
332        }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(Iterable<RowData> leftRecords, Iterable<RowData> rightRecords) {
            for (RowData leftRecord : leftRecords) {
                boolean matches = false;
                for (RowData rightRecord : rightRecords) {
                    if (joinCondition.apply(leftRecord, rightRecord)) {
                        output(leftRecord, rightRecord, true);
                        matches = true;
                    }
                }
                if (!matches) {
                    // padding null for left side
                    outputNullPadding(leftRecord, true);
                }
            }
        }

337@Override
338        public void doJoin(
339                @Nullable Iterable<RowData> leftRecords, @Nullable Iterable<RowData> rightRecords) {
340            if (rightRecords == null) {
341                return;
342            }
343            if (leftRecords == null) {
344                outputNullPadding(rightRecords, false);
345            } else {
346                for (RowData rightRecord : rightRecords) {
347                    boolean matches = false;
348                    for (RowData leftRecord : leftRecords) {
349                        if (joinCondition.apply(leftRecord, rightRecord)) {
350                            output(leftRecord, rightRecord, true);
351                            matches = true;
352                        }
353                    }
354                    if (!matches) {
355                        outputNullPadding(rightRecord, false);
356                    }
357                }
358            }
359        }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(Iterable<RowData> leftRecords, Iterable<RowData> rightRecords) {
            for (RowData rightRecord : rightRecords) {
                boolean matches = false;
                for (RowData leftRecord : leftRecords) {
                    if (joinCondition.apply(leftRecord, rightRecord)) {
                        output(leftRecord, rightRecord, true);
                        matches = true;
                    }
                }
                if (!matches) {
                    outputNullPadding(rightRecord, false);
                }
            }
        }

100@Override
101    public LoginContext login() throws LoginException {
102 
103        this.lastLogin = currentElapsedTime();
104        loginContext = super.login();
105        subject = loginContext.getSubject();
106        isKrbTicket = !subject.getPrivateCredentials(KerberosTicket.class).isEmpty();
107 
108        AppConfigurationEntry[] entries = configuration().getAppConfigurationEntry(contextName());
109        if (entries.length == 0) {
110            isUsingTicketCache = false;
111            principal = null;
112        } else {
113            // there will only be a single entry
114            AppConfigurationEntry entry = entries[0];
115            if (entry.getOptions().get("useTicketCache") != null) {
116                String val = (String) entry.getOptions().get("useTicketCache");
117                isUsingTicketCache = val.equals("true");
118            } else
119                isUsingTicketCache = false;
120            if (entry.getOptions().get("principal") != null)
121                principal = (String) entry.getOptions().get("principal");
122            else
123                principal = null;
124        }
125 
126        if (!isKrbTicket) {
127            log.debug("[Principal={}]: It is not a Kerberos ticket", principal);
128            t = null;
129            // if no TGT, do not bother with ticket management.
130            return loginContext;
131        }
132        log.debug("[Principal={}]: It is a Kerberos ticket", principal);
133 
134        // Refresh the Ticket Granting Ticket (TGT) periodically. How often to refresh is determined by the
135        // TGT's existing expiry date and the configured minTimeBeforeRelogin. For testing and development,
136        // you can decrease the interval of expiration of tickets (for example, to 3 minutes) by running:
137        //  "modprinc -maxlife 3mins <principal>" in kadmin.
138        t = KafkaThread.daemon(String.format("kafka-kerberos-refresh-thread-%s", principal), () -> {
139            log.info("[Principal={}]: TGT refresh thread started.", principal);
140            while (true) {  // renewal thread's main loop. if it exits from here, thread will exit.
141                KerberosTicket tgt = getTGT();
142                long now = currentWallTime();
143                long nextRefresh;
144                Date nextRefreshDate;
145                if (tgt == null) {
146                    nextRefresh = now + minTimeBeforeRelogin;
147                    nextRefreshDate = new Date(nextRefresh);
148                    log.warn("[Principal={}]: No TGT found: will try again at {}", principal, nextRefreshDate);
149                } else {
150                    nextRefresh = getRefreshTime(tgt);
151                    long expiry = tgt.getEndTime().getTime();
152                    Date expiryDate = new Date(expiry);
153                    if (isUsingTicketCache && tgt.getRenewTill() != null && tgt.getRenewTill().getTime() < expiry) {
154                        log.warn("The TGT cannot be renewed beyond the next expiry date: {}." +
155                            "This process will not be able to authenticate new SASL connections after that " +
156                            "time (for example, it will not be able to authenticate a new connection with a Kafka " +
157                            "Broker).  Ask your system administrator to either increase the " +
158                            "'renew until' time by doing : 'modprinc -maxrenewlife {} ' within " +
159                            "kadmin, or instead, to generate a keytab for {}. Because the TGT's " +
160                            "expiry cannot be further extended by refreshing, exiting refresh thread now.",
161                            expiryDate, principal, principal);
162                        return;
163                    }
164                    // determine how long to sleep from looking at ticket's expiry.
165                    // We should not allow the ticket to expire, but we should take into consideration
166                    // minTimeBeforeRelogin. Will not sleep less than minTimeBeforeRelogin, unless doing so
167                    // would cause ticket expiration.
168                    if ((nextRefresh > expiry) || (minTimeBeforeRelogin > expiry - now)) {
169                        // expiry is before next scheduled refresh.
170                        log.info("[Principal={}]: Refreshing now because expiry is before next scheduled refresh time.", principal);
171                        nextRefresh = now;
172                    } else {
173                        if (nextRefresh - now < minTimeBeforeRelogin) {
174                            // next scheduled refresh is sooner than (now + MIN_TIME_BEFORE_LOGIN).
175                            Date until = new Date(nextRefresh);
176                            Date newUntil = new Date(now + minTimeBeforeRelogin);
177                            log.warn("[Principal={}]: TGT refresh thread time adjusted from {} to {} since the former is sooner " +
178                                "than the minimum refresh interval ({} seconds) from now.",
179                                principal, until, newUntil, minTimeBeforeRelogin / 1000);
180                        }
181                        nextRefresh = Math.max(nextRefresh, now + minTimeBeforeRelogin);
182                    }
183                    nextRefreshDate = new Date(nextRefresh);
184                    if (nextRefresh > expiry) {
185                        log.error("[Principal={}]: Next refresh: {} is later than expiry {}. This may indicate a clock skew problem." +
186                            "Check that this host and the KDC hosts' clocks are in sync. Exiting refresh thread.",
187                            principal, nextRefreshDate, expiryDate);
188                        return;
189                    }
190                }
191                if (now < nextRefresh) {
192                    Date until = new Date(nextRefresh);
193                    log.info("[Principal={}]: TGT refresh sleeping until: {}", principal, until);
194                    try {
195                        Thread.sleep(nextRefresh - now);
196                    } catch (InterruptedException ie) {
197                        log.warn("[Principal={}]: TGT renewal thread has been interrupted and will exit.", principal);
198                        return;
199                    }
200                } else {
201                    log.error("[Principal={}]: NextRefresh: {} is in the past: exiting refresh thread. Check"
202                        + " clock sync between this host and KDC - (KDC's clock is likely ahead of this host)."
203                        + " Manual intervention will be required for this client to successfully authenticate."
204                        + " Exiting refresh thread.", principal, nextRefreshDate);
205                    return;
206                }
207                if (isUsingTicketCache) {
208                    String kinitArgs = "-R";
209                    int retry = 1;
210                    while (retry >= 0) {
211                        try {
212                            log.debug("[Principal={}]: Running ticket cache refresh command: {} {}", principal, kinitCmd, kinitArgs);
213                            Shell.execCommand(kinitCmd, kinitArgs);
214                            break;
215                        } catch (Exception e) {
216                            if (retry > 0) {
217                                log.warn("[Principal={}]: Error when trying to renew with TicketCache, but will retry ", principal, e);
218                                --retry;
219                                // sleep for 10 seconds
220                                try {
221                                    Thread.sleep(10 * 1000);
222                                } catch (InterruptedException ie) {
223                                    log.error("[Principal={}]: Interrupted while renewing TGT, exiting Login thread", principal);
224                                    return;
225                                }
226                            } else {
227                                log.warn("[Principal={}]: Could not renew TGT due to problem running shell command: '{} {}'. " +
228                                    "Exiting refresh thread.", principal, kinitCmd, kinitArgs, e);
229                                return;
230                            }
231                        }
232                    }
233                }
234                try {
235                    int retry = 1;
236                    while (retry >= 0) {
237                        try {
238                            reLogin();
239                            break;
240                        } catch (LoginException le) {
241                            if (retry > 0) {
242                                log.warn("[Principal={}]: Error when trying to re-Login, but will retry ", principal, le);
243                                --retry;
244                                // sleep for 10 seconds.
245                                try {
246                                    Thread.sleep(10 * 1000);
247                                } catch (InterruptedException e) {
248                                    log.error("[Principal={}]: Interrupted during login retry after LoginException:", principal, le);
249                                    throw le;
250                                }
251                            } else {
252                                log.error("[Principal={}]: Could not refresh TGT.", principal, le);
253                            }
254                        }
255                    }
256                } catch (LoginException le) {
257                    log.error("[Principal={}]: Failed to refresh TGT: refresh thread exiting now.", principal, le);
258                    return;
259                }
260            }
261        });
262        t.start();
263        return loginContext;
264    }

100@Override
101    public LoginContext login() throws LoginException {
102 
103        this.lastLogin = currentElapsedTime();
104        loginContext = super.login();
105        subject = loginContext.getSubject();
106        isKrbTicket = !subject.getPrivateCredentials(KerberosTicket.class).isEmpty();
107 
108        AppConfigurationEntry[] entries = configuration().getAppConfigurationEntry(contextName());
109        if (entries.length == 0) {
110            isUsingTicketCache = false;
111            principal = null;
112        } else {
113            // there will only be a single entry
114            AppConfigurationEntry entry = entries[0];
115            if (entry.getOptions().get("useTicketCache") != null) {
116                String val = (String) entry.getOptions().get("useTicketCache");
117                isUsingTicketCache = val.equals("true");
118            } else
119                isUsingTicketCache = false;
120            if (entry.getOptions().get("principal") != null)
121                principal = (String) entry.getOptions().get("principal");
122            else
123                principal = null;
124        }
125 
126        if (!isKrbTicket) {
127            log.debug("[Principal={}]: It is not a Kerberos ticket", principal);
128            t = null;
129            // if no TGT, do not bother with ticket management.
130            return loginContext;
131        }
132        log.debug("[Principal={}]: It is a Kerberos ticket", principal);
133 
134        // Refresh the Ticket Granting Ticket (TGT) periodically. How often to refresh is determined by the
135        // TGT's existing expiry date and the configured minTimeBeforeRelogin. For testing and development,
136        // you can decrease the interval of expiration of tickets (for example, to 3 minutes) by running:
137        //  "modprinc -maxlife 3mins <principal>" in kadmin.
138        t = KafkaThread.daemon(String.format("kafka-kerberos-refresh-thread-%s", principal), () -> {
139            log.info("[Principal={}]: TGT refresh thread started.", principal);
140            while (true) {  // renewal thread's main loop. if it exits from here, thread will exit.
141                KerberosTicket tgt = getTGT();
142                long now = currentWallTime();
143                long nextRefresh;
144                Date nextRefreshDate;
145                if (tgt == null) {
146                    nextRefresh = now + minTimeBeforeRelogin;
147                    nextRefreshDate = new Date(nextRefresh);
148                    log.warn("[Principal={}]: No TGT found: will try again at {}", principal, nextRefreshDate);
149                } else {
150                    nextRefresh = getRefreshTime(tgt);
151                    long expiry = tgt.getEndTime().getTime();
152                    Date expiryDate = new Date(expiry);

154                        log.warn("The TGT cannot be renewed beyond the next expiry date: {}." +
155                            "This process will not be able to authenticate new SASL connections after that " +
156                            "time (for example, it will not be able to authenticate a new connection with a Kafka " +
157                            "Broker).  Ask your system administrator to either increase the " +
158                            "'renew until' time by doing : 'modprinc -maxrenewlife {} ' within " +
159                            "kadmin, or instead, to generate a keytab for {}. Because the TGT's " +
160                            "expiry cannot be further extended by refreshing, exiting refresh thread now.",
161                            expiryDate, principal, principal);
162                        return;
163                    }
164                    // determine how long to sleep from looking at ticket's expiry.
165                    // We should not allow the ticket to expire, but we should take into consideration
166                    // minTimeBeforeRelogin. Will not sleep less than minTimeBeforeRelogin, unless doing so
167                    // would cause ticket expiration.
168                    if ((nextRefresh > expiry) || (minTimeBeforeRelogin > expiry - now)) {
169                        // expiry is before next scheduled refresh.
170                        log.info("[Principal={}]: Refreshing now because expiry is before next scheduled refresh time.", principal);
171                        nextRefresh = now;
172                    } else {
173                        if (nextRefresh - now < minTimeBeforeRelogin) {

175                            Date until = new Date(nextRefresh);

177                            log.warn("[Principal={}]: TGT refresh thread time adjusted from {} to {} since the former is sooner " +
178                                "than the minimum refresh interval ({} seconds) from now.",
179                                principal, until, newUntil, minTimeBeforeRelogin / 1000);
180                        }
181                        nextRefresh = Math.max(nextRefresh, now + minTimeBeforeRelogin);
182                    }

187                            principal, nextRefreshDate, expiryDate);

Original Clone: 
169private Term getLowerTerm() throws IOException {
170        try {
171            String text;
172            if (lowerName == null) {
173                text = nsMappings.getPrefix(upperName.getNamespaceURI()) + ":";
174            } else {
175                text = nsMappings.translateName(lowerName);
176            }
177            return new Term(FieldNames.LABEL, text);
178        } catch (RepositoryException e) {
179            throw Util.createIOException(e);
180        }
181    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private Term getText() throws NamespaceException, IllegalNameException {
        String text;
        if (lowerName == null) {
            text = nsMappings.getPrefix(upperName.getNamespaceURI()) + ":";
        } else {
            text = nsMappings.translateName(lowerName);
        }
        return new Term(FieldNames.LABEL, text);
    }

187private Term getUpperTerm() throws IOException {
188        try {
189            String text;
190            if (upperName == null) {
191                text = nsMappings.getPrefix(lowerName.getNamespaceURI()) + ":\uFFFF";
192            } else {
193                text = nsMappings.translateName(upperName);
194            }
195            return new Term(FieldNames.LABEL, text);
196        } catch (RepositoryException e) {
197            throw Util.createIOException(e);
198        }
199    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private Term getText() throws NamespaceException, IllegalNameException {
        String text;
        if (upperName == null) {
            text = nsMappings.getPrefix(lowerName.getNamespaceURI()) + ":\uFFFF";
        } else {
            text = nsMappings.translateName(upperName);
        }
        return new Term(FieldNames.LABEL, text);
    }

100@Override
101    public LoginContext login() throws LoginException {
102 
103        this.lastLogin = currentElapsedTime();
104        loginContext = super.login();
105        subject = loginContext.getSubject();
106        isKrbTicket = !subject.getPrivateCredentials(KerberosTicket.class).isEmpty();
107 
108        AppConfigurationEntry[] entries = configuration().getAppConfigurationEntry(contextName());
109        if (entries.length == 0) {
110            isUsingTicketCache = false;
111            principal = null;
112        } else {
113            // there will only be a single entry
114            AppConfigurationEntry entry = entries[0];
115            if (entry.getOptions().get("useTicketCache") != null) {
116                String val = (String) entry.getOptions().get("useTicketCache");
117                isUsingTicketCache = val.equals("true");
118            } else
119                isUsingTicketCache = false;
120            if (entry.getOptions().get("principal") != null)
121                principal = (String) entry.getOptions().get("principal");
122            else
123                principal = null;
124        }
125 
126        if (!isKrbTicket) {
127            log.debug("[Principal={}]: It is not a Kerberos ticket", principal);
128            t = null;
129            // if no TGT, do not bother with ticket management.
130            return loginContext;
131        }
132        log.debug("[Principal={}]: It is a Kerberos ticket", principal);
133 
134        // Refresh the Ticket Granting Ticket (TGT) periodically. How often to refresh is determined by the
135        // TGT's existing expiry date and the configured minTimeBeforeRelogin. For testing and development,
136        // you can decrease the interval of expiration of tickets (for example, to 3 minutes) by running:
137        //  "modprinc -maxlife 3mins <principal>" in kadmin.
138        t = KafkaThread.daemon(String.format("kafka-kerberos-refresh-thread-%s", principal), () -> {
139            log.info("[Principal={}]: TGT refresh thread started.", principal);
140            while (true) {  // renewal thread's main loop. if it exits from here, thread will exit.
141                KerberosTicket tgt = getTGT();
142                long now = currentWallTime();
143                long nextRefresh;
144                Date nextRefreshDate;
145                if (tgt == null) {
146                    nextRefresh = now + minTimeBeforeRelogin;
147                    nextRefreshDate = new Date(nextRefresh);
148                    log.warn("[Principal={}]: No TGT found: will try again at {}", principal, nextRefreshDate);
149                } else {
150                    nextRefresh = getRefreshTime(tgt);
151                    long expiry = tgt.getEndTime().getTime();
152                    Date expiryDate = new Date(expiry);
153                    if (isUsingTicketCache && tgt.getRenewTill() != null && tgt.getRenewTill().getTime() < expiry) {
154                        log.warn("The TGT cannot be renewed beyond the next expiry date: {}." +
155                            "This process will not be able to authenticate new SASL connections after that " +
156                            "time (for example, it will not be able to authenticate a new connection with a Kafka " +
157                            "Broker).  Ask your system administrator to either increase the " +
158                            "'renew until' time by doing : 'modprinc -maxrenewlife {} ' within " +
159                            "kadmin, or instead, to generate a keytab for {}. Because the TGT's " +
160                            "expiry cannot be further extended by refreshing, exiting refresh thread now.",
161                            expiryDate, principal, principal);
162                        return;
163                    }
164                    // determine how long to sleep from looking at ticket's expiry.
165                    // We should not allow the ticket to expire, but we should take into consideration
166                    // minTimeBeforeRelogin. Will not sleep less than minTimeBeforeRelogin, unless doing so
167                    // would cause ticket expiration.
168                    if ((nextRefresh > expiry) || (minTimeBeforeRelogin > expiry - now)) {
169                        // expiry is before next scheduled refresh.
170                        log.info("[Principal={}]: Refreshing now because expiry is before next scheduled refresh time.", principal);
171                        nextRefresh = now;
172                    } else {
173                        if (nextRefresh - now < minTimeBeforeRelogin) {
174                            // next scheduled refresh is sooner than (now + MIN_TIME_BEFORE_LOGIN).
175                            Date until = new Date(nextRefresh);
176                            Date newUntil = new Date(now + minTimeBeforeRelogin);
177                            log.warn("[Principal={}]: TGT refresh thread time adjusted from {} to {} since the former is sooner " +
178                                "than the minimum refresh interval ({} seconds) from now.",
179                                principal, until, newUntil, minTimeBeforeRelogin / 1000);
180                        }
181                        nextRefresh = Math.max(nextRefresh, now + minTimeBeforeRelogin);
182                    }
183                    nextRefreshDate = new Date(nextRefresh);
184                    if (nextRefresh > expiry) {
185                        log.error("[Principal={}]: Next refresh: {} is later than expiry {}. This may indicate a clock skew problem." +
186                            "Check that this host and the KDC hosts' clocks are in sync. Exiting refresh thread.",
187                            principal, nextRefreshDate, expiryDate);
188                        return;
189                    }
190                }
191                if (now < nextRefresh) {
192                    Date until = new Date(nextRefresh);
193                    log.info("[Principal={}]: TGT refresh sleeping until: {}", principal, until);
194                    try {
195                        Thread.sleep(nextRefresh - now);
196                    } catch (InterruptedException ie) {
197                        log.warn("[Principal={}]: TGT renewal thread has been interrupted and will exit.", principal);
198                        return;
199                    }
200                } else {
201                    log.error("[Principal={}]: NextRefresh: {} is in the past: exiting refresh thread. Check"
202                        + " clock sync between this host and KDC - (KDC's clock is likely ahead of this host)."
203                        + " Manual intervention will be required for this client to successfully authenticate."
204                        + " Exiting refresh thread.", principal, nextRefreshDate);
205                    return;
206                }
207                if (isUsingTicketCache) {
208                    String kinitArgs = "-R";
209                    int retry = 1;
210                    while (retry >= 0) {
211                        try {
212                            log.debug("[Principal={}]: Running ticket cache refresh command: {} {}", principal, kinitCmd, kinitArgs);
213                            Shell.execCommand(kinitCmd, kinitArgs);
214                            break;
215                        } catch (Exception e) {
216                            if (retry > 0) {
217                                log.warn("[Principal={}]: Error when trying to renew with TicketCache, but will retry ", principal, e);
218                                --retry;
219                                // sleep for 10 seconds
220                                try {
221                                    Thread.sleep(10 * 1000);
222                                } catch (InterruptedException ie) {
223                                    log.error("[Principal={}]: Interrupted while renewing TGT, exiting Login thread", principal);
224                                    return;
225                                }
226                            } else {
227                                log.warn("[Principal={}]: Could not renew TGT due to problem running shell command: '{} {}'. " +
228                                    "Exiting refresh thread.", principal, kinitCmd, kinitArgs, e);
229                                return;
230                            }
231                        }
232                    }
233                }
234                try {
235                    int retry = 1;
236                    while (retry >= 0) {
237                        try {
238                            reLogin();
239                            break;
240                        } catch (LoginException le) {
241                            if (retry > 0) {
242                                log.warn("[Principal={}]: Error when trying to re-Login, but will retry ", principal, le);
243                                --retry;
244                                // sleep for 10 seconds.
245                                try {
246                                    Thread.sleep(10 * 1000);
247                                } catch (InterruptedException e) {
248                                    log.error("[Principal={}]: Interrupted during login retry after LoginException:", principal, le);
249                                    throw le;
250                                }
251                            } else {
252                                log.error("[Principal={}]: Could not refresh TGT.", principal, le);
253                            }
254                        }
255                    }
256                } catch (LoginException le) {
257                    log.error("[Principal={}]: Failed to refresh TGT: refresh thread exiting now.", principal, le);
258                    return;
259                }
260            }
261        });
262        t.start();
263        return loginContext;
264    }

100@Override
101    public LoginContext login() throws LoginException {
102 
103        this.lastLogin = currentElapsedTime();
104        loginContext = super.login();
105        subject = loginContext.getSubject();
106        isKrbTicket = !subject.getPrivateCredentials(KerberosTicket.class).isEmpty();
107 
108        AppConfigurationEntry[] entries = configuration().getAppConfigurationEntry(contextName());
109        if (entries.length == 0) {
110            isUsingTicketCache = false;
111            principal = null;
112        } else {
113            // there will only be a single entry
114            AppConfigurationEntry entry = entries[0];
115            if (entry.getOptions().get("useTicketCache") != null) {
116                String val = (String) entry.getOptions().get("useTicketCache");
117                isUsingTicketCache = val.equals("true");
118            } else
119                isUsingTicketCache = false;
120            if (entry.getOptions().get("principal") != null)
121                principal = (String) entry.getOptions().get("principal");
122            else
123                principal = null;
124        }
125 
126        if (!isKrbTicket) {
127            log.debug("[Principal={}]: It is not a Kerberos ticket", principal);
128            t = null;
129            // if no TGT, do not bother with ticket management.
130            return loginContext;
131        }
132        log.debug("[Principal={}]: It is a Kerberos ticket", principal);
133 
134        // Refresh the Ticket Granting Ticket (TGT) periodically. How often to refresh is determined by the
135        // TGT's existing expiry date and the configured minTimeBeforeRelogin. For testing and development,
136        // you can decrease the interval of expiration of tickets (for example, to 3 minutes) by running:
137        //  "modprinc -maxlife 3mins <principal>" in kadmin.
138        t = KafkaThread.daemon(String.format("kafka-kerberos-refresh-thread-%s", principal), () -> {
139            log.info("[Principal={}]: TGT refresh thread started.", principal);
140            while (true) {  // renewal thread's main loop. if it exits from here, thread will exit.
141                KerberosTicket tgt = getTGT();
142                long now = currentWallTime();
143                long nextRefresh;
144                Date nextRefreshDate;
145                if (tgt == null) {
146                    nextRefresh = now + minTimeBeforeRelogin;
147                    nextRefreshDate = new Date(nextRefresh);
148                    log.warn("[Principal={}]: No TGT found: will try again at {}", principal, nextRefreshDate);
149                } else {
150                    nextRefresh = getRefreshTime(tgt);
151                    long expiry = tgt.getEndTime().getTime();
152                    Date expiryDate = new Date(expiry);
153                    if (isUsingTicketCache && tgt.getRenewTill() != null && tgt.getRenewTill().getTime() < expiry) {
154                        log.warn("The TGT cannot be renewed beyond the next expiry date: {}." +
155                            "This process will not be able to authenticate new SASL connections after that " +
156                            "time (for example, it will not be able to authenticate a new connection with a Kafka " +
157                            "Broker).  Ask your system administrator to either increase the " +
158                            "'renew until' time by doing : 'modprinc -maxrenewlife {} ' within " +
159                            "kadmin, or instead, to generate a keytab for {}. Because the TGT's " +
160                            "expiry cannot be further extended by refreshing, exiting refresh thread now.",
161                            expiryDate, principal, principal);
162                        return;
163                    }
164                    // determine how long to sleep from looking at ticket's expiry.
165                    // We should not allow the ticket to expire, but we should take into consideration
166                    // minTimeBeforeRelogin. Will not sleep less than minTimeBeforeRelogin, unless doing so
167                    // would cause ticket expiration.
168                    if ((nextRefresh > expiry) || (minTimeBeforeRelogin > expiry - now)) {
169                        // expiry is before next scheduled refresh.
170                        log.info("[Principal={}]: Refreshing now because expiry is before next scheduled refresh time.", principal);
171                        nextRefresh = now;
172                    } else {
173                        if (nextRefresh - now < minTimeBeforeRelogin) {
174                            // next scheduled refresh is sooner than (now + MIN_TIME_BEFORE_LOGIN).
175                            Date until = new Date(nextRefresh);
176                            Date newUntil = new Date(now + minTimeBeforeRelogin);
177                            log.warn("[Principal={}]: TGT refresh thread time adjusted from {} to {} since the former is sooner " +
178                                "than the minimum refresh interval ({} seconds) from now.",
179                                principal, until, newUntil, minTimeBeforeRelogin / 1000);
180                        }
181                        nextRefresh = Math.max(nextRefresh, now + minTimeBeforeRelogin);
182                    }
183                    nextRefreshDate = new Date(nextRefresh);
184                    if (nextRefresh > expiry) {
185                        log.error("[Principal={}]: Next refresh: {} is later than expiry {}. This may indicate a clock skew problem." +
186                            "Check that this host and the KDC hosts' clocks are in sync. Exiting refresh thread.",
187                            principal, nextRefreshDate, expiryDate);
188                        return;
189                    }
190                }
191                if (now < nextRefresh) {
192                    Date until = new Date(nextRefresh);
193                    log.info("[Principal={}]: TGT refresh sleeping until: {}", principal, until);
194                    try {
195                        Thread.sleep(nextRefresh - now);
196                    } catch (InterruptedException ie) {
197                        log.warn("[Principal={}]: TGT renewal thread has been interrupted and will exit.", principal);
198                        return;
199                    }
200                } else {
201                    log.error("[Principal={}]: NextRefresh: {} is in the past: exiting refresh thread. Check"
202                        + " clock sync between this host and KDC - (KDC's clock is likely ahead of this host)."
203                        + " Manual intervention will be required for this client to successfully authenticate."
204                        + " Exiting refresh thread.", principal, nextRefreshDate);
205                    return;
206                }
207                if (isUsingTicketCache) {
208                    String kinitArgs = "-R";
209                    int retry = 1;
210                    while (retry >= 0) {
211                        try {
212                            log.debug("[Principal={}]: Running ticket cache refresh command: {} {}", principal, kinitCmd, kinitArgs);
213                            Shell.execCommand(kinitCmd, kinitArgs);
214                            break;
215                        } catch (Exception e) {
216                            if (retry > 0) {
217                                log.warn("[Principal={}]: Error when trying to renew with TicketCache, but will retry ", principal, e);
218                                --retry;
219                                // sleep for 10 seconds
220                                try {
221                                    Thread.sleep(10 * 1000);
222                                } catch (InterruptedException ie) {
223                                    log.error("[Principal={}]: Interrupted while renewing TGT, exiting Login thread", principal);
224                                    return;
225                                }
226                            } else {
227                                log.warn("[Principal={}]: Could not renew TGT due to problem running shell command: '{} {}'. " +
228                                    "Exiting refresh thread.", principal, kinitCmd, kinitArgs, e);
229                                return;
230                            }
231                        }
232                    }
233                }
234                try {
235                    int retry = 1;
236                    while (retry >= 0) {
237                        try {
238                            reLogin();
239                            break;
240                        } catch (LoginException le) {
241                            if (retry > 0) {
242                                log.warn("[Principal={}]: Error when trying to re-Login, but will retry ", principal, le);
243                                --retry;
244                                // sleep for 10 seconds.
245                                try {
246                                    Thread.sleep(10 * 1000);
247                                } catch (InterruptedException e) {
248                                    log.error("[Principal={}]: Interrupted during login retry after LoginException:", principal, le);
249                                    throw le;
250                                }
251                            } else {
252                                log.error("[Principal={}]: Could not refresh TGT.", principal, le);
253                            }
254                        }
255                    }
256                } catch (LoginException le) {
257                    log.error("[Principal={}]: Failed to refresh TGT: refresh thread exiting now.", principal, le);
258                    return;
259                }
260            }
261        });
262        t.start();
263        return loginContext;
264    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private int extracted(int retry, LoginException le) throws LoginException {
        log.warn("[Principal={}]: Error when trying to re-Login, but will retry ", principal, le);
        --retry;
        // sleep for 10 seconds.
        try {
            Thread.sleep(10 * 1000);
        } catch (InterruptedException e) {
            log.error("[Principal={}]: Interrupted during login retry after LoginException:", principal, le);
            throw le;
        }
        return retry;
    }

431public void addPartitionColsToBatch(ColumnVector col, Object value, int colIndex)
432  {
433    String partitionColumnName = rowColumnNames[colIndex];
434    PrimitiveTypeInfo primitiveTypeInfo = (PrimitiveTypeInfo) rowColumnTypeInfos[colIndex];
435    switch (primitiveTypeInfo.getPrimitiveCategory()) {
436    case BOOLEAN: {
437      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
438      if (value == null) {
439        lcv.noNulls = false;
440        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
441        lcv.isRepeating = true;
442      } else {
443        lcv.fill((Boolean) value == true ? 1 : 0);
444      }
445    }
446    break;
447 
448    case BYTE: {
449      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
450      if (value == null) {
451        lcv.noNulls = false;
452        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
453        lcv.isRepeating = true;
454      } else {
455        lcv.fill((Byte) value);
456      }
457    }
458    break;
459 
460    case SHORT: {
461      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
462      if (value == null) {
463        lcv.noNulls = false;
464        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
465        lcv.isRepeating = true;
466      } else {
467        lcv.fill((Short) value);
468      }
469    }
470    break;
471 
472    case INT: {
473      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
474      if (value == null) {
475        lcv.noNulls = false;
476        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
477        lcv.isRepeating = true;
478      } else {
479        lcv.fill((Integer) value);
480      }
481    }
482    break;
483 
484    case LONG: {
485      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
486      if (value == null) {
487        lcv.noNulls = false;
488        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
489        lcv.isRepeating = true;
490      } else {
491        lcv.fill((Long) value);
492      }
493    }
494    break;
495 
496    case DATE: {
497      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
498      if (value == null) {
499        lcv.noNulls = false;
500        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
501        lcv.isRepeating = true;
502      } else {
503        lcv.fill(DateWritableV2.dateToDays((Date) value));
504      }
505    }
506    break;
507 
508    case TIMESTAMP: {
509      TimestampColumnVector lcv = (TimestampColumnVector) col;
510      if (value == null) {
511        lcv.noNulls = false;
512        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
513        lcv.isRepeating = true;
514      } else {
515        lcv.fill(((Timestamp) value).toSqlTimestamp());
516      }
517    }
518    break;
519 
520    case INTERVAL_YEAR_MONTH: {
521      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
522      if (value == null) {
523        lcv.noNulls = false;
524        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
525        lcv.isRepeating = true;
526      } else {
527        lcv.fill(((HiveIntervalYearMonth) value).getTotalMonths());
528      }
529    }
530    break;
531 
532    case INTERVAL_DAY_TIME: {
533      IntervalDayTimeColumnVector icv = (IntervalDayTimeColumnVector) col;
534      if (value == null) {
535        icv.noNulls = false;
536        icv.isNull[0] = true;
537        icv.isRepeating = true;
538      } else {
539        icv.fill(((HiveIntervalDayTime) value));
540      }
541    }
542    break;
543 
544    case FLOAT: {
545      DoubleColumnVector dcv = (DoubleColumnVector) col;
546      if (value == null) {
547        dcv.noNulls = false;
548        dcv.isNull[0] = true;
549        dcv.isRepeating = true;
550      } else {
551        dcv.fill((Float) value);
552      }
553    }
554    break;
555 
556    case DOUBLE: {
557      DoubleColumnVector dcv = (DoubleColumnVector) col;
558      if (value == null) {
559        dcv.noNulls = false;
560        dcv.isNull[0] = true;
561        dcv.isRepeating = true;
562      } else {
563        dcv.fill((Double) value);
564      }
565    }
566    break;
567 
568    case DECIMAL: {
569      DataTypePhysicalVariation dataTypePhysicalVariation = rowDataTypePhysicalVariations != null ?
570        rowDataTypePhysicalVariations[colIndex] : DataTypePhysicalVariation.NONE;
571 
572      if (dataTypePhysicalVariation == DataTypePhysicalVariation.DECIMAL_64) {
573        Decimal64ColumnVector dv = (Decimal64ColumnVector) col;
574        if (value == null) {
575          dv.noNulls = false;
576          dv.isNull[0] = true;
577          dv.isRepeating = true;
578        } else {
579          dv.fill((HiveDecimal) value);
580        }
581      } else {
582        DecimalColumnVector dv = (DecimalColumnVector) col;
583        if (value == null) {
584          dv.noNulls = false;
585          dv.isNull[0] = true;
586          dv.isRepeating = true;
587        } else {
588          dv.fill((HiveDecimal) value);
589        }
590      }
591    }
592    break;
593 
594    case BINARY: {
595        BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) col;
596        byte[] bytes = (byte[]) value;
597        if (bytes == null) {
598          bcv.noNulls = false;
599          bcv.isNull[0] = true;
600          bcv.isRepeating = true;
601        } else {
602          bcv.fill(bytes);
603        }
604      }
605      break;
606 
607    case STRING:
608    case CHAR:
609    case VARCHAR: {
610      BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) col;
611      if (value == null) {
612        bcv.noNulls = false;
613        bcv.isNull[0] = true;
614        bcv.isRepeating = true;
615      } else {
616        String sVal = value.toString();
617        bcv.fill(sVal.getBytes());
618      }
619    }
620    break;
621 
622    default:
623      throw new RuntimeException("Unable to recognize the partition type " + primitiveTypeInfo.getPrimitiveCategory() +
624          " for column " + partitionColumnName);
625    }
626  }

private void extracted(ColumnVector col, Object value) {
    LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
    if (value == null) {
      lcv.noNulls = false;
      lcv.isNull[0] = true;
      lcv.isRepeating = true;
    } else {
      lcv.fill((Long) value);
    }
  }

private void extracted(ColumnVector col, Object value) {
    LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
    if (value == null) {
      lcv.noNulls = false;
      lcv.isNull[0] = true;
      lcv.isRepeating = true;
    } else {
      lcv.fill((Byte) value);

69@Override
70    public Integer doProcessWatchCall() throws Exception {
71        List<Row> rows = new ArrayList<>();
72 
73        List<Long> pids = findPids(name);
74        ProcessHandle.allProcesses()
75                .filter(ph -> pids.contains(ph.pid()))
76                .forEach(ph -> {
77                    JsonObject root = loadStatus(ph.pid());
78                    // there must be a status file for the running Camel integration
79                    if (root != null) {
80                        Row row = new Row();
81                        JsonObject context = (JsonObject) root.get("context");
82                        if (context == null) {
83                            return;
84                        }
85                        row.name = context.getString("name");
86                        if ("CamelJBang".equals(row.name)) {
87                            row.name = ProcessHelper.extractName(root, ph);
88                        }
89                        row.pid = Long.toString(ph.pid());
90                        row.uptime = extractSince(ph);
91                        row.age = TimeUtils.printSince(row.uptime);
92                        Row baseRow = row.copy();
93 
94                        JsonObject mo = (JsonObject) root.get("micrometer");
95                        if (mo != null) {
96                            JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) mo.get("counters");
97                            if (arr != null) {
98                                for (int i = 0; i < arr.size(); i++) {
99                                    row = baseRow.copy();
100                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
101                                    row.type = "counter";
102                                    row.metricName = jo.getString("name");
103                                    row.metricDescription = jo.getString("description");
104                                    row.metricId = extractId(jo);
105                                    row.tags = extractTags(jo);
106                                    row.count = jo.getDouble("count");
107 
108                                    if (custom && row.metricName.startsWith("Camel")) {
109                                        continue; // skip internal camel metrics
110                                    }
111                                    if (!all && getNumber(row.count).isEmpty()) {
112                                        continue;
113                                    }
114                                    if (filter == null || row.type.equals(filter) || row.metricName.contains(filter)) {
115                                        rows.add(row);
116                                    }
117                                }
118                            }
119                            arr = (JsonArray) mo.get("timers");
120                            if (arr != null) {
121                                for (int i = 0; i < arr.size(); i++) {
122                                    row = baseRow.copy();
123                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
124                                    row.type = "timer";
125                                    row.metricName = jo.getString("name");
126                                    row.metricDescription = jo.getString("description");
127                                    row.metricId = extractId(jo);
128                                    row.tags = extractTags(jo);
129                                    row.count = jo.getDouble("count");
130                                    row.mean = jo.getDouble("mean");
131                                    row.max = jo.getDouble("max");
132                                    row.total = jo.getDouble("total");
133 
134                                    if (custom && row.metricName.startsWith("Camel")) {
135                                        continue; // skip internal camel metrics
136                                    }
137                                    if (!all && getNumber(row.count).isEmpty()) {
138                                        continue;
139                                    }
140                                    if (filter == null || row.type.equals(filter) || row.metricName.contains(filter)
141                                            || row.tags.contains(filter)) {
142                                        rows.add(row);
143                                    }
144                                }
145                            }
146                            arr = (JsonArray) mo.get("gauges");
147                            if (arr != null) {
148                                for (int i = 0; i < arr.size(); i++) {
149                                    row = baseRow.copy();
150                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
151                                    row.type = "gauge";
152                                    row.metricName = jo.getString("name");
153                                    if ("app.info".equals(row.metricName)) {
154                                        continue; // special camel info that hides in the metrics
155                                    }
156                                    row.metricDescription = jo.getString("description");
157                                    row.metricId = extractId(jo);
158                                    row.tags = extractTags(jo);
159                                    row.count = jo.getDouble("value");
160 
161                                    if (custom && row.metricName.startsWith("Camel")) {
162                                        continue; // skip internal camel metrics
163                                    }
164                                    if (!all && getNumber(row.count).isEmpty()) {
165                                        continue;
166                                    }
167                                    if (filter == null || row.type.equals(filter) || row.metricName.contains(filter)) {
168                                        rows.add(row);
169                                    }
170                                }
171                            }
172                            arr = (JsonArray) mo.get("distribution");
173                            if (arr != null) {
174                                for (int i = 0; i < arr.size(); i++) {
175                                    row = baseRow.copy();
176                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
177                                    row.type = "distribution";
178                                    row.metricName = jo.getString("name");
179                                    row.metricDescription = jo.getString("description");
180                                    row.metricId = extractId(jo);
181                                    row.tags = extractTags(jo);
182                                    row.count = jo.getDouble("value");
183                                    row.mean = jo.getDouble("mean");
184                                    row.max = jo.getDouble("max");
185                                    row.total = jo.getDouble("totalAmount");
186 
187                                    if (custom && row.metricName.startsWith("Camel")) {
188                                        continue; // skip internal camel metrics
189                                    }
190                                    if (!all && getNumber(row.count).isEmpty()) {
191                                        continue;
192                                    }
193                                    if (filter == null || row.type.equals(filter) || row.metricName.contains(filter)) {
194                                        rows.add(row);
195                                    }
196                                }
197                            }
198                        }
199                    }
200                });
201 
202        // sort rows
203        rows.sort(this::sortRow);
204 
205        if (!rows.isEmpty()) {
206            printer().println(AsciiTable.getTable(AsciiTable.NO_BORDERS, rows, Arrays.asList(
207                    new Column().header("PID").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.CENTER).with(r -> r.pid),
208                    new Column().header("NAME").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).maxWidth(30, OverflowBehaviour.ELLIPSIS_RIGHT)
209                            .with(r -> r.name),
210                    new Column().header("TYPE").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).with(r -> r.type),
211                    new Column().header("METRIC").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).maxWidth(40, OverflowBehaviour.ELLIPSIS_RIGHT)
212                            .with(r -> r.metricName),
213                    new Column().header("ID").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).maxWidth(40, OverflowBehaviour.ELLIPSIS_RIGHT)
214                            .with(r -> r.metricId),
215                    new Column().header("VALUE").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.RIGHT).dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.RIGHT)
216                            .with(r -> getNumber(r.count)),
217                    new Column().header("MEAN").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.RIGHT).dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.RIGHT)
218                            .with(r -> getNumber(r.mean)),
219                    new Column().header("MAX").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.RIGHT).dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.RIGHT)
220                            .with(r -> getNumber(r.max)),
221                    new Column().header("TOTAL").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.RIGHT).dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.RIGHT)
222                            .with(r -> getNumber(r.total)),
223                    new Column().header("TAGS").visible(tags).dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT)
224                            .maxWidth(60, OverflowBehaviour.NEWLINE)
225                            .with(r -> r.tags))));
226        }
227 
228        return 0;
229    }

73        List<Long> pids = findPids(name);

Original Clone: 
172public static Set<String> extractRolesFromIntrospection(
173            KeycloakTokenIntrospector.IntrospectionResult introspectionResult,
174            String realm, String clientId) {
175        Set<String> roles = new HashSet<>();
176 
177        // Extract roles from realm_access claim
178        Object realmAccess = introspectionResult.getClaim("realm_access");
179        if (realmAccess instanceof Map) {
180            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
181            Map<String, Object> realmAccessMap = (Map<String, Object>) realmAccess;
182            Object realmRoles = realmAccessMap.get("roles");
183            if (realmRoles instanceof Collection) {
184                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
185                Collection<String> realmRolesCollection = (Collection<String>) realmRoles;
186                roles.addAll(realmRolesCollection);
187            }
188        }
189 
190        // Extract client roles from resource_access claim
191        Object resourceAccess = introspectionResult.getClaim("resource_access");
192        if (resourceAccess instanceof Map) {
193            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
194            Map<String, Object> resourceAccessMap = (Map<String, Object>) resourceAccess;
195            Object clientAccess = resourceAccessMap.get(clientId);
196            if (clientAccess instanceof Map) {
197                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
198                Map<String, Object> clientAccessMap = (Map<String, Object>) clientAccess;
199                Object clientRoles = clientAccessMap.get("roles");
200                if (clientRoles instanceof Collection) {
201                    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
202                    Collection<String> clientRolesCollection = (Collection<String>) clientRoles;
203                    roles.addAll(clientRolesCollection);
204                }
205            }
206        }
207 
208        return roles;
209    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private static void extracted(Set<String> roles, Object realmAccess) {
        if (realmAccess instanceof Map) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            Map<String, Object> realmAccessMap = (Map<String, Object>) realmAccess;
            Object realmRoles = realmAccessMap.get("roles");
            if (realmRoles instanceof Collection) {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Collection<String> realmRolesCollection = (Collection<String>) realmRoles;
                roles.addAll(realmRolesCollection);
            }
        }
    }

172public static Set<String> extractRolesFromIntrospection(
173            KeycloakTokenIntrospector.IntrospectionResult introspectionResult,
174            String realm, String clientId) {
175        Set<String> roles = new HashSet<>();
176 
177        // Extract roles from realm_access claim
178        Object realmAccess = introspectionResult.getClaim("realm_access");
179        if (realmAccess instanceof Map) {
180            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
181            Map<String, Object> realmAccessMap = (Map<String, Object>) realmAccess;
182            Object realmRoles = realmAccessMap.get("roles");
183            if (realmRoles instanceof Collection) {
184                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
185                Collection<String> realmRolesCollection = (Collection<String>) realmRoles;
186                roles.addAll(realmRolesCollection);
187            }
188        }
189 
190        // Extract client roles from resource_access claim
191        Object resourceAccess = introspectionResult.getClaim("resource_access");
192        if (resourceAccess instanceof Map) {
193            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
194            Map<String, Object> resourceAccessMap = (Map<String, Object>) resourceAccess;
195            Object clientAccess = resourceAccessMap.get(clientId);
196            if (clientAccess instanceof Map) {
197                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
198                Map<String, Object> clientAccessMap = (Map<String, Object>) clientAccess;
199                Object clientRoles = clientAccessMap.get("roles");
200                if (clientRoles instanceof Collection) {
201                    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
202                    Collection<String> clientRolesCollection = (Collection<String>) clientRoles;
203                    roles.addAll(clientRolesCollection);
204                }
205            }
206        }
207 
208        return roles;
209    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private static void extracted(Set<String> roles, Object clientAccess) {
        if (clientAccess instanceof Map) {
            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
            Map<String, Object> clientAccessMap = (Map<String, Object>) clientAccess;
            Object clientRoles = clientAccessMap.get("roles");
            if (clientRoles instanceof Collection) {
                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
                Collection<String> clientRolesCollection = (Collection<String>) clientRoles;
                roles.addAll(clientRolesCollection);
            }
        }
    }

public boolean extractedClone(RepairedDataPurger purger, DataLimits.Counter repairedCounter)

Return Derivation (Out(i)):
