Original Clone: 
179public UnfilteredRowIterator withRepairedDataInfo(final UnfilteredRowIterator iterator)
180    {
181        class WithTracking extends Transformation<UnfilteredRowIterator>
182        {
183            protected DecoratedKey applyToPartitionKey(DecoratedKey key)
184            {
185                getPerPartitionDigest().update(key.getKey());
186                return key;
187            }
188 
189            protected DeletionTime applyToDeletion(DeletionTime deletionTime)
190            {
191                if (repairedCounter.isDone())
192                    return deletionTime;
193 
194                assert purger != null;
195                DeletionTime purged = purger.applyToDeletion(deletionTime);
196                if (!purged.isLive())
197                    isFullyPurged = false;
198                purged.digest(getPerPartitionDigest());
199                return deletionTime;
200            }
201 
202            protected RangeTombstoneMarker applyToMarker(RangeTombstoneMarker marker)
203            {
204                if (repairedCounter.isDone())
205                    return marker;
206 
207                assert purger != null;
208                RangeTombstoneMarker purged = purger.applyToMarker(marker);
209                if (purged != null)
210                {
211                    isFullyPurged = false;
212                    purged.digest(getPerPartitionDigest());
213                }
214                return marker;
215            }
216 
217            protected Row applyToStatic(Row row)
218            {
219                return applyToRow(row);
220            }
221 
222            protected Row applyToRow(Row row)
223            {
224                if (repairedCounter.isDone())
225                    return row;
226 
227                assert purger != null;
228                Row purged = purger.applyToRow(row);
229                if (purged != null && !purged.isEmpty())
230                {
231                    isFullyPurged = false;
232                    purged.digest(getPerPartitionDigest());
233                }
234                return row;
235            }
236 
237            protected void onPartitionClose()
238            {
239                if (perPartitionDigest != null)
240                {
241                    // If the partition wasn't completely emptied by the purger,
242                    // calculate the digest for the partition and use it to
243                    // update the overall digest
244                    if (!isFullyPurged)
245                    {
246                        if (perCommandDigest == null)
247                            perCommandDigest = Digest.forRepairedDataTracking();
248 
249                        byte[] partitionDigest = perPartitionDigest.digest();
250                        perCommandDigest.update(partitionDigest, 0, partitionDigest.length);
251                    }
252 
253                    perPartitionDigest = null;
254                }
255                isFullyPurged = true;
256            }
257        }
258 
259        if (repairedCounter.isDone())
260            return iterator;
261 
262        UnfilteredRowIterator tracked = repairedCounter.applyTo(Transformation.apply(iterator, new WithTracking()));
263        onNewPartition(tracked);
264        return tracked;
265    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private RangeTombstoneMarker getPurged(RangeTombstoneMarker marker) {
                if (repairedCounter.isDone())
                    return marker;

                assert purger != null;
                RangeTombstoneMarker purged = purger.applyToMarker(marker);
                if (purged != null)
                {
                    isFullyPurged = false;
                    purged.digest(getPerPartitionDigest());
                }
                return marker;
            }

Original Clone: 
179public UnfilteredRowIterator withRepairedDataInfo(final UnfilteredRowIterator iterator)
180    {
181        class WithTracking extends Transformation<UnfilteredRowIterator>
182        {
183            protected DecoratedKey applyToPartitionKey(DecoratedKey key)
184            {
185                getPerPartitionDigest().update(key.getKey());
186                return key;
187            }
188 
189            protected DeletionTime applyToDeletion(DeletionTime deletionTime)
190            {
191                if (repairedCounter.isDone())
192                    return deletionTime;
193 
194                assert purger != null;
195                DeletionTime purged = purger.applyToDeletion(deletionTime);
196                if (!purged.isLive())
197                    isFullyPurged = false;
198                purged.digest(getPerPartitionDigest());
199                return deletionTime;
200            }
201 
202            protected RangeTombstoneMarker applyToMarker(RangeTombstoneMarker marker)
203            {
204                if (repairedCounter.isDone())
205                    return marker;
206 
207                assert purger != null;
208                RangeTombstoneMarker purged = purger.applyToMarker(marker);
209                if (purged != null)
210                {
211                    isFullyPurged = false;
212                    purged.digest(getPerPartitionDigest());
213                }
214                return marker;
215            }
216 
217            protected Row applyToStatic(Row row)
218            {
219                return applyToRow(row);
220            }
221 
222            protected Row applyToRow(Row row)
223            {
224                if (repairedCounter.isDone())
225                    return row;
226 
227                assert purger != null;
228                Row purged = purger.applyToRow(row);
229                if (purged != null && !purged.isEmpty())
230                {
231                    isFullyPurged = false;
232                    purged.digest(getPerPartitionDigest());
233                }
234                return row;
235            }
236 
237            protected void onPartitionClose()
238            {
239                if (perPartitionDigest != null)
240                {
241                    // If the partition wasn't completely emptied by the purger,
242                    // calculate the digest for the partition and use it to
243                    // update the overall digest
244                    if (!isFullyPurged)
245                    {
246                        if (perCommandDigest == null)
247                            perCommandDigest = Digest.forRepairedDataTracking();
248 
249                        byte[] partitionDigest = perPartitionDigest.digest();
250                        perCommandDigest.update(partitionDigest, 0, partitionDigest.length);
251                    }
252 
253                    perPartitionDigest = null;
254                }
255                isFullyPurged = true;
256            }
257        }
258 
259        if (repairedCounter.isDone())
260            return iterator;
261 
262        UnfilteredRowIterator tracked = repairedCounter.applyTo(Transformation.apply(iterator, new WithTracking()));
263        onNewPartition(tracked);
264        return tracked;
265    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private Row getPurged(Row row) {
                if (repairedCounter.isDone())
                    return row;

                assert purger != null;
                Row purged = purger.applyToRow(row);
                if (purged != null && !purged.isEmpty())
                {
                    isFullyPurged = false;
                    purged.digest(getPerPartitionDigest());
                }
                return row;
            }

431public void addPartitionColsToBatch(ColumnVector col, Object value, int colIndex)
432  {
433    String partitionColumnName = rowColumnNames[colIndex];
434    PrimitiveTypeInfo primitiveTypeInfo = (PrimitiveTypeInfo) rowColumnTypeInfos[colIndex];
435    switch (primitiveTypeInfo.getPrimitiveCategory()) {
436    case BOOLEAN: {
437      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
438      if (value == null) {
439        lcv.noNulls = false;
440        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
441        lcv.isRepeating = true;
442      } else {
443        lcv.fill((Boolean) value == true ? 1 : 0);
444      }
445    }
446    break;
447 
448    case BYTE: {
449      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
450      if (value == null) {
451        lcv.noNulls = false;
452        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
453        lcv.isRepeating = true;
454      } else {
455        lcv.fill((Byte) value);
456      }
457    }
458    break;
459 
460    case SHORT: {
461      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
462      if (value == null) {
463        lcv.noNulls = false;
464        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
465        lcv.isRepeating = true;
466      } else {
467        lcv.fill((Short) value);
468      }
469    }
470    break;
471 
472    case INT: {
473      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
474      if (value == null) {
475        lcv.noNulls = false;
476        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
477        lcv.isRepeating = true;
478      } else {
479        lcv.fill((Integer) value);
480      }
481    }
482    break;
483 
484    case LONG: {
485      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
486      if (value == null) {
487        lcv.noNulls = false;
488        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
489        lcv.isRepeating = true;
490      } else {
491        lcv.fill((Long) value);
492      }
493    }
494    break;
495 
496    case DATE: {
497      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
498      if (value == null) {
499        lcv.noNulls = false;
500        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
501        lcv.isRepeating = true;
502      } else {
503        lcv.fill(DateWritableV2.dateToDays((Date) value));
504      }
505    }
506    break;
507 
508    case TIMESTAMP: {
509      TimestampColumnVector lcv = (TimestampColumnVector) col;
510      if (value == null) {
511        lcv.noNulls = false;
512        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
513        lcv.isRepeating = true;
514      } else {
515        lcv.fill(((Timestamp) value).toSqlTimestamp());
516      }
517    }
518    break;
519 
520    case INTERVAL_YEAR_MONTH: {
521      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
522      if (value == null) {
523        lcv.noNulls = false;
524        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
525        lcv.isRepeating = true;
526      } else {
527        lcv.fill(((HiveIntervalYearMonth) value).getTotalMonths());
528      }
529    }
530    break;
531 
532    case INTERVAL_DAY_TIME: {
533      IntervalDayTimeColumnVector icv = (IntervalDayTimeColumnVector) col;
534      if (value == null) {
535        icv.noNulls = false;
536        icv.isNull[0] = true;
537        icv.isRepeating = true;
538      } else {
539        icv.fill(((HiveIntervalDayTime) value));
540      }
541    }
542    break;
543 
544    case FLOAT: {
545      DoubleColumnVector dcv = (DoubleColumnVector) col;
546      if (value == null) {
547        dcv.noNulls = false;
548        dcv.isNull[0] = true;
549        dcv.isRepeating = true;
550      } else {
551        dcv.fill((Float) value);
552      }
553    }
554    break;
555 
556    case DOUBLE: {
557      DoubleColumnVector dcv = (DoubleColumnVector) col;
558      if (value == null) {
559        dcv.noNulls = false;
560        dcv.isNull[0] = true;
561        dcv.isRepeating = true;
562      } else {
563        dcv.fill((Double) value);
564      }
565    }
566    break;
567 
568    case DECIMAL: {
569      DataTypePhysicalVariation dataTypePhysicalVariation = rowDataTypePhysicalVariations != null ?
570        rowDataTypePhysicalVariations[colIndex] : DataTypePhysicalVariation.NONE;
571 
572      if (dataTypePhysicalVariation == DataTypePhysicalVariation.DECIMAL_64) {
573        Decimal64ColumnVector dv = (Decimal64ColumnVector) col;
574        if (value == null) {
575          dv.noNulls = false;
576          dv.isNull[0] = true;
577          dv.isRepeating = true;
578        } else {
579          dv.fill((HiveDecimal) value);
580        }
581      } else {
582        DecimalColumnVector dv = (DecimalColumnVector) col;
583        if (value == null) {
584          dv.noNulls = false;
585          dv.isNull[0] = true;
586          dv.isRepeating = true;
587        } else {
588          dv.fill((HiveDecimal) value);
589        }
590      }
591    }
592    break;
593 
594    case BINARY: {
595        BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) col;
596        byte[] bytes = (byte[]) value;
597        if (bytes == null) {
598          bcv.noNulls = false;
599          bcv.isNull[0] = true;
600          bcv.isRepeating = true;
601        } else {
602          bcv.fill(bytes);
603        }
604      }
605      break;
606 
607    case STRING:
608    case CHAR:
609    case VARCHAR: {
610      BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) col;
611      if (value == null) {
612        bcv.noNulls = false;
613        bcv.isNull[0] = true;
614        bcv.isRepeating = true;
615      } else {
616        String sVal = value.toString();
617        bcv.fill(sVal.getBytes());
618      }
619    }
620    break;
621 
622    default:
623      throw new RuntimeException("Unable to recognize the partition type " + primitiveTypeInfo.getPrimitiveCategory() +
624          " for column " + partitionColumnName);
625    }
626  }

private void extracted(ColumnVector col, Object value) {
    TimestampColumnVector lcv = (TimestampColumnVector) col;
    if (value == null) {
      lcv.noNulls = false;
      lcv.isNull[0] = true;
      lcv.isRepeating = true;
    } else {
      lcv.fill(((Timestamp) value).toSqlTimestamp());
    }
  }

private void extracted(ColumnVector col, Object value) {
    LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
    if (value == null) {
      lcv.noNulls = false;
      lcv.isNull[0] = true;
      lcv.isRepeating = true;
    } else {
      lcv.fill((Long) value);
    }
  }

431public void addPartitionColsToBatch(ColumnVector col, Object value, int colIndex)
432  {
433    String partitionColumnName = rowColumnNames[colIndex];
434    PrimitiveTypeInfo primitiveTypeInfo = (PrimitiveTypeInfo) rowColumnTypeInfos[colIndex];
435    switch (primitiveTypeInfo.getPrimitiveCategory()) {
436    case BOOLEAN: {
437      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
438      if (value == null) {
439        lcv.noNulls = false;
440        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
441        lcv.isRepeating = true;
442      } else {
443        lcv.fill((Boolean) value == true ? 1 : 0);
444      }
445    }
446    break;
447 
448    case BYTE: {
449      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
450      if (value == null) {
451        lcv.noNulls = false;
452        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
453        lcv.isRepeating = true;
454      } else {
455        lcv.fill((Byte) value);
456      }
457    }
458    break;
459 
460    case SHORT: {
461      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
462      if (value == null) {
463        lcv.noNulls = false;
464        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
465        lcv.isRepeating = true;
466      } else {
467        lcv.fill((Short) value);
468      }
469    }
470    break;
471 
472    case INT: {
473      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
474      if (value == null) {
475        lcv.noNulls = false;
476        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
477        lcv.isRepeating = true;
478      } else {
479        lcv.fill((Integer) value);
480      }
481    }
482    break;
483 
484    case LONG: {
485      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
486      if (value == null) {
487        lcv.noNulls = false;
488        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
489        lcv.isRepeating = true;
490      } else {
491        lcv.fill((Long) value);
492      }
493    }
494    break;
495 
496    case DATE: {
497      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
498      if (value == null) {
499        lcv.noNulls = false;
500        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
501        lcv.isRepeating = true;
502      } else {
503        lcv.fill(DateWritableV2.dateToDays((Date) value));
504      }
505    }
506    break;
507 
508    case TIMESTAMP: {
509      TimestampColumnVector lcv = (TimestampColumnVector) col;
510      if (value == null) {
511        lcv.noNulls = false;
512        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
513        lcv.isRepeating = true;
514      } else {
515        lcv.fill(((Timestamp) value).toSqlTimestamp());
516      }
517    }
518    break;
519 
520    case INTERVAL_YEAR_MONTH: {
521      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
522      if (value == null) {
523        lcv.noNulls = false;
524        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
525        lcv.isRepeating = true;
526      } else {
527        lcv.fill(((HiveIntervalYearMonth) value).getTotalMonths());
528      }
529    }
530    break;
531 
532    case INTERVAL_DAY_TIME: {
533      IntervalDayTimeColumnVector icv = (IntervalDayTimeColumnVector) col;
534      if (value == null) {
535        icv.noNulls = false;
536        icv.isNull[0] = true;
537        icv.isRepeating = true;
538      } else {
539        icv.fill(((HiveIntervalDayTime) value));
540      }
541    }
542    break;
543 
544    case FLOAT: {
545      DoubleColumnVector dcv = (DoubleColumnVector) col;
546      if (value == null) {
547        dcv.noNulls = false;
548        dcv.isNull[0] = true;
549        dcv.isRepeating = true;
550      } else {
551        dcv.fill((Float) value);
552      }
553    }
554    break;
555 
556    case DOUBLE: {
557      DoubleColumnVector dcv = (DoubleColumnVector) col;
558      if (value == null) {
559        dcv.noNulls = false;
560        dcv.isNull[0] = true;
561        dcv.isRepeating = true;
562      } else {
563        dcv.fill((Double) value);
564      }
565    }
566    break;
567 
568    case DECIMAL: {
569      DataTypePhysicalVariation dataTypePhysicalVariation = rowDataTypePhysicalVariations != null ?
570        rowDataTypePhysicalVariations[colIndex] : DataTypePhysicalVariation.NONE;
571 
572      if (dataTypePhysicalVariation == DataTypePhysicalVariation.DECIMAL_64) {
573        Decimal64ColumnVector dv = (Decimal64ColumnVector) col;
574        if (value == null) {
575          dv.noNulls = false;
576          dv.isNull[0] = true;
577          dv.isRepeating = true;
578        } else {
579          dv.fill((HiveDecimal) value);
580        }
581      } else {
582        DecimalColumnVector dv = (DecimalColumnVector) col;
583        if (value == null) {
584          dv.noNulls = false;
585          dv.isNull[0] = true;
586          dv.isRepeating = true;
587        } else {
588          dv.fill((HiveDecimal) value);
589        }
590      }
591    }
592    break;
593 
594    case BINARY: {
595        BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) col;
596        byte[] bytes = (byte[]) value;
597        if (bytes == null) {
598          bcv.noNulls = false;
599          bcv.isNull[0] = true;
600          bcv.isRepeating = true;
601        } else {
602          bcv.fill(bytes);
603        }
604      }
605      break;
606 
607    case STRING:
608    case CHAR:
609    case VARCHAR: {
610      BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) col;
611      if (value == null) {
612        bcv.noNulls = false;
613        bcv.isNull[0] = true;
614        bcv.isRepeating = true;
615      } else {
616        String sVal = value.toString();
617        bcv.fill(sVal.getBytes());
618      }
619    }
620    break;
621 
622    default:
623      throw new RuntimeException("Unable to recognize the partition type " + primitiveTypeInfo.getPrimitiveCategory() +
624          " for column " + partitionColumnName);
625    }
626  }

private void extracted(ColumnVector col, Object value) {
    LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
    if (value == null) {
      lcv.noNulls = false;
      lcv.isNull[0] = true;
      lcv.isRepeating = true;
    } else {
      lcv.fill((Short) value);
    }
  }

67private int[] calcLevel()
68    {
69        int[] l =
70        {
71            4, 4
72        };
73 
74        Point2D[] ctlC1 = new Point2D[4];
75        Point2D[] ctlC2 = new Point2D[4];
76        for (int j = 0; j < 4; j++)
77        {
78            ctlC1[j] = controlPoints[j][0];
79            ctlC2[j] = controlPoints[j][3];
80        }
81        // if two opposite edges are both lines, there is a possibility to reduce the dividing level
82        if (isEdgeALine(ctlC1) && isEdgeALine(ctlC2))
83        {
84            /*
85             if any of the 4 inner control points is out of the patch formed by the 4 edges, 
86             keep the high dividing level, 
87             otherwise, determine the dividing level by the lengths of edges
88             */
89            if (isOnSameSideCC(controlPoints[1][1]) || isOnSameSideCC(controlPoints[1][2])
90                    || isOnSameSideCC(controlPoints[2][1]) || isOnSameSideCC(controlPoints[2][2]))
91            {
92                // keep the high dividing level
93            }
94            else
95            {
96                // length's unit is one pixel in device space
97                double lc1 = getLen(ctlC1[0], ctlC1[3]), lc2 = getLen(ctlC2[0], ctlC2[3]);
98                if (lc1 > 800 || lc2 > 800)
99                {
100                    // keeps init value 4
101                }
102                else if (lc1 > 400 || lc2 > 400)
103                {
104                    l[0] = 3;
105                }
106                else if (lc1 > 200 || lc2 > 200)
107                {
108                    l[0] = 2;
109                }
110                else
111                {
112                    l[0] = 1;
113                }
114            }
115        }
116 
117        // the other two opposite edges
118        if (isEdgeALine(controlPoints[0]) && isEdgeALine(controlPoints[3]))
119        {
120            if (isOnSameSideDD(controlPoints[1][1]) || isOnSameSideDD(controlPoints[1][2])
121                    || isOnSameSideDD(controlPoints[2][1]) || isOnSameSideDD(controlPoints[2][2]))
122            {
123                // keep the high dividing level
124            }
125            else
126            {
127                double ld1 = getLen(controlPoints[0][0], controlPoints[0][3]);
128                double ld2 = getLen(controlPoints[3][0], controlPoints[3][3]);
129                if (ld1 > 800 || ld2 > 800)
130                {
131                    // keeps init value 4
132                }
133                else if (ld1 > 400 || ld2 > 400)
134                {
135                    l[1] = 3;
136                }
137                else if (ld1 > 200 || ld2 > 200)
138                {
139                    l[1] = 2;
140                }
141                else
142                {
143                    l[1] = 1;
144                }
145            }
146        }
147        return l;
148    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(int[] l) {
        double ld1 = getLen(controlPoints[0][0], controlPoints[0][3]);
        double ld2 = getLen(controlPoints[3][0], controlPoints[3][3]);
        if (ld1 > 800 || ld2 > 800)
        {
            // keeps init value 4
        }
        else if (ld1 > 400 || ld2 > 400)
        {
            l[1] = 3;
        }
        else if (ld1 > 200 || ld2 > 200)
        {
            l[1] = 2;
        }
        else
        {
            l[1] = 1;
        }
    }

67private int[] calcLevel()
68    {
69        int[] l =
70        {
71            4, 4
72        };
73 
74        Point2D[] ctlC1 = new Point2D[4];
75        Point2D[] ctlC2 = new Point2D[4];
76        for (int j = 0; j < 4; j++)
77        {
78            ctlC1[j] = controlPoints[j][0];
79            ctlC2[j] = controlPoints[j][3];
80        }
81        // if two opposite edges are both lines, there is a possibility to reduce the dividing level
82        if (isEdgeALine(ctlC1) && isEdgeALine(ctlC2))
83        {
84            /*
85             if any of the 4 inner control points is out of the patch formed by the 4 edges, 
86             keep the high dividing level, 
87             otherwise, determine the dividing level by the lengths of edges
88             */
89            if (isOnSameSideCC(controlPoints[1][1]) || isOnSameSideCC(controlPoints[1][2])
90                    || isOnSameSideCC(controlPoints[2][1]) || isOnSameSideCC(controlPoints[2][2]))
91            {
92                // keep the high dividing level
93            }
94            else
95            {

98                if (lc1 > 800 || lc2 > 800)
99                {
100                    // keeps init value 4
101                }

103                {
104                    l[0] = 3;
105                }

private void extracted(int[] l) {
        if (isOnSameSideDD(controlPoints[1][1]) || isOnSameSideDD(controlPoints[1][2])
                || isOnSameSideDD(controlPoints[2][1]) || isOnSameSideDD(controlPoints[2][2]))
        {
            // keep the high dividing level
        }
        else
        {
            double ld1 = getLen(controlPoints[0][0], controlPoints[0][3]);
            double ld2 = getLen(controlPoints[3][0], controlPoints[3][3]);
            if (ld1 > 800 || ld2 > 800)
            {
                // keeps init value 4
            }
            else if (ld1 > 400 || ld2 > 400)
            {
                l[1] = 3;
            }
            else if (ld1 > 200 || ld2 > 200)
            {
                l[1] = 2;
            }
            else
            {
                l[1] = 1;
            }
        }
    }

69boolean updateSelection(Predicate<ConfigurationNode> predicate, Collection<ConfigurationNode> classes) {
70        boolean modified = false;
71        for (ConfigurationNode classObj : classes) {
72            boolean select = predicate.test(classObj);
73            if (classObj instanceof ObjEntity) {
74                if (select) {
75                    if (selectedEntities.add(((ObjEntity) classObj).getName())) {
76                        modified = true;
77                    }
78                } else {
79                    if (selectedEntities.remove(((ObjEntity) classObj).getName())) {
80                        modified = true;
81                    }
82                }
83            } else if (classObj instanceof Embeddable) {
84                if (select) {
85                    if (selectedEmbeddables.add(((Embeddable) classObj).getClassName())) {
86                        modified = true;
87                    }
88                } else {
89                    if (selectedEmbeddables.remove(((Embeddable) classObj).getClassName())) {
90                        modified = true;
91                    }
92                }
93            } else if (classObj instanceof DataMap) {
94                if (select) {
95                    if (selectedDataMaps.add(((DataMap) classObj).getName())) {
96                        modified = true;
97                    }
98                } else {
99                    if (selectedDataMaps.remove(((DataMap) classObj).getName())) {
100                        modified = true;
101                    }
102                }
103            }
104        }
105        return modified;
106    }

69boolean updateSelection(Predicate<ConfigurationNode> predicate, Collection<ConfigurationNode> classes) {
70        boolean modified = false;
71        for (ConfigurationNode classObj : classes) {
72            boolean select = predicate.test(classObj);
73            if (classObj instanceof ObjEntity) {
74                if (select) {
75                    if (selectedEntities.add(((ObjEntity) classObj).getName())) {
76                        modified = true;
77                    }
78                } else {
79                    if (selectedEntities.remove(((ObjEntity) classObj).getName())) {
80                        modified = true;
81                    }
82                }
83            } else if (classObj instanceof Embeddable) {
84                if (select) {
85                    if (selectedEmbeddables.add(((Embeddable) classObj).getClassName())) {
86                        modified = true;
87                    }
88                } else {
89                    if (selectedEmbeddables.remove(((Embeddable) classObj).getClassName())) {
90                        modified = true;
91                    }
92                }
93            } else if (classObj instanceof DataMap) {
94                if (select) {
95                    if (selectedDataMaps.add(((DataMap) classObj).getName())) {
96                        modified = true;
97                    }
98                } else {
99                    if (selectedDataMaps.remove(((DataMap) classObj).getName())) {
100                        modified = true;
101                    }
102                }
103            }
104        }
105        return modified;
106    }

[]
Original Clone: 
274private static void toJsonImpl(
275            byte[] value, byte[] metadata, int pos, StringBuilder sb, ZoneId zoneId) {
276        switch (BinaryVariantUtil.getType(value, pos)) {
277            case OBJECT:
278                handleObject(
279                        value,
280                        pos,
281                        (size, idSize, offsetSize, idStart, offsetStart, dataStart) -> {
282                            sb.append('{');
283                            for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
284                                int id = readUnsigned(value, idStart + idSize * i, idSize);
285                                int offset =
286                                        readUnsigned(
287                                                value, offsetStart + offsetSize * i, offsetSize);
288                                int elementPos = dataStart + offset;
289                                if (i != 0) {
290                                    sb.append(',');
291                                }
292                                sb.append(escapeJson(getMetadataKey(metadata, id)));
293                                sb.append(':');
294                                toJsonImpl(value, metadata, elementPos, sb, zoneId);
295                            }
296                            sb.append('}');
297                            return null;
298                        });
299                break;
300            case ARRAY:
301                handleArray(
302                        value,
303                        pos,
304                        (size, offsetSize, offsetStart, dataStart) -> {
305                            sb.append('[');
306                            for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
307                                int offset =
308                                        readUnsigned(
309                                                value, offsetStart + offsetSize * i, offsetSize);
310                                int elementPos = dataStart + offset;
311                                if (i != 0) {
312                                    sb.append(',');
313                                }
314                                toJsonImpl(value, metadata, elementPos, sb, zoneId);
315                            }
316                            sb.append(']');
317                            return null;
318                        });
319                break;
320            case NULL:
321                sb.append("null");
322                break;
323            case BOOLEAN:
324                sb.append(BinaryVariantUtil.getBoolean(value, pos));
325                break;
326            case TINYINT:
327            case SMALLINT:
328            case INT:
329            case BIGINT:
330                sb.append(BinaryVariantUtil.getLong(value, pos));
331                break;
332            case STRING:
333                sb.append(escapeJson(BinaryVariantUtil.getString(value, pos)));
334                break;
335            case DOUBLE:
336                sb.append(BinaryVariantUtil.getDouble(value, pos));
337                break;
338            case DECIMAL:
339                sb.append(BinaryVariantUtil.getDecimal(value, pos).toPlainString());
340                break;
341            case DATE:
342                appendQuoted(
343                        sb,
344                        LocalDate.ofEpochDay((int) BinaryVariantUtil.getLong(value, pos))
345                                .toString());
346                break;
347            case TIMESTAMP_LTZ:
348                appendQuoted(
349                        sb,
350                        TIMESTAMP_LTZ_FORMATTER.format(
351                                microsToInstant(BinaryVariantUtil.getLong(value, pos))
352                                        .atZone(zoneId)));
353                break;
354            case TIMESTAMP:
355                appendQuoted(
356                        sb,
357                        TIMESTAMP_FORMATTER.format(
358                                microsToInstant(BinaryVariantUtil.getLong(value, pos))
359                                        .atZone(ZoneOffset.UTC)));
360                break;
361            case FLOAT:
362                sb.append(BinaryVariantUtil.getFloat(value, pos));
363                break;
364            case BYTES:
365                appendQuoted(
366                        sb,
367                        Base64.getEncoder()
368                                .encodeToString(BinaryVariantUtil.getBinary(value, pos)));
369                break;
370            default:
371                throw unexpectedType(BinaryVariantUtil.getType(value, pos));
372        }
373    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private static void extracted(byte[] value, byte[] metadata, int pos, StringBuilder sb, ZoneId zoneId) {
        handleObject(
                value,
                pos,
                (size, idSize, offsetSize, idStart, offsetStart, dataStart) -> {
                    sb.append('{');
                    for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
                        int id = readUnsigned(value, idStart + idSize * i, idSize);
                        int offset =
                                readUnsigned(
                                        value, offsetStart + offsetSize * i, offsetSize);
                        int elementPos = dataStart + offset;
                        if (i != 0) {
                            sb.append(',');
                        }
                        sb.append(escapeJson(getMetadataKey(metadata, id)));
                        sb.append(':');
                        toJsonImpl(value, metadata, elementPos, sb, zoneId);
                    }
                    sb.append('}');
                    return null;
                });
    }

File: systems/flink-java/flink-core/src/main/java/org/apache/flink/types/variant/BinaryVariant.java

Original Clone: 
274private static void toJsonImpl(
275            byte[] value, byte[] metadata, int pos, StringBuilder sb, ZoneId zoneId) {
276        switch (BinaryVariantUtil.getType(value, pos)) {
277            case OBJECT:
278                handleObject(
279                        value,
280                        pos,
281                        (size, idSize, offsetSize, idStart, offsetStart, dataStart) -> {
282                            sb.append('{');
283                            for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
284                                int id = readUnsigned(value, idStart + idSize * i, idSize);
285                                int offset =
286                                        readUnsigned(
287                                                value, offsetStart + offsetSize * i, offsetSize);
288                                int elementPos = dataStart + offset;
289                                if (i != 0) {
290                                    sb.append(',');
291                                }
292                                sb.append(escapeJson(getMetadataKey(metadata, id)));
293                                sb.append(':');
294                                toJsonImpl(value, metadata, elementPos, sb, zoneId);
295                            }
296                            sb.append('}');
297                            return null;
298                        });
299                break;
300            case ARRAY:
301                handleArray(
302                        value,
303                        pos,
304                        (size, offsetSize, offsetStart, dataStart) -> {
305                            sb.append('[');
306                            for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
307                                int offset =
308                                        readUnsigned(
309                                                value, offsetStart + offsetSize * i, offsetSize);
310                                int elementPos = dataStart + offset;
311                                if (i != 0) {
312                                    sb.append(',');
313                                }
314                                toJsonImpl(value, metadata, elementPos, sb, zoneId);
315                            }
316                            sb.append(']');
317                            return null;
318                        });
319                break;
320            case NULL:
321                sb.append("null");
322                break;
323            case BOOLEAN:
324                sb.append(BinaryVariantUtil.getBoolean(value, pos));
325                break;
326            case TINYINT:
327            case SMALLINT:
328            case INT:
329            case BIGINT:
330                sb.append(BinaryVariantUtil.getLong(value, pos));
331                break;
332            case STRING:
333                sb.append(escapeJson(BinaryVariantUtil.getString(value, pos)));
334                break;
335            case DOUBLE:
336                sb.append(BinaryVariantUtil.getDouble(value, pos));
337                break;
338            case DECIMAL:
339                sb.append(BinaryVariantUtil.getDecimal(value, pos).toPlainString());
340                break;
341            case DATE:
342                appendQuoted(
343                        sb,
344                        LocalDate.ofEpochDay((int) BinaryVariantUtil.getLong(value, pos))
345                                .toString());
346                break;
347            case TIMESTAMP_LTZ:
348                appendQuoted(
349                        sb,
350                        TIMESTAMP_LTZ_FORMATTER.format(
351                                microsToInstant(BinaryVariantUtil.getLong(value, pos))
352                                        .atZone(zoneId)));
353                break;
354            case TIMESTAMP:
355                appendQuoted(
356                        sb,
357                        TIMESTAMP_FORMATTER.format(
358                                microsToInstant(BinaryVariantUtil.getLong(value, pos))
359                                        .atZone(ZoneOffset.UTC)));
360                break;
361            case FLOAT:
362                sb.append(BinaryVariantUtil.getFloat(value, pos));
363                break;
364            case BYTES:
365                appendQuoted(
366                        sb,
367                        Base64.getEncoder()
368                                .encodeToString(BinaryVariantUtil.getBinary(value, pos)));
369                break;
370            default:
371                throw unexpectedType(BinaryVariantUtil.getType(value, pos));
372        }
373    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private static void extracted(byte[] value, byte[] metadata, int pos, StringBuilder sb, ZoneId zoneId) {
        handleArray(
                value,
                pos,
                (size, offsetSize, offsetStart, dataStart) -> {
                    sb.append('[');
                    for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
                        int offset =
                                readUnsigned(
                                        value, offsetStart + offsetSize * i, offsetSize);
                        int elementPos = dataStart + offset;
                        if (i != 0) {
                            sb.append(',');
                        }
                        toJsonImpl(value, metadata, elementPos, sb, zoneId);
                    }
                    sb.append(']');
                    return null;
                });
    }

431public void addPartitionColsToBatch(ColumnVector col, Object value, int colIndex)
432  {
433    String partitionColumnName = rowColumnNames[colIndex];
434    PrimitiveTypeInfo primitiveTypeInfo = (PrimitiveTypeInfo) rowColumnTypeInfos[colIndex];
435    switch (primitiveTypeInfo.getPrimitiveCategory()) {
436    case BOOLEAN: {
437      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
438      if (value == null) {
439        lcv.noNulls = false;
440        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
441        lcv.isRepeating = true;
442      } else {
443        lcv.fill((Boolean) value == true ? 1 : 0);
444      }
445    }
446    break;
447 
448    case BYTE: {
449      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
450      if (value == null) {
451        lcv.noNulls = false;
452        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
453        lcv.isRepeating = true;
454      } else {
455        lcv.fill((Byte) value);
456      }
457    }
458    break;
459 
460    case SHORT: {
461      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
462      if (value == null) {
463        lcv.noNulls = false;
464        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
465        lcv.isRepeating = true;
466      } else {
467        lcv.fill((Short) value);
468      }
469    }
470    break;
471 
472    case INT: {
473      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
474      if (value == null) {
475        lcv.noNulls = false;
476        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
477        lcv.isRepeating = true;
478      } else {
479        lcv.fill((Integer) value);
480      }
481    }
482    break;
483 
484    case LONG: {
485      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
486      if (value == null) {
487        lcv.noNulls = false;
488        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
489        lcv.isRepeating = true;
490      } else {
491        lcv.fill((Long) value);
492      }
493    }
494    break;
495 
496    case DATE: {
497      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
498      if (value == null) {
499        lcv.noNulls = false;
500        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
501        lcv.isRepeating = true;
502      } else {
503        lcv.fill(DateWritableV2.dateToDays((Date) value));
504      }
505    }
506    break;
507 
508    case TIMESTAMP: {
509      TimestampColumnVector lcv = (TimestampColumnVector) col;
510      if (value == null) {
511        lcv.noNulls = false;
512        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
513        lcv.isRepeating = true;
514      } else {
515        lcv.fill(((Timestamp) value).toSqlTimestamp());
516      }
517    }
518    break;
519 
520    case INTERVAL_YEAR_MONTH: {
521      LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
522      if (value == null) {
523        lcv.noNulls = false;
524        lcv.isNull[0] = true;
525        lcv.isRepeating = true;
526      } else {
527        lcv.fill(((HiveIntervalYearMonth) value).getTotalMonths());
528      }
529    }
530    break;
531 
532    case INTERVAL_DAY_TIME: {
533      IntervalDayTimeColumnVector icv = (IntervalDayTimeColumnVector) col;
534      if (value == null) {
535        icv.noNulls = false;
536        icv.isNull[0] = true;
537        icv.isRepeating = true;
538      } else {
539        icv.fill(((HiveIntervalDayTime) value));
540      }
541    }
542    break;
543 
544    case FLOAT: {
545      DoubleColumnVector dcv = (DoubleColumnVector) col;
546      if (value == null) {
547        dcv.noNulls = false;
548        dcv.isNull[0] = true;
549        dcv.isRepeating = true;
550      } else {
551        dcv.fill((Float) value);
552      }
553    }
554    break;
555 
556    case DOUBLE: {
557      DoubleColumnVector dcv = (DoubleColumnVector) col;
558      if (value == null) {
559        dcv.noNulls = false;
560        dcv.isNull[0] = true;
561        dcv.isRepeating = true;
562      } else {
563        dcv.fill((Double) value);
564      }
565    }
566    break;
567 
568    case DECIMAL: {
569      DataTypePhysicalVariation dataTypePhysicalVariation = rowDataTypePhysicalVariations != null ?
570        rowDataTypePhysicalVariations[colIndex] : DataTypePhysicalVariation.NONE;
571 
572      if (dataTypePhysicalVariation == DataTypePhysicalVariation.DECIMAL_64) {
573        Decimal64ColumnVector dv = (Decimal64ColumnVector) col;
574        if (value == null) {
575          dv.noNulls = false;
576          dv.isNull[0] = true;
577          dv.isRepeating = true;
578        } else {

584          dv.noNulls = false;
585          dv.isNull[0] = true;
586          dv.isRepeating = true;
587        } else {
588          dv.fill((HiveDecimal) value);
589        }
590      }
591    }
592    break;
593 
594    case BINARY: {
595        BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) col;
596        byte[] bytes = (byte[]) value;
597        if (bytes == null) {
598          bcv.noNulls = false;
599          bcv.isNull[0] = true;
600          bcv.isRepeating = true;
601        } else {
602          bcv.fill(bytes);
603        }
604      }
605      break;
606 
607    case STRING:
608    case CHAR:
609    case VARCHAR: {
610      BytesColumnVector bcv = (BytesColumnVector) col;
611      if (value == null) {
612        bcv.noNulls = false;
613        bcv.isNull[0] = true;
614        bcv.isRepeating = true;
615      } else {
616        String sVal = value.toString();
617        bcv.fill(sVal.getBytes());
618      }
619    }
620    break;
621 
622    default:
623      throw new RuntimeException("Unable to recognize the partition type " + primitiveTypeInfo.getPrimitiveCategory() +
624          " for column " + partitionColumnName);
625    }
626  }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private static void extracted(int rowIndex, Object writableCol, TimestampColumnVector lcv) {
    if (writableCol != null) {
      lcv.set(rowIndex, ((TimestampWritableV2) writableCol).getTimestamp().toSqlTimestamp());
      lcv.isNull[rowIndex] = false;
    } else {
      lcv.setNullValue(rowIndex);
      setNullColIsNullValue(lcv, rowIndex);
    }
  }

Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(ColumnVector col, Object value) {
    LongColumnVector lcv = (LongColumnVector) col;
    if (value == null) {
      lcv.noNulls = false;
      lcv.isNull[0] = true;
      lcv.isRepeating = true;
    } else {
      lcv.fill(DateWritableV2.dateToDays((Date) value));
    }
  }

Original Clone: 
777protected XSDocumentInfo constructTrees(Element schemaRoot, String locationHint, XSDDescription desc, boolean nsCollision) {
778        if (schemaRoot == null) return null;
779        String callerTNS = desc.getTargetNamespace();
780        short referType = desc.getContextType();
781        
782        XSDocumentInfo currSchemaInfo = null;
783        try {
784            // note that attributes are freed at end of traverseSchemas()
785            currSchemaInfo = new XSDocumentInfo(schemaRoot, fAttributeChecker, fSymbolTable);
786        } catch (XMLSchemaException se) {
787            reportSchemaError(ELE_ERROR_CODES[referType],
788                    new Object[]{locationHint},
789					  schemaRoot);
790            return null;
791        }
792        // targetNamespace="" is not valid, issue a warning, and ignore it
793        if (currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace != null &&
794                currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace.length() == 0) {
795            reportSchemaWarning("EmptyTargetNamespace",
796                    new Object[]{locationHint},
797					schemaRoot);
798            currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace = null;
799        }
800        
801        if (callerTNS != null) {
802            // the second index to the NS_ERROR_CODES array
803            // if the caller/expected NS is not absent, we use the first column
804            int secondIdx = 0;
805            // for include and redefine
806            if (referType == XSDDescription.CONTEXT_INCLUDE ||
807                    referType == XSDDescription.CONTEXT_REDEFINE) {
808                // if the referred document has no targetNamespace,
809                // it's a chameleon schema
810                if (currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace == null) {
811                    currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace = callerTNS;
812                    currSchemaInfo.fIsChameleonSchema = true;
813                }
814                // if the referred document has a target namespace differing
815                // from the caller, it's an error
816                else if (callerTNS != currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace) {
817                    reportSchemaError(NS_ERROR_CODES[referType][secondIdx],
818                            new Object [] {callerTNS, currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace},
819							schemaRoot);
820                    return null;
821                }
822            }
823            // for instance and import, the two NS's must be the same
824            else if (referType != XSDDescription.CONTEXT_PREPARSE && callerTNS != currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace) {
825                reportSchemaError(NS_ERROR_CODES[referType][secondIdx],
826                        new Object [] {callerTNS, currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace},
827						schemaRoot);
828                return null;
829            }
830        }
831        // now there is no caller/expected NS, it's an error for the referred
832        // document to have a target namespace, unless we are preparsing a schema
833        else if (currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace != null) {
834            // set the target namespace of the description
835            if (referType == XSDDescription.CONTEXT_PREPARSE) {
836                desc.setTargetNamespace(currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace);
837                callerTNS = currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace;
838            }
839            else {
840                // the second index to the NS_ERROR_CODES array
841                // if the caller/expected NS is absent, we use the second column
842                int secondIdx = 1;
843                reportSchemaError(NS_ERROR_CODES[referType][secondIdx],
844                        new Object [] {callerTNS, currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace},
845						schemaRoot);
846                return null;
847            }
848        }
849        // the other cases (callerTNS == currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespce == null)
850        // are valid
851        
852        // a schema document can always access it's own target namespace
853        currSchemaInfo.addAllowedNS(currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace);
854        
855        SchemaGrammar sg = null;
856 
857        // we have a namespace collision
858        if (nsCollision) {
859            SchemaGrammar sg2 = fGrammarBucket.getGrammar(currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace);
860            if (sg2.isImmutable()) {
861                sg = new SchemaGrammar(sg2);
862                fGrammarBucket.putGrammar(sg);
863                // update all the grammars in the bucket to point to the new grammar.
864                updateImportListWith(sg);
865            }
866            else {
867                sg = sg2;
868            }
869 
870            // update import list of the new grammar
871            updateImportListFor(sg);
872        }
873        else if (referType == XSDDescription.CONTEXT_INCLUDE ||
874                referType == XSDDescription.CONTEXT_REDEFINE) {
875            sg = fGrammarBucket.getGrammar(currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace);
876        }
877        else if(fHonourAllSchemaLocations && referType == XSDDescription.CONTEXT_IMPORT) {
878            sg = findGrammar(desc, false);
879            if(sg == null) {
880                sg = new SchemaGrammar(currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace, desc.makeClone(), fSymbolTable);
881                fGrammarBucket.putGrammar(sg);
882            }
883        }
884        else {
885            sg = new SchemaGrammar(currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace, desc.makeClone(), fSymbolTable);
886            fGrammarBucket.putGrammar(sg);
887        }
888 
889        // store the document and its location
890        // REVISIT: don't expose the DOM tree
891        sg.addDocument(null, (String)fDoc2SystemId.get(currSchemaInfo.fSchemaElement));
892        
893        fDoc2XSDocumentMap.put(schemaRoot, currSchemaInfo);
894        Vector dependencies = new Vector();
895        Element rootNode = schemaRoot;
896        
897        Element newSchemaRoot = null;
898        for (Element child = DOMUtil.getFirstChildElement(rootNode);
899        child != null;
900        child = DOMUtil.getNextSiblingElement(child)) {
901            String schemaNamespace=null;
902            String schemaHint=null;
903            String localName = DOMUtil.getLocalName(child);
904            
905            short refType = -1;
906            boolean importCollision = false;
907            
908            if (localName.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_ANNOTATION))
909                continue;
910            else if (localName.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_IMPORT)) {
911                refType = XSDDescription.CONTEXT_IMPORT;
912                // have to handle some validation here too!
913                // call XSAttributeChecker to fill in attrs
914                Object[] importAttrs = fAttributeChecker.checkAttributes(child, true, currSchemaInfo);
915                schemaHint = (String)importAttrs[XSAttributeChecker.ATTIDX_SCHEMALOCATION];
916                schemaNamespace = (String)importAttrs[XSAttributeChecker.ATTIDX_NAMESPACE];
917                if (schemaNamespace != null)
918                    schemaNamespace = fSymbolTable.addSymbol(schemaNamespace);
919                
920                // check contents and process optional annotations
921                Element importChild = DOMUtil.getFirstChildElement(child);
922                if(importChild != null ) {
923                    String importComponentType = DOMUtil.getLocalName(importChild);
924                    if (importComponentType.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_ANNOTATION)) {
925                        // promoting annotations to parent component
926                        sg.addAnnotation(
927                                fElementTraverser.traverseAnnotationDecl(importChild, importAttrs, true, currSchemaInfo));
928                    } else {
929                        reportSchemaError("s4s-elt-must-match.1", new Object [] {localName, "annotation?", importComponentType}, child);
930                    }
931                    if(DOMUtil.getNextSiblingElement(importChild) != null) {
932                        reportSchemaError("s4s-elt-must-match.1", new Object [] {localName, "annotation?", DOMUtil.getLocalName(DOMUtil.getNextSiblingElement(importChild))}, child);
933                    }
934                }
935                else {
936                    String text = DOMUtil.getSyntheticAnnotation(child);
937                    if (text != null) {
938                        sg.addAnnotation(fElementTraverser.traverseSyntheticAnnotation(child, text, importAttrs, true, currSchemaInfo));
939                    }
940                }
941                fAttributeChecker.returnAttrArray(importAttrs, currSchemaInfo);
942                
943                // a document can't import another document with the same namespace
944                if (schemaNamespace == currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace) {
945                    reportSchemaError(schemaNamespace != null ? 
946                            "src-import.1.1" : "src-import.1.2", new Object [] {schemaNamespace}, child);
947                    continue;
948                }
949 
950                // if this namespace has not been imported by this document,
951                //  then import if multiple imports support is enabled.
952                if(currSchemaInfo.isAllowedNS(schemaNamespace)) {
953                    if(!fHonourAllSchemaLocations && !fNamespaceGrowth)
954                        continue;
955                }
956                else  {
957                    currSchemaInfo.addAllowedNS(schemaNamespace);
958                }
959                // also record the fact that one namespace imports another one
960                // convert null to ""
961                String tns = null2EmptyString(currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace);
962                // get all namespaces imported by this one
963                Vector ins = (Vector)fImportMap.get(tns);
964                // if no namespace was imported, create new Vector
965                if (ins == null) {
966                    // record that this one imports other(s)
967                    fAllTNSs.addElement(tns);
968                    ins = new Vector();
969                    fImportMap.put(tns, ins);
970                    ins.addElement(schemaNamespace);
971                }
972                else if (!ins.contains(schemaNamespace)){
973                    ins.addElement(schemaNamespace);
974                }
975 
976                fSchemaGrammarDescription.reset();
977                fSchemaGrammarDescription.setContextType(XSDDescription.CONTEXT_IMPORT);
978                fSchemaGrammarDescription.setBaseSystemId(doc2SystemId(schemaRoot));
979                fSchemaGrammarDescription.setLiteralSystemId(schemaHint);
980                fSchemaGrammarDescription.setLocationHints(new String[]{schemaHint});
981                fSchemaGrammarDescription.setTargetNamespace(schemaNamespace);
982                
983                // if a grammar with the same namespace and location exists (or being
984                // built), ignore this one (don't traverse it).
985                SchemaGrammar isg = findGrammar(fSchemaGrammarDescription, fNamespaceGrowth);
986                if (isg != null) {
987                    if (fNamespaceGrowth) {
988                        try {
989                            if (isg.getDocumentLocations().contains(XMLEntityManager.expandSystemId(schemaHint, fSchemaGrammarDescription.getBaseSystemId(), false))) {
990                                continue;
991                            }
992                            else {
993                                importCollision = true;
994                            }
995                        } 
996                        catch (MalformedURIException e) {
997                        }
998                    }
999                    else if (!fHonourAllSchemaLocations || isExistingGrammar(fSchemaGrammarDescription, false)) {
1000                        continue;
1001                    }
1002                }
1003                //if ((!fHonourAllSchemaLocations && findGrammar(fSchemaGrammarDescription) != null) || isExistingGrammar(fSchemaGrammarDescription))
1004                //    continue;
1005 
1006                // If "findGrammar" returns a grammar, then this is not the
1007                // the first time we see a location for a given namespace.
1008                // Don't consult the location pair hashtable in this case,
1009                // otherwise the location will be ignored because it'll get
1010                // resolved to the same location as the first hint.
1011                newSchemaRoot = resolveSchema(fSchemaGrammarDescription, false, child, isg == null);
1012            }
1013            else if ((localName.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_INCLUDE)) ||
1014                    (localName.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_REDEFINE))) {
1015                // validation for redefine/include will be the same here; just
1016                // make sure TNS is right (don't care about redef contents
1017                // yet).
1018                Object[] includeAttrs = fAttributeChecker.checkAttributes(child, true, currSchemaInfo);
1019                schemaHint = (String)includeAttrs[XSAttributeChecker.ATTIDX_SCHEMALOCATION];
1020                // store the namespace decls of the redefine element
1021                if (localName.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_REDEFINE)) {
1022                    fRedefine2NSSupport.put(child, new SchemaNamespaceSupport(currSchemaInfo.fNamespaceSupport));
1023                }
1024                
1025                // check annotations.  Must do this here to avoid having to
1026                // re-parse attributes later
1027                if(localName.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_INCLUDE)) {
1028                    Element includeChild = DOMUtil.getFirstChildElement(child);
1029                    if(includeChild != null ) {
1030                        String includeComponentType = DOMUtil.getLocalName(includeChild);
1031                        if (includeComponentType.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_ANNOTATION)) {
1032                            // promoting annotations to parent component
1033                            sg.addAnnotation(
1034                                    fElementTraverser.traverseAnnotationDecl(includeChild, includeAttrs, true, currSchemaInfo));
1035                        } else {
1036                            reportSchemaError("s4s-elt-must-match.1", new Object [] {localName, "annotation?", includeComponentType}, child);
1037                        }
1038                        if(DOMUtil.getNextSiblingElement(includeChild) != null) {
1039                            reportSchemaError("s4s-elt-must-match.1", new Object [] {localName, "annotation?", DOMUtil.getLocalName(DOMUtil.getNextSiblingElement(includeChild))}, child);
1040                        }
1041                    }
1042                    else {
1043                        String text = DOMUtil.getSyntheticAnnotation(child);
1044                        if (text != null) {
1045                            sg.addAnnotation(fElementTraverser.traverseSyntheticAnnotation(child, text, includeAttrs, true, currSchemaInfo));
1046                        }
1047                    }
1048                }
1049                else {
1050                    for (Element redefinedChild = DOMUtil.getFirstChildElement(child);
1051                    redefinedChild != null;
1052                    redefinedChild = DOMUtil.getNextSiblingElement(redefinedChild)) {
1053                        String redefinedComponentType = DOMUtil.getLocalName(redefinedChild);
1054                        if (redefinedComponentType.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_ANNOTATION)) {
1055                            // promoting annotations to parent component
1056                            sg.addAnnotation(
1057                                    fElementTraverser.traverseAnnotationDecl(redefinedChild, includeAttrs, true, currSchemaInfo));
1058                            DOMUtil.setHidden(redefinedChild, fHiddenNodes);
1059                        }
1060                        else {
1061                            String text = DOMUtil.getSyntheticAnnotation(child);
1062                            if (text != null) {
1063                                sg.addAnnotation(fElementTraverser.traverseSyntheticAnnotation(child, text, includeAttrs, true, currSchemaInfo));
1064                            }
1065                        }
1066                        // catch all other content errors later
1067                    }
1068                }
1069                fAttributeChecker.returnAttrArray(includeAttrs, currSchemaInfo);
1070                // schemaLocation is required on <include> and <redefine>
1071                if (schemaHint == null) {
1072                    reportSchemaError("s4s-att-must-appear", new Object [] {
1073                            "<include> or <redefine>", "schemaLocation"},
1074                            child);
1075                }
1076                // pass the systemId of the current document as the base systemId
1077                boolean mustResolve = false;
1078                refType = XSDDescription.CONTEXT_INCLUDE;
1079                if(localName.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_REDEFINE)) {
1080                    mustResolve = nonAnnotationContent(child);
1081                    refType = XSDDescription.CONTEXT_REDEFINE;
1082                }
1083                fSchemaGrammarDescription.reset();
1084                fSchemaGrammarDescription.setContextType(refType);
1085                fSchemaGrammarDescription.setBaseSystemId(doc2SystemId(schemaRoot));
1086                fSchemaGrammarDescription.setLocationHints(new String[]{schemaHint});
1087                fSchemaGrammarDescription.setTargetNamespace(callerTNS);
1088                
1089                boolean alreadyTraversed = false;
1090                XMLInputSource schemaSource = resolveSchemaSource(fSchemaGrammarDescription, mustResolve, child, true);
1091                if (fNamespaceGrowth && refType == XSDDescription.CONTEXT_INCLUDE) {
1092                    try {
1093                        final String schemaId = XMLEntityManager.expandSystemId(schemaSource.getSystemId(), schemaSource.getBaseSystemId(), false);
1094                        alreadyTraversed = sg.getDocumentLocations().contains(schemaId);
1095                    }
1096                    catch(MalformedURIException e) {
1097                        
1098                    }
1099                }
1100 
1101                if (!alreadyTraversed) {
1102                    newSchemaRoot = resolveSchema(schemaSource, fSchemaGrammarDescription, mustResolve, child);
1103                    schemaNamespace = currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace;
1104                }
1105                else {
1106                    fLastSchemaWasDuplicate = true;
1107                }
1108            }
1109            else {
1110                // no more possibility of schema references in well-formed
1111                // schema...
1112                break;
1113            }
1114            
1115            // If the schema is duplicate, we needn't call constructTrees() again.
1116            // To handle mutual <include>s
1117            XSDocumentInfo newSchemaInfo = null;
1118            if (fLastSchemaWasDuplicate) {
1119                newSchemaInfo = newSchemaRoot == null ? null : (XSDocumentInfo)fDoc2XSDocumentMap.get(newSchemaRoot);
1120            }
1121            else {
1122               	newSchemaInfo = constructTrees(newSchemaRoot, schemaHint, fSchemaGrammarDescription, importCollision);
1123            }
1124 
1125            if (localName.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_REDEFINE) &&
1126                    newSchemaInfo != null) {
1127                // must record which schema we're redefining so that we can
1128                // rename the right things later!
1129                fRedefine2XSDMap.put(child, newSchemaInfo);
1130            }
1131            if (newSchemaRoot != null) {
1132                if (newSchemaInfo != null)
1133                    dependencies.addElement(newSchemaInfo);
1134                newSchemaRoot = null;
1135            }
1136        }
1137        
1138        fDependencyMap.put(currSchemaInfo, dependencies);
1139        return currSchemaInfo;
1140    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void getImportComponentType(XSDocumentInfo currSchemaInfo,
            SchemaGrammar sg, Element child, String localName,
            Object[] importAttrs, Element importChild) {
        String importComponentType = DOMUtil.getLocalName(importChild);
        if (importComponentType.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_ANNOTATION)) {
            // promoting annotations to parent component
            sg.addAnnotation(
                    fElementTraverser.traverseAnnotationDecl(importChild, importAttrs, true, currSchemaInfo));
        } else {
            reportSchemaError("s4s-elt-must-match.1", new Object [] {localName, "annotation?", importComponentType}, child);
        }
        if(DOMUtil.getNextSiblingElement(importChild) != null) {
            reportSchemaError("s4s-elt-must-match.1", new Object [] {localName, "annotation?", DOMUtil.getLocalName(DOMUtil.getNextSiblingElement(importChild))}, child);
        }
    }

777protected XSDocumentInfo constructTrees(Element schemaRoot, String locationHint, XSDDescription desc, boolean nsCollision) {
778        if (schemaRoot == null) return null;
779        String callerTNS = desc.getTargetNamespace();
780        short referType = desc.getContextType();
781        
782        XSDocumentInfo currSchemaInfo = null;
783        try {
784            // note that attributes are freed at end of traverseSchemas()
785            currSchemaInfo = new XSDocumentInfo(schemaRoot, fAttributeChecker, fSymbolTable);
786        } catch (XMLSchemaException se) {
787            reportSchemaError(ELE_ERROR_CODES[referType],
788                    new Object[]{locationHint},
789					  schemaRoot);
790            return null;
791        }
792        // targetNamespace="" is not valid, issue a warning, and ignore it
793        if (currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace != null &&
794                currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace.length() == 0) {
795            reportSchemaWarning("EmptyTargetNamespace",
796                    new Object[]{locationHint},
797					schemaRoot);
798            currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace = null;
799        }
800        
801        if (callerTNS != null) {
802            // the second index to the NS_ERROR_CODES array
803            // if the caller/expected NS is not absent, we use the first column
804            int secondIdx = 0;
805            // for include and redefine
806            if (referType == XSDDescription.CONTEXT_INCLUDE ||
807                    referType == XSDDescription.CONTEXT_REDEFINE) {
808                // if the referred document has no targetNamespace,
809                // it's a chameleon schema
810                if (currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace == null) {
811                    currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace = callerTNS;
812                    currSchemaInfo.fIsChameleonSchema = true;
813                }
814                // if the referred document has a target namespace differing
815                // from the caller, it's an error
816                else if (callerTNS != currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace) {
817                    reportSchemaError(NS_ERROR_CODES[referType][secondIdx],
818                            new Object [] {callerTNS, currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace},
819							schemaRoot);
820                    return null;
821                }
822            }
823            // for instance and import, the two NS's must be the same
824            else if (referType != XSDDescription.CONTEXT_PREPARSE && callerTNS != currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace) {
825                reportSchemaError(NS_ERROR_CODES[referType][secondIdx],
826                        new Object [] {callerTNS, currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace},
827						schemaRoot);
828                return null;
829            }
830        }
831        // now there is no caller/expected NS, it's an error for the referred
832        // document to have a target namespace, unless we are preparsing a schema
833        else if (currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace != null) {
834            // set the target namespace of the description
835            if (referType == XSDDescription.CONTEXT_PREPARSE) {
836                desc.setTargetNamespace(currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace);
837                callerTNS = currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace;
838            }
839            else {
840                // the second index to the NS_ERROR_CODES array
841                // if the caller/expected NS is absent, we use the second column
842                int secondIdx = 1;
843                reportSchemaError(NS_ERROR_CODES[referType][secondIdx],
844                        new Object [] {callerTNS, currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace},
845						schemaRoot);
846                return null;
847            }
848        }
849        // the other cases (callerTNS == currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespce == null)
850        // are valid
851        
852        // a schema document can always access it's own target namespace
853        currSchemaInfo.addAllowedNS(currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace);
854        
855        SchemaGrammar sg = null;
856 
857        // we have a namespace collision
858        if (nsCollision) {
859            SchemaGrammar sg2 = fGrammarBucket.getGrammar(currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace);
860            if (sg2.isImmutable()) {
861                sg = new SchemaGrammar(sg2);
862                fGrammarBucket.putGrammar(sg);
863                // update all the grammars in the bucket to point to the new grammar.
864                updateImportListWith(sg);
865            }
866            else {
867                sg = sg2;
868            }
869 
870            // update import list of the new grammar
871            updateImportListFor(sg);
872        }
873        else if (referType == XSDDescription.CONTEXT_INCLUDE ||
874                referType == XSDDescription.CONTEXT_REDEFINE) {
875            sg = fGrammarBucket.getGrammar(currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace);
876        }
877        else if(fHonourAllSchemaLocations && referType == XSDDescription.CONTEXT_IMPORT) {
878            sg = findGrammar(desc, false);
879            if(sg == null) {
880                sg = new SchemaGrammar(currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace, desc.makeClone(), fSymbolTable);
881                fGrammarBucket.putGrammar(sg);
882            }
883        }
884        else {
885            sg = new SchemaGrammar(currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace, desc.makeClone(), fSymbolTable);
886            fGrammarBucket.putGrammar(sg);
887        }
888 
889        // store the document and its location
890        // REVISIT: don't expose the DOM tree
891        sg.addDocument(null, (String)fDoc2SystemId.get(currSchemaInfo.fSchemaElement));
892        
893        fDoc2XSDocumentMap.put(schemaRoot, currSchemaInfo);
894        Vector dependencies = new Vector();
895        Element rootNode = schemaRoot;
896        
897        Element newSchemaRoot = null;
898        for (Element child = DOMUtil.getFirstChildElement(rootNode);
899        child != null;
900        child = DOMUtil.getNextSiblingElement(child)) {
901            String schemaNamespace=null;
902            String schemaHint=null;
903            String localName = DOMUtil.getLocalName(child);
904            
905            short refType = -1;
906            boolean importCollision = false;
907            
908            if (localName.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_ANNOTATION))
909                continue;
910            else if (localName.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_IMPORT)) {
911                refType = XSDDescription.CONTEXT_IMPORT;
912                // have to handle some validation here too!
913                // call XSAttributeChecker to fill in attrs
914                Object[] importAttrs = fAttributeChecker.checkAttributes(child, true, currSchemaInfo);
915                schemaHint = (String)importAttrs[XSAttributeChecker.ATTIDX_SCHEMALOCATION];
916                schemaNamespace = (String)importAttrs[XSAttributeChecker.ATTIDX_NAMESPACE];
917                if (schemaNamespace != null)
918                    schemaNamespace = fSymbolTable.addSymbol(schemaNamespace);
919                
920                // check contents and process optional annotations
921                Element importChild = DOMUtil.getFirstChildElement(child);
922                if(importChild != null ) {
923                    String importComponentType = DOMUtil.getLocalName(importChild);
924                    if (importComponentType.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_ANNOTATION)) {
925                        // promoting annotations to parent component
926                        sg.addAnnotation(
927                                fElementTraverser.traverseAnnotationDecl(importChild, importAttrs, true, currSchemaInfo));
928                    } else {
929                        reportSchemaError("s4s-elt-must-match.1", new Object [] {localName, "annotation?", importComponentType}, child);
930                    }
931                    if(DOMUtil.getNextSiblingElement(importChild) != null) {
932                        reportSchemaError("s4s-elt-must-match.1", new Object [] {localName, "annotation?", DOMUtil.getLocalName(DOMUtil.getNextSiblingElement(importChild))}, child);
933                    }

935                else {
936                    String text = DOMUtil.getSyntheticAnnotation(child);
937                    if (text != null) {

939                    }
940                }
941                fAttributeChecker.returnAttrArray(importAttrs, currSchemaInfo);
942                
943                // a document can't import another document with the same namespace
944                if (schemaNamespace == currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace) {
945                    reportSchemaError(schemaNamespace != null ? 
946                            "src-import.1.1" : "src-import.1.2", new Object [] {schemaNamespace}, child);
947                    continue;
948                }
949 
950                // if this namespace has not been imported by this document,
951                //  then import if multiple imports support is enabled.
952                if(currSchemaInfo.isAllowedNS(schemaNamespace)) {
953                    if(!fHonourAllSchemaLocations && !fNamespaceGrowth)
954                        continue;
955                }
956                else  {
957                    currSchemaInfo.addAllowedNS(schemaNamespace);
958                }
959                // also record the fact that one namespace imports another one
960                // convert null to ""
961                String tns = null2EmptyString(currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace);
962                // get all namespaces imported by this one
963                Vector ins = (Vector)fImportMap.get(tns);
964                // if no namespace was imported, create new Vector
965                if (ins == null) {
966                    // record that this one imports other(s)
967                    fAllTNSs.addElement(tns);
968                    ins = new Vector();
969                    fImportMap.put(tns, ins);
970                    ins.addElement(schemaNamespace);
971                }
972                else if (!ins.contains(schemaNamespace)){
973                    ins.addElement(schemaNamespace);
974                }
975 
976                fSchemaGrammarDescription.reset();
977                fSchemaGrammarDescription.setContextType(XSDDescription.CONTEXT_IMPORT);
978                fSchemaGrammarDescription.setBaseSystemId(doc2SystemId(schemaRoot));
979                fSchemaGrammarDescription.setLiteralSystemId(schemaHint);
980                fSchemaGrammarDescription.setLocationHints(new String[]{schemaHint});
981                fSchemaGrammarDescription.setTargetNamespace(schemaNamespace);
982                
983                // if a grammar with the same namespace and location exists (or being
984                // built), ignore this one (don't traverse it).
985                SchemaGrammar isg = findGrammar(fSchemaGrammarDescription, fNamespaceGrowth);
986                if (isg != null) {
987                    if (fNamespaceGrowth) {
988                        try {
989                            if (isg.getDocumentLocations().contains(XMLEntityManager.expandSystemId(schemaHint, fSchemaGrammarDescription.getBaseSystemId(), false))) {
990                                continue;
991                            }
992                            else {

994                            }
995                        } 
996                        catch (MalformedURIException e) {
997                        }
998                    }

1002                }

1009                // otherwise the location will be ignored because it'll get

1011                newSchemaRoot = resolveSchema(fSchemaGrammarDescription, false, child, isg == null);
