1014                    (localName.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_REDEFINE))) {
1015                // validation for redefine/include will be the same here; just
1016                // make sure TNS is right (don't care about redef contents
1017                // yet).
1018                Object[] includeAttrs = fAttributeChecker.checkAttributes(child, true, currSchemaInfo);
1019                schemaHint = (String)includeAttrs[XSAttributeChecker.ATTIDX_SCHEMALOCATION];
1020                // store the namespace decls of the redefine element
1021                if (localName.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_REDEFINE)) {
1022                    fRedefine2NSSupport.put(child, new SchemaNamespaceSupport(currSchemaInfo.fNamespaceSupport));
1023                }
1024                
1025                // check annotations.  Must do this here to avoid having to
1026                // re-parse attributes later
1027                if(localName.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_INCLUDE)) {
1028                    Element includeChild = DOMUtil.getFirstChildElement(child);
1029                    if(includeChild != null ) {
1030                        String includeComponentType = DOMUtil.getLocalName(includeChild);
1031                        if (includeComponentType.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_ANNOTATION)) {
1032                            // promoting annotations to parent component
1033                            sg.addAnnotation(
1034                                    fElementTraverser.traverseAnnotationDecl(includeChild, includeAttrs, true, currSchemaInfo));
1035                        } else {
1036                            reportSchemaError("s4s-elt-must-match.1", new Object [] {localName, "annotation?", includeComponentType}, child);
1037                        }
1038                        if(DOMUtil.getNextSiblingElement(includeChild) != null) {
1039                            reportSchemaError("s4s-elt-must-match.1", new Object [] {localName, "annotation?", DOMUtil.getLocalName(DOMUtil.getNextSiblingElement(includeChild))}, child);
1040                        }
1041                    }
1042                    else {
1043                        String text = DOMUtil.getSyntheticAnnotation(child);
1044                        if (text != null) {
1045                            sg.addAnnotation(fElementTraverser.traverseSyntheticAnnotation(child, text, includeAttrs, true, currSchemaInfo));
1046                        }
1047                    }
1048                }
1049                else {
1050                    for (Element redefinedChild = DOMUtil.getFirstChildElement(child);
1051                    redefinedChild != null;
1052                    redefinedChild = DOMUtil.getNextSiblingElement(redefinedChild)) {
1053                        String redefinedComponentType = DOMUtil.getLocalName(redefinedChild);
1054                        if (redefinedComponentType.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_ANNOTATION)) {
1055                            // promoting annotations to parent component
1056                            sg.addAnnotation(
1057                                    fElementTraverser.traverseAnnotationDecl(redefinedChild, includeAttrs, true, currSchemaInfo));
1058                            DOMUtil.setHidden(redefinedChild, fHiddenNodes);
1059                        }
1060                        else {
1061                            String text = DOMUtil.getSyntheticAnnotation(child);
1062                            if (text != null) {
1063                                sg.addAnnotation(fElementTraverser.traverseSyntheticAnnotation(child, text, includeAttrs, true, currSchemaInfo));
1064                            }
1065                        }
1066                        // catch all other content errors later
1067                    }
1068                }
1069                fAttributeChecker.returnAttrArray(includeAttrs, currSchemaInfo);
1070                // schemaLocation is required on <include> and <redefine>
1071                if (schemaHint == null) {
1072                    reportSchemaError("s4s-att-must-appear", new Object [] {
1073                            "<include> or <redefine>", "schemaLocation"},
1074                            child);
1075                }
1076                // pass the systemId of the current document as the base systemId
1077                boolean mustResolve = false;
1078                refType = XSDDescription.CONTEXT_INCLUDE;
1079                if(localName.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_REDEFINE)) {
1080                    mustResolve = nonAnnotationContent(child);
1081                    refType = XSDDescription.CONTEXT_REDEFINE;
1082                }
1083                fSchemaGrammarDescription.reset();
1084                fSchemaGrammarDescription.setContextType(refType);
1085                fSchemaGrammarDescription.setBaseSystemId(doc2SystemId(schemaRoot));
1086                fSchemaGrammarDescription.setLocationHints(new String[]{schemaHint});
1087                fSchemaGrammarDescription.setTargetNamespace(callerTNS);
1088                
1089                boolean alreadyTraversed = false;
1090                XMLInputSource schemaSource = resolveSchemaSource(fSchemaGrammarDescription, mustResolve, child, true);
1091                if (fNamespaceGrowth && refType == XSDDescription.CONTEXT_INCLUDE) {
1092                    try {
1093                        final String schemaId = XMLEntityManager.expandSystemId(schemaSource.getSystemId(), schemaSource.getBaseSystemId(), false);
1094                        alreadyTraversed = sg.getDocumentLocations().contains(schemaId);
1095                    }
1096                    catch(MalformedURIException e) {
1097                        
1098                    }
1099                }
1100 
1101                if (!alreadyTraversed) {
1102                    newSchemaRoot = resolveSchema(schemaSource, fSchemaGrammarDescription, mustResolve, child);
1103                    schemaNamespace = currSchemaInfo.fTargetNamespace;
1104                }
1105                else {
1106                    fLastSchemaWasDuplicate = true;
1107                }
1108            }
1109            else {
1110                // no more possibility of schema references in well-formed
1111                // schema...
1112                break;
1113            }
1114            
1115            // If the schema is duplicate, we needn't call constructTrees() again.
1116            // To handle mutual <include>s
1117            XSDocumentInfo newSchemaInfo = null;
1118            if (fLastSchemaWasDuplicate) {
1119                newSchemaInfo = newSchemaRoot == null ? null : (XSDocumentInfo)fDoc2XSDocumentMap.get(newSchemaRoot);
1120            }
1121            else {
1122               	newSchemaInfo = constructTrees(newSchemaRoot, schemaHint, fSchemaGrammarDescription, importCollision);
1123            }
1124 
1125            if (localName.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_REDEFINE) &&
1126                    newSchemaInfo != null) {
1127                // must record which schema we're redefining so that we can
1128                // rename the right things later!
1129                fRedefine2XSDMap.put(child, newSchemaInfo);
1130            }
1131            if (newSchemaRoot != null) {
1132                if (newSchemaInfo != null)
1133                    dependencies.addElement(newSchemaInfo);
1134                newSchemaRoot = null;
1135            }
1136        }
1137        
1138        fDependencyMap.put(currSchemaInfo, dependencies);
1139        return currSchemaInfo;
1140    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void getIncludeComponentType(XSDocumentInfo currSchemaInfo,
            SchemaGrammar sg, Element child, String localName,
            Object[] includeAttrs, Element includeChild) {
        String includeComponentType = DOMUtil.getLocalName(includeChild);
        if (includeComponentType.equals(SchemaSymbols.ELT_ANNOTATION)) {
            // promoting annotations to parent component
            sg.addAnnotation(
                    fElementTraverser.traverseAnnotationDecl(includeChild, includeAttrs, true, currSchemaInfo));
        } else {
            reportSchemaError("s4s-elt-must-match.1", new Object [] {localName, "annotation?", includeComponentType}, child);
        }
        if(DOMUtil.getNextSiblingElement(includeChild) != null) {
            reportSchemaError("s4s-elt-must-match.1", new Object [] {localName, "annotation?", DOMUtil.getLocalName(DOMUtil.getNextSiblingElement(includeChild))}, child);
        }
    }

217private MethodHandle ensureTarget4() {
218        MethodHandle target4;
219        if (!initialized4) {
220            Supplier<MethodHandle> maker4 = this.maker4;
221            if (maker4 == null) {
222                target4 = null;
223            } else {
224                target4 = maker4.get();
225            }
226            this.target4 = target4;
227            initialized4 = true;
228            this.maker4 = null;
229        }
230        return this.target4;
231    }

255@Override
256  public PostingsEnum postings(
257      FieldInfo fieldInfo, BlockTermState termState, PostingsEnum reuse, int flags)
258      throws IOException {
259 
260    boolean indexHasPositions =
261        fieldInfo.getIndexOptions().compareTo(IndexOptions.DOCS_AND_FREQS_AND_POSITIONS) >= 0;
262 
263    if (indexHasPositions == false
264        || PostingsEnum.featureRequested(flags, PostingsEnum.POSITIONS) == false) {
265      BlockDocsEnum docsEnum;
266      if (reuse instanceof BlockDocsEnum) {
267        docsEnum = (BlockDocsEnum) reuse;
268        if (!docsEnum.canReuse(docIn, fieldInfo)) {
269          docsEnum = new BlockDocsEnum(fieldInfo);
270        }
271      } else {
272        docsEnum = new BlockDocsEnum(fieldInfo);
273      }
274      return docsEnum.reset((IntBlockTermState) termState, flags);
275    } else {
276      EverythingEnum everythingEnum;
277      if (reuse instanceof EverythingEnum) {
278        everythingEnum = (EverythingEnum) reuse;
279        if (!everythingEnum.canReuse(docIn, fieldInfo)) {
280          everythingEnum = new EverythingEnum(fieldInfo);
281        }
282      } else {
283        everythingEnum = new EverythingEnum(fieldInfo);
284      }
285      return everythingEnum.reset((IntBlockTermState) termState, flags);
286    }
287  }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private PostingsEnum getDocsEnum(FieldInfo fieldInfo, BlockTermState termState, PostingsEnum reuse, int flags) throws IOException {
    BlockDocsEnum docsEnum;
    if (reuse instanceof BlockDocsEnum) {
      docsEnum = (BlockDocsEnum) reuse;
      if (!docsEnum.canReuse(docIn, fieldInfo)) {
        docsEnum = new BlockDocsEnum(fieldInfo);
      }
    } else {
      docsEnum = new BlockDocsEnum(fieldInfo);
    }
    return docsEnum.reset((IntBlockTermState) termState, flags);
  }

private PostingsEnum getEverythingEnum(FieldInfo fieldInfo, BlockTermState termState, PostingsEnum reuse, int flags) throws IOException {
    EverythingEnum everythingEnum;
    if (reuse instanceof EverythingEnum) {
      everythingEnum = (EverythingEnum) reuse;
      if (!everythingEnum.canReuse(docIn, fieldInfo)) {
        everythingEnum = new EverythingEnum(fieldInfo);
      }

      everythingEnum = new EverythingEnum(fieldInfo);

146@Override
147    public ChannelHandlerContext fireChannelRegistered() {
148        AbstractChannelHandlerContext next = findContextInbound(MASK_CHANNEL_REGISTERED);
149        if (next.executor().inEventLoop()) {
150            if (next.invokeHandler()) {
151                try {
152                    // DON'T CHANGE
153                    // Duplex handlers implements both out/in interfaces causing a scalability issue
154                    // see https://bugs.openjdk.org/browse/JDK-8180450
155                    final ChannelHandler handler = next.handler();
156                    final DefaultChannelPipeline.HeadContext headContext = pipeline.head;
157                    if (handler == headContext) {
158                        headContext.channelRegistered(next);
159                    } else if (handler instanceof ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter) {
160                        ((ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter) handler).channelRegistered(next);
161                    } else {
162                        ((ChannelInboundHandler) handler).channelRegistered(next);
163                    }
164                } catch (Throwable t) {
165                    next.invokeExceptionCaught(t);
166                }
167            } else {
168                next.fireChannelRegistered();
169            }
170        } else {
171            next.executor().execute(this::fireChannelRegistered);
172        }
173        return this;
174    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(AbstractChannelHandlerContext next) {
        if (next.invokeHandler()) {
            try {
                // DON'T CHANGE
                // Duplex handlers implements both out/in interfaces causing a scalability issue
                // see https://bugs.openjdk.org/browse/JDK-8180450
                final ChannelHandler handler = next.handler();
                final DefaultChannelPipeline.HeadContext headContext = pipeline.head;
                if (handler == headContext) {
                    headContext.channelRegistered(next);
                } else if (handler instanceof ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter) {
                    ((ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter) handler).channelRegistered(next);
                } else {
                    ((ChannelInboundHandler) handler).channelRegistered(next);
                }
            } catch (Throwable t) {
                next.invokeExceptionCaught(t);
            }
        } else {
            next.fireChannelRegistered();
        }
    }

206@Override
207    public ChannelHandlerContext fireChannelActive() {
208        AbstractChannelHandlerContext next = findContextInbound(MASK_CHANNEL_ACTIVE);
209        if (next.executor().inEventLoop()) {
210            if (next.invokeHandler()) {
211                try {
212                    // DON'T CHANGE
213                    // Duplex handlers implements both out/in interfaces causing a scalability issue
214                    // see https://bugs.openjdk.org/browse/JDK-8180450
215                    final ChannelHandler handler = next.handler();
216                    final DefaultChannelPipeline.HeadContext headContext = pipeline.head;
217                    if (handler == headContext) {
218                        headContext.channelActive(next);
219                    } else if (handler instanceof ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter) {
220                        ((ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter) handler).channelActive(next);
221                    } else {
222                        ((ChannelInboundHandler) handler).channelActive(next);
223                    }
224                } catch (Throwable t) {
225                    next.invokeExceptionCaught(t);
226                }
227            } else {
228                next.fireChannelActive();
229            }
230        } else {
231            next.executor().execute(this::fireChannelActive);
232        }
233        return this;
234    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(AbstractChannelHandlerContext next) {
        if (next.invokeHandler()) {
            try {
                // DON'T CHANGE
                // Duplex handlers implements both out/in interfaces causing a scalability issue
                // see https://bugs.openjdk.org/browse/JDK-8180450
                final ChannelHandler handler = next.handler();
                final DefaultChannelPipeline.HeadContext headContext = pipeline.head;
                if (handler == headContext) {
                    headContext.channelActive(next);
                } else if (handler instanceof ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter) {
                    ((ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter) handler).channelActive(next);
                } else {
                    ((ChannelInboundHandler) handler).channelActive(next);
                }
            } catch (Throwable t) {
                next.invokeExceptionCaught(t);
            }
        } else {
            next.fireChannelActive();
        }
    }

64@Override
65    public Integer doProcessWatchCall() throws Exception {
66        List<Row> rows = new ArrayList<>();
67 
68        List<Long> pids = findPids(name);
69        ProcessHandle.allProcesses()
70                .filter(ph -> pids.contains(ph.pid()))
71                .forEach(ph -> {
72                    JsonObject root = loadStatus(ph.pid());
73                    if (root != null) {
74                        Row row = new Row();
75                        row.pid = Long.toString(ph.pid());
76                        JsonObject context = (JsonObject) root.get("context");
77                        if (context == null) {
78                            return;
79                        }
80                        row.name = context.getString("name");
81                        if ("CamelJBang".equals(row.name)) {
82                            row.name = ProcessHelper.extractName(root, ph);
83                        }
84                        JsonObject vaults = (JsonObject) root.get("vaults");
85                        if (vaults != null) {
86                            JsonObject aws = (JsonObject) vaults.get("aws-secrets");
87                            if (aws != null) {
88                                row.vault = "AWS";
89                                row.region = aws.getString("region");
90                                row.lastCheck = aws.getLongOrDefault("lastCheckTimestamp", 0);
91                                row.lastReload = aws.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
92                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) aws.get("secrets");
93                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
94                                    if (i > 0) {
95                                        // create a copy for 2+ secrets
96                                        row = row.copy();
97                                    }
98                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
99                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
100                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
101                                    rows.add(row);
102                                }
103                            }
104                            JsonObject gcp = (JsonObject) vaults.get("gcp-secrets");
105                            if (gcp != null) {
106                                row.vault = "GCP";
107                                row.lastCheck = gcp.getLongOrDefault("lastCheckTimestamp", 0);
108                                row.lastReload = gcp.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
109                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) gcp.get("secrets");
110                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
111                                    if (i > 0) {
112                                        // create a copy for 2+ secrets
113                                        row = row.copy();
114                                    }
115                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
116                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
117                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
118                                    rows.add(row);
119                                }
120                            }
121                            JsonObject azure = (JsonObject) vaults.get("azure-secrets");
122                            if (azure != null) {
123                                row.vault = "Azure";
124                                row.lastCheck = azure.getLongOrDefault("lastCheckTimestamp", 0);
125                                row.lastReload = azure.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
126                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) azure.get("secrets");
127                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
128                                    if (i > 0) {
129                                        // create a copy for 2+ secrets
130                                        row = row.copy();
131                                    }
132                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
133                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
134                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
135                                    rows.add(row);
136                                }
137                            }
138 
139                            JsonObject kubernetes = (JsonObject) vaults.get("kubernetes-secrets");
140                            if (kubernetes != null) {
141                                row.vault = "Kubernetes";
142                                row.lastCheck = kubernetes.getLongOrDefault("startCheckTimestamp", 0);
143                                row.lastReload = kubernetes.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
144                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) kubernetes.get("secrets");
145                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
146                                    if (i > 0) {
147                                        // create a copy for 2+ secrets
148                                        row = row.copy();
149                                    }
150                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
151                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
152                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
153                                    rows.add(row);
154                                }
155                            }
156 
157                            JsonObject hashicorp = (JsonObject) vaults.get("hashicorp-secrets");
158                            if (hashicorp != null) {
159                                row.vault = "Hashicorp";
160                                row.lastCheck = hashicorp.getLongOrDefault("startCheckTimestamp", 0);
161                                row.lastReload = hashicorp.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
162                                rows.add(row);
163                            }
164 
165                            JsonObject cmKubernetes = (JsonObject) vaults.get("kubernetes-configmaps");
166                            if (cmKubernetes != null) {
167                                row.vault = "Kubernetes-cm";
168                                row.lastCheck = cmKubernetes.getLongOrDefault("startCheckTimestamp", 0);
169                                row.lastReload = cmKubernetes.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
170                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) cmKubernetes.get("configmap");
171                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
172                                    if (i > 0) {
173                                        // create a copy for 2+ configmap
174                                        row = row.copy();
175                                    }
176                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
177                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
178                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
179                                    rows.add(row);
180                                }
181                            }
182                        }
183                    }
184                });
185 
186        // sort rows
187        rows.sort(this::sortRow);
188 
189        if (!rows.isEmpty()) {
190            printer().println(AsciiTable.getTable(AsciiTable.NO_BORDERS, rows, Arrays.asList(
191                    new Column().header("PID").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.CENTER).with(r -> r.pid),
192                    new Column().header("NAME").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).maxWidth(40, OverflowBehaviour.ELLIPSIS_RIGHT)
193                            .with(r -> r.name),
194                    new Column().header("VAULT").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).with(r -> r.vault),
195                    new Column().header("REGION").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).with(r -> r.region),
196                    new Column().header("SECRET").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).maxWidth(40, OverflowBehaviour.ELLIPSIS_RIGHT)
197                            .with(r -> r.secret),
198                    new Column().header("AGE").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.CENTER).with(this::getAgo),
199                    new Column().header("UPDATE").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).with(this::getReloadAgo),
200                    new Column().header("CHECK").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).with(this::getCheckAgo))));
201        }
202 
203        return 0;
204    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void processGcpVault(JsonObject gcp, Row row, List<Row> rows) {
    if (gcp != null) {
        row.vault = "GCP";
        row.lastCheck = gcp.getLongOrDefault("lastCheckTimestamp", 0);
        row.lastReload = gcp.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
        JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) gcp.get("secrets");
        for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
            if (i > 0) {
                row = row.copy();
            }
            JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
            row.secret = jo.getString("name");
            row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
            rows.add(row);
        }
    }
}

64@Override
65    public Integer doProcessWatchCall() throws Exception {
66        List<Row> rows = new ArrayList<>();
67 
68        List<Long> pids = findPids(name);
69        ProcessHandle.allProcesses()
70                .filter(ph -> pids.contains(ph.pid()))
71                .forEach(ph -> {
72                    JsonObject root = loadStatus(ph.pid());
73                    if (root != null) {
74                        Row row = new Row();
75                        row.pid = Long.toString(ph.pid());
76                        JsonObject context = (JsonObject) root.get("context");
77                        if (context == null) {
78                            return;
79                        }
80                        row.name = context.getString("name");
81                        if ("CamelJBang".equals(row.name)) {
82                            row.name = ProcessHelper.extractName(root, ph);
83                        }
84                        JsonObject vaults = (JsonObject) root.get("vaults");
85                        if (vaults != null) {
86                            JsonObject aws = (JsonObject) vaults.get("aws-secrets");
87                            if (aws != null) {
88                                row.vault = "AWS";
89                                row.region = aws.getString("region");
90                                row.lastCheck = aws.getLongOrDefault("lastCheckTimestamp", 0);
91                                row.lastReload = aws.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
92                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) aws.get("secrets");
93                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
94                                    if (i > 0) {
95                                        // create a copy for 2+ secrets
96                                        row = row.copy();
97                                    }
98                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
99                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
100                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
101                                    rows.add(row);
102                                }
103                            }
104                            JsonObject gcp = (JsonObject) vaults.get("gcp-secrets");

private void processKubernetesConfigMap(JsonObject cmKubernetes, Row row, List<Row> rows) {
    if (cmKubernetes != null) {
        row.vault = "Kubernetes-cm";
        row.lastCheck = cmKubernetes.getLongOrDefault("startCheckTimestamp", 0);
        row.lastReload = cmKubernetes.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
        JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) cmKubernetes.get("configmap");
        for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
            if (i > 0) {
                row = row.copy();
            }
            JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
            row.secret = jo.getString("name");
            row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
            rows.add(row);
        }
    }
}

public String extractedClone(CamelContext context, ConcurrentMap<String, String> requestedUriToStream, String uri)

Original Clone: 
193@Override
194    public Publisher<Exchange> to(String uri, Object data) {
195        String streamName = requestedUriToStream.computeIfAbsent(uri, camelUri -> {
196            try {
197                String uuid = context.getUuidGenerator().generateUuid();
198                RouteBuilder.addRoutes(context, rb -> rb.from("reactive-streams:" + uuid).to(camelUri));
199 
200                return uuid;
201            } catch (Exception e) {
202                throw new IllegalStateException("Unable to create requested reactive stream from direct URI: " + uri, e);
203            }
204        });
205 
206        return toStream(streamName, data);
207    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
None

148@Override
149    public Publisher<Exchange> from(String uri) {
150        final String name = publishedUriToStream.computeIfAbsent(uri, camelUri -> {
151            try {
152                String uuid = context.getUuidGenerator().generateUuid();
153 
154                RouteBuilder.addRoutes(context, rb -> rb.from(camelUri).to("reactive-streams:" + uuid));
155 
156                return uuid;
157            } catch (Exception e) {
158                throw new IllegalStateException("Unable to create source reactive stream from direct URI: " + uri, e);
159            }
160        });
161 
162        return fromStream(name);
163    }

Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void processAwsVault(JsonObject aws, Row row, List<Row> rows) {
    if (aws != null) {
        row.vault = "AWS";
        row.region = aws.getString("region");
        row.lastCheck = aws.getLongOrDefault("lastCheckTimestamp", 0);
        row.lastReload = aws.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
        JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) aws.get("secrets");
        for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
            if (i > 0) {
                row = row.copy();
            }
            JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
            row.secret = jo.getString("name");
            row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
            rows.add(row);
        }
    }
}

64@Override
65    public Integer doProcessWatchCall() throws Exception {
66        List<Row> rows = new ArrayList<>();
67 
68        List<Long> pids = findPids(name);
69        ProcessHandle.allProcesses()
70                .filter(ph -> pids.contains(ph.pid()))
71                .forEach(ph -> {
72                    JsonObject root = loadStatus(ph.pid());
73                    if (root != null) {
74                        Row row = new Row();
75                        row.pid = Long.toString(ph.pid());
76                        JsonObject context = (JsonObject) root.get("context");
77                        if (context == null) {
78                            return;
79                        }
80                        row.name = context.getString("name");
81                        if ("CamelJBang".equals(row.name)) {
82                            row.name = ProcessHelper.extractName(root, ph);
83                        }
84                        JsonObject vaults = (JsonObject) root.get("vaults");
85                        if (vaults != null) {
86                            JsonObject aws = (JsonObject) vaults.get("aws-secrets");
87                            if (aws != null) {
88                                row.vault = "AWS";

92                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) aws.get("secrets");

95                                        // create a copy for 2+ secrets
96                                        row = row.copy();
97                                    }

105                            if (gcp != null) {
106                                row.vault = "GCP";
107                                row.lastCheck = gcp.getLongOrDefault("lastCheckTimestamp", 0);
108                                row.lastReload = gcp.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
109                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) gcp.get("secrets");
110                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
111                                    if (i > 0) {
112                                        // create a copy for 2+ secrets
113                                        row = row.copy();
114                                    }
115                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
116                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
117                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
118                                    rows.add(row);
119                                }
120                            }
121                            JsonObject azure = (JsonObject) vaults.get("azure-secrets");
122                            if (azure != null) {
123                                row.vault = "Azure";
124                                row.lastCheck = azure.getLongOrDefault("lastCheckTimestamp", 0);
125                                row.lastReload = azure.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
126                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) azure.get("secrets");
127                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
128                                    if (i > 0) {
129                                        // create a copy for 2+ secrets
130                                        row = row.copy();
131                                    }
132                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
133                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
134                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
135                                    rows.add(row);
136                                }
137                            }
138 
139                            JsonObject kubernetes = (JsonObject) vaults.get("kubernetes-secrets");
140                            if (kubernetes != null) {
141                                row.vault = "Kubernetes";
142                                row.lastCheck = kubernetes.getLongOrDefault("startCheckTimestamp", 0);
143                                row.lastReload = kubernetes.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
144                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) kubernetes.get("secrets");
145                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
146                                    if (i > 0) {
147                                        // create a copy for 2+ secrets
148                                        row = row.copy();
149                                    }
150                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
151                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
152                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
153                                    rows.add(row);
154                                }
155                            }
156 
157                            JsonObject hashicorp = (JsonObject) vaults.get("hashicorp-secrets");
158                            if (hashicorp != null) {
159                                row.vault = "Hashicorp";
160                                row.lastCheck = hashicorp.getLongOrDefault("startCheckTimestamp", 0);
161                                row.lastReload = hashicorp.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
162                                rows.add(row);
163                            }
164 
165                            JsonObject cmKubernetes = (JsonObject) vaults.get("kubernetes-configmaps");
166                            if (cmKubernetes != null) {
167                                row.vault = "Kubernetes-cm";
168                                row.lastCheck = cmKubernetes.getLongOrDefault("startCheckTimestamp", 0);
169                                row.lastReload = cmKubernetes.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
170                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) cmKubernetes.get("configmap");
171                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
172                                    if (i > 0) {
173                                        // create a copy for 2+ configmap
174                                        row = row.copy();
175                                    }
176                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
177                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
178                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
179                                    rows.add(row);
180                                }
181                            }
182                        }
183                    }
184                });
185 
186        // sort rows
187        rows.sort(this::sortRow);
188 
189        if (!rows.isEmpty()) {
190            printer().println(AsciiTable.getTable(AsciiTable.NO_BORDERS, rows, Arrays.asList(
191                    new Column().header("PID").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.CENTER).with(r -> r.pid),
192                    new Column().header("NAME").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).maxWidth(40, OverflowBehaviour.ELLIPSIS_RIGHT)
193                            .with(r -> r.name),
194                    new Column().header("VAULT").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).with(r -> r.vault),
195                    new Column().header("REGION").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).with(r -> r.region),
196                    new Column().header("SECRET").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).maxWidth(40, OverflowBehaviour.ELLIPSIS_RIGHT)
197                            .with(r -> r.secret),
198                    new Column().header("AGE").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.CENTER).with(this::getAgo),
199                    new Column().header("UPDATE").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).with(this::getReloadAgo),
200                    new Column().header("CHECK").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).with(this::getCheckAgo))));
201        }
202 
203        return 0;
204    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void processAzureVault(JsonObject azure, Row row, List<Row> rows) {
    if (azure != null) {
        row.vault = "Azure";
        row.lastCheck = azure.getLongOrDefault("lastCheckTimestamp", 0);
        row.lastReload = azure.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
        JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) azure.get("secrets");
        for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
            if (i > 0) {
                row = row.copy();
            }
            JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
            row.secret = jo.getString("name");
            row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
            rows.add(row);
        }
    }
}

22static GroupingAggregatorFunction.AddInput wrapAddInput(
23        GroupingAggregatorFunction.AddInput delegate,
24        ValuesBytesRefAggregator.GroupingState state,
25        BytesRefBlock values
26    ) {
27        OrdinalBytesRefBlock valuesOrdinal = values.asOrdinals();
28        if (valuesOrdinal == null) {
29            return delegate;
30        }
31        final IntVector hashIds = hashDict(state, valuesOrdinal.getDictionaryVector());
32        IntBlock ordinalIds = valuesOrdinal.getOrdinalsBlock();
33        return new GroupingAggregatorFunction.AddInput() {
34            @Override
35            public void add(int positionOffset, IntArrayBlock groupIds) {
36                for (int groupPosition = 0; groupPosition < groupIds.getPositionCount(); groupPosition++) {
37                    if (groupIds.isNull(groupPosition)) {
38                        continue;
39                    }
40                    int groupStart = groupIds.getFirstValueIndex(groupPosition);
41                    int groupEnd = groupStart + groupIds.getValueCount(groupPosition);
42                    for (int g = groupStart; g < groupEnd; g++) {
43                        int groupId = groupIds.getInt(g);
44                        if (ordinalIds.isNull(groupPosition + positionOffset)) {
45                            continue;
46                        }
47                        int valuesStart = ordinalIds.getFirstValueIndex(groupPosition + positionOffset);
48                        int valuesEnd = valuesStart + ordinalIds.getValueCount(groupPosition + positionOffset);
49                        for (int v = valuesStart; v < valuesEnd; v++) {
50                            state.addValueOrdinal(groupId, hashIds.getInt(ordinalIds.getInt(v)));
51                        }
52                    }
53                }
54            }
55 
56            @Override
57            public void add(int positionOffset, IntBigArrayBlock groupIds) {
58                for (int groupPosition = 0; groupPosition < groupIds.getPositionCount(); groupPosition++) {
59                    if (groupIds.isNull(groupPosition)) {
60                        continue;
61                    }
62                    int groupStart = groupIds.getFirstValueIndex(groupPosition);
63                    int groupEnd = groupStart + groupIds.getValueCount(groupPosition);
64                    for (int g = groupStart; g < groupEnd; g++) {
65                        int groupId = groupIds.getInt(g);
66                        if (ordinalIds.isNull(groupPosition + positionOffset)) {
67                            continue;
68                        }
69                        int valuesStart = ordinalIds.getFirstValueIndex(groupPosition + positionOffset);
70                        int valuesEnd = valuesStart + ordinalIds.getValueCount(groupPosition + positionOffset);
71                        for (int v = valuesStart; v < valuesEnd; v++) {
72                            state.addValueOrdinal(groupId, hashIds.getInt(ordinalIds.getInt(v)));
73                        }
74                    }
75                }
76            }
77 
78            @Override
79            public void add(int positionOffset, IntVector groupIds) {
80                addOrdinalInputBlock(state, positionOffset, groupIds, ordinalIds, hashIds);
81            }
82 
83            @Override
84            public void close() {
85                Releasables.close(hashIds, delegate);
86            }
87        };
88    }

886private void handleSavePipesIterator() {
887        try {
888            // Read ExtensionConfig
889            int len = input.readInt();
890            byte[] bytes = new byte[len];
891            input.readFully(bytes);
892            
893            ExtensionConfig config;
894            try (ObjectInputStream ois = new ObjectInputStream(new UnsynchronizedByteArrayInputStream(bytes))) {
895                config = (ExtensionConfig) ois.readObject();
896            } catch (ClassNotFoundException e) {
897                throw new IOException("Failed to deserialize ExtensionConfig", e);
898            }
899            
900            // Save to ConfigStore
901            configStore.put(PIPES_ITERATOR_PREFIX + config.id(), config);
902            
903            // Send success response
904            output.writeByte(0); // success
905            byte[] msgBytes = "OK".getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
906            output.writeInt(msgBytes.length);
907            output.write(msgBytes);
908            output.flush();
909            
910            LOG.debug("pipesClientId={}: saved pipes iterator '{}'", pipesClientId, config.id());
911            
912        } catch (Exception e) {
913            LOG.error("pipesClientId={}: error saving pipes iterator", pipesClientId, e);
914            try {
915                output.writeByte(1); // error
916                byte[] msgBytes = e.getMessage().getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
917                output.writeInt(msgBytes.length);
918                output.write(msgBytes);
919                output.flush();
920            } catch (IOException ioException) {
921                LOG.error("pipesClientId={}: error sending error response", pipesClientId, ioException);
922            }
923        }
924    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code):

        LOG.error("pipesClientId={}: error saving pipes iterator", pipesClientId, e);
        try {
            output.writeByte(1); // error
            byte[] msgBytes = e.getMessage().getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
            output.writeInt(msgBytes.length);
            output.write(msgBytes);
            output.flush();
        } catch (IOException ioException) {
            LOG.error("pipesClientId={}: error sending error response", pipesClientId, ioException);
        }
    }

655private void handleDeleteFetcher() {
656        try {
657            // Read fetcher ID
658            int len = input.readInt();
659            byte[] bytes = new byte[len];
660            input.readFully(bytes);
661            String fetcherId = new String(bytes, StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
662            
663            // Delete the fetcher
664            fetcherManager.deleteFetcher(fetcherId);
665            LOG.debug("pipesClientId={}: deleted fetcher '{}'", pipesClientId, fetcherId);
666            
667            // Send success response
668            output.writeByte(0); // success
669            String msg = "Fetcher deleted successfully";
670            byte[] msgBytes = msg.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
671            output.writeInt(msgBytes.length);
672            output.write(msgBytes);
673            output.flush();
674            
675        } catch (Exception e) {
676            LOG.error("pipesClientId={}: error deleting fetcher", pipesClientId, e);
677            try {
678                output.writeByte(1); // error
679                String msg = ExceptionUtils.getStackTrace(e);
680                byte[] msgBytes = msg.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
681                output.writeInt(msgBytes.length);
682                output.write(msgBytes);
683                output.flush();
684            } catch (IOException ioe) {
685                LOG.error("pipesClientId={}: failed to send error response", pipesClientId, ioe);
686                exit(1);
687            }
688        }
689    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(Exception e) {
        LOG.error("pipesClientId={}: error deleting fetcher", pipesClientId, e);
        try {
            output.writeByte(1); // error
            String msg = ExceptionUtils.getStackTrace(e);
            byte[] msgBytes = msg.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
            output.writeInt(msgBytes.length);
            output.write(msgBytes);
            output.flush();
        } catch (IOException ioe) {
            LOG.error("pipesClientId={}: failed to send error response", pipesClientId, ioe);
            exit(1);
        }
    }

1653private static VectorExpressionWriter genVectorExpressionWritableUnion(
1654      SettableUnionObjectInspector fieldObjInspector) throws HiveException {
1655 
1656    return new VectorExpressionWriterMap() {
1657      private Object obj;
1658      private VectorExtractRow vectorExtractRow;
1659      private UnionTypeInfo unionTypeInfo;
1660 
1661      public VectorExpressionWriter init(SettableUnionObjectInspector objInspector) throws HiveException {
1662        super.init(objInspector);
1663        obj = initValue(null);
1664        vectorExtractRow = new VectorExtractRow();
1665        unionTypeInfo = (UnionTypeInfo)
1666            TypeInfoUtils.getTypeInfoFromTypeString(objInspector.getTypeName());
1667        return this;
1668      }
1669 
1670      @Override
1671      public Object initValue(Object ignored) {
1672        return ((SettableUnionObjectInspector) this.objectInspector).create();
1673      }
1674 
1675      @Override
1676      public Object writeValue(ColumnVector column, int row)
1677          throws HiveException {
1678 
1679        final UnionColumnVector unionColumnVector = (UnionColumnVector) column;
1680        final int tag = unionColumnVector.tags[row];
1681        final SettableUnionObjectInspector unionOI =
1682            (SettableUnionObjectInspector) this.objectInspector;
1683        ObjectInspector fieldOI = unionOI.getObjectInspectors().get(tag);
1684        ColumnVector fieldColVector = unionColumnVector.fields[tag];
1685        final Object value =
1686            vectorExtractRow.extractRowColumn(
1687                fieldColVector, unionTypeInfo.getAllUnionObjectTypeInfos().get(tag), fieldOI, row);
1688        if (value == null) {
1689          return null;
1690        }
1691 
1692        unionOI.setFieldAndTag(obj, value, (byte) tag);
1693        return obj;
1694      }
1695 
1696      @Override
1697      public Object setValue(Object union, ColumnVector column, int row)
1698          throws HiveException {
1699        if (union == null) {
1700          union = initValue(null);
1701        }
1702 
1703        final UnionColumnVector unionColumnVector = (UnionColumnVector) column;
1704        final int tag = unionColumnVector.tags[row];
1705        final SettableUnionObjectInspector unionOI =
1706            (SettableUnionObjectInspector) this.objectInspector;
1707        ObjectInspector fieldOI = unionOI.getObjectInspectors().get(tag);
1708        ColumnVector fieldColVector = unionColumnVector.fields[tag];
1709        final Object value =
1710            vectorExtractRow.extractRowColumn(
1711                fieldColVector, unionTypeInfo.getAllUnionObjectTypeInfos().get(tag), fieldOI, row);
1712        if (value == null) {
1713          return null;
1714        }
1715 
1716        unionOI.setFieldAndTag(union, value, (byte) tag);
1717        return union;
1718      }
1719    }.init(fieldObjInspector);
1720  }

57public DefaultGwtInput (CanvasElement canvas, GwtApplicationConfiguration config) {
58		this.canvas = canvas;
59		this.config = config;
60		if (config.useAccelerometer && GwtFeaturePolicy.allowsFeature(GwtAccelerometer.PERMISSION)) {
61			if (GwtApplication.agentInfo().isFirefox()) {
62				setupAccelerometer();
63			} else {
64				GwtPermissions.queryPermission(GwtAccelerometer.PERMISSION, new GwtPermissions.GwtPermissionResult() {
65					@Override
66					public void granted () {
67						setupAccelerometer();
68					}
69 
70					@Override
71					public void denied () {
72					}
73 
74					@Override
75					public void prompt () {
76						setupAccelerometer();
77					}
78				});
79			}
80		}
81		if (config.useGyroscope) {
82			if (GwtApplication.agentInfo().isFirefox()) {
83				setupGyroscope();
84			} else {
85				GwtPermissions.queryPermission(GwtGyroscope.PERMISSION, new GwtPermissions.GwtPermissionResult() {
86					@Override
87					public void granted () {
88						setupGyroscope();
89					}
90 
91					@Override
92					public void denied () {
93					}
94 
95					@Override
96					public void prompt () {
97						setupGyroscope();
98					}
99				});
100			}
101		}
102		hookEvents();
103 
104		// backwards compatibility: backspace was caught in older versions
105		setCatchKey(Keys.BACKSPACE, true);
106	}

57public DefaultGwtInput (CanvasElement canvas, GwtApplicationConfiguration config) {

60		if (config.useAccelerometer && GwtFeaturePolicy.allowsFeature(GwtAccelerometer.PERMISSION)) {
61			if (GwtApplication.agentInfo().isFirefox()) {
62				setupAccelerometer();
63			} else {

65					@Override

68					}
69 
70					@Override

72					}
73 
74					@Override

77					}
78				});

1842public static boolean fastSerializationUtilsRead(InputStream inputStream, int scale,
1843      byte[] scratchBytes,
1844      FastHiveDecimal fastResult) throws IOException {
1845 
1846    // Following a suggestion from Gopal, quickly read in the bytes from the stream.
1847    // CONSIDER: Have ORC read the whole input stream into a big byte array with one call to
1848    // the read(byte[] b, int off, int len) method and then let this method read from the big
1849    // byte array.
1850    int readCount = 0;
1851    int input;
1852    do {
1853      input = inputStream.read();
1854      if (input == -1) {
1855        throw new EOFException("Reading BigInteger past EOF from " + inputStream);
1856      }
1857      scratchBytes[readCount++] = (byte) input;
1858    } while (input >= 0x80);
1859 
1860    /*
1861     * Determine the 3 binary words like what SerializationUtils.readBigInteger does.
1862     */
1863 
1864    long lowerWord63 = 0;
1865    long middleWord63 = 0;
1866    long highWord63 = 0;
1867 
1868    long work = 0;
1869    int offset = 0;
1870    int readIndex = 0;
1871    long b;
1872    do {
1873      b = scratchBytes[readIndex++];
1874      work |= (0x7f & b) << (offset % 63);
1875      offset += 7;
1876      // if we've read 63 bits, roll them into the result
1877      if (offset == 63) {
1878        lowerWord63 = work;
1879        work = 0;
1880      } else if (offset % 63 == 0) {
1881        if (offset == 126) {
1882          middleWord63 = work;
1883        } else if (offset == 189) {
1884          highWord63 = work;
1885        } else {
1886          throw new EOFException("Reading more than 3 words of BigInteger");
1887        }
1888        work = 0;
1889      }
1890    } while (readIndex < readCount);
1891 
1892    if (work != 0) {
1893      if (offset < 63) {
1894        lowerWord63 = work;
1895      } else if (offset < 126) {
1896        middleWord63 = work;
1897      } else if (offset < 189) {
1898        highWord63 =work;
1899      } else {
1900        throw new EOFException("Reading more than 3 words of BigInteger");
1901      }
1902    }
1903 
1904    // Grab sign bit and shift it away.
1905    boolean isNegative = ((lowerWord63 & 0x1) != 0);
1906    lowerWord63 >>= 1;
1907 
1908    /*
1909     * Use common binary to decimal conversion method we share with fastSetFromBigIntegerBytes.
1910     */
1911    if (!doBinaryToDecimalConversion(
1912            lowerWord63, middleWord63, highWord63,
1913            FAST_HIVE_DECIMAL_TWO_POWER_62,
1914            FAST_HIVE_DECIMAL_TWO_POWER_125,    // 2^(62 + 63)
1915            fastResult)) {
1916      return false;
1917    }
1918 
1919    if (isNegative) {
1920 
1921      // Adjust negative result, again doing what SerializationUtils.readBigInteger does.
1922      if (!doAddSameScaleSameSign(
1923          /* resultSignum */ 1,
1924          fastResult.fast0, fastResult.fast1, fastResult.fast2,
1925          1, 0, 0,
1926          fastResult)) {
1927        return false;
1928      }
1929    }
1930 
1931    if (fastResult.fast0 == 0 && fastResult.fast1 == 0 && fastResult.fast2 == 0) {
1932      fastResult.fastSignum = 0;
1933    } else {
1934      fastResult.fastSignum = (isNegative ? -1 : 1);
1935      final int rawPrecision = fastRawPrecision(fastResult);
1936      fastResult.fastIntegerDigitCount = Math.max(0, rawPrecision - scale);
1937      fastResult.fastScale = scale;
1938 
1939      /*
1940       * Just in case we deserialize a decimal with trailing zeroes...
1941       */
1942      final int resultTrailingZeroCount =
1943          fastTrailingDecimalZeroCount(
1944              fastResult.fast0, fastResult.fast1, fastResult.fast2,
1945              fastResult.fastIntegerDigitCount, fastResult.fastScale);
1946      if (resultTrailingZeroCount > 0) {
1947        doFastScaleDown(
1948            fastResult,
1949            resultTrailingZeroCount,
1950            fastResult);
1951 
1952        fastResult.fastScale -= resultTrailingZeroCount;
1953      }
1954    }
1955 
1956    return true;
1957  }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private static void getResultTrailingZeroCount(int scale, FastHiveDecimal fastResult, boolean isNegative) {
    fastResult.fastSignum = (isNegative ? -1 : 1);
    final int rawPrecision = fastRawPrecision(fastResult);
    fastResult.fastIntegerDigitCount = Math.max(0, rawPrecision - scale);
    fastResult.fastScale = scale;

    /*
    * Just in case we deserialize a decimal with trailing zeroes...
    */
    final int resultTrailingZeroCount =
        fastTrailingDecimalZeroCount(
            fastResult.fast0, fastResult.fast1, fastResult.fast2,
            fastResult.fastIntegerDigitCount, fastResult.fastScale);
    if (resultTrailingZeroCount > 0) {
      doFastScaleDown(
          fastResult,
          resultTrailingZeroCount,
          fastResult);

      fastResult.fastScale -= resultTrailingZeroCount;
    }
  }

2281public static boolean fastSetFromBigIntegerBytesAndScale(
2282      byte[] bytes, int offset, int length, int scale,
2283      FastHiveDecimal fastResult) {
2284 
2285    final int bytesLength = bytes.length;
2286 
2287    if (offset < 0 || offset >= bytesLength) {
2288      return false;
2289    }
2290    final int end = offset + length;
2291    if (end <= offset || end > bytesLength) {
2292      return false;
2293    }
2294 
2295    final int startOffset = offset;
2296 
2297    // Roughly based on BigInteger code.
2298 
2299    boolean isNegative = (bytes[offset] < 0);
2300    if (isNegative) {
2301 
2302      // Find first non-sign (0xff) byte of input.
2303      while (offset < end) {
2304        if (bytes[offset] != -1) {
2305          break;
2306        }
2307        offset++;
2308      }
2309      if (offset > end) {
2310        return false;
2311      }
2312    } else {
2313 
2314      // Strip leading zeroes -- although there shouldn't be any for a decimal.
2315 
2316      while (offset < end && bytes[offset] == 0) {
2317        offset++;
2318      }
2319      if (offset >= end) {
2320        // Zero.
2321        return true;
2322      }
2323    }
2324 
2325    long lowerWord56 = 0;
2326    long middleWord56 = 0;
2327    long highWord56 = 0;
2328 
2329    int reverseIndex = end;
2330 
2331    long work;
2332    int shift;
2333 
2334    final int lowestCount = Math.min(reverseIndex - offset, 7);
2335    shift = 0;
2336    for (int i = 0; i < lowestCount; i++) {
2337      work = bytes[--reverseIndex] & 0xFF;
2338      lowerWord56 |= work << shift;
2339      shift += 8;
2340    }
2341 
2342    if (reverseIndex <= offset) {
2343      if (isNegative) {
2344        lowerWord56 = ~lowerWord56 & ((1L << shift) - 1);
2345      }
2346    } else {
2347 
2348      // Go on to middle word.
2349 
2350      final int middleCount = Math.min(reverseIndex - offset, 7);
2351      shift = 0;
2352      for (int i = 0; i < middleCount; i++) {
2353        work = bytes[--reverseIndex] & 0xFF;
2354        middleWord56 |= work << shift;
2355        shift += 8;
2356      }
2357      if (reverseIndex <= offset) {
2358        if (isNegative) {
2359          lowerWord56 = ~lowerWord56 & LONG_56_BIT_MASK;
2360          middleWord56 = ~middleWord56 & ((1L << shift) - 1);
2361        }
2362      } else {
2363 
2364        // Go on to high word.
2365 
2366        final int highCount = Math.min(reverseIndex - offset, 7);
2367        shift = 0;
2368        for (int i = 0; i < highCount; i++) {
2369          work = bytes[--reverseIndex] & 0xFF;
2370          highWord56 |= work << shift;
2371          shift += 8;
2372        }
2373        if (isNegative) {
2374          // We only need to apply negation to all 3 words when there are 3 words, etc.
2375          lowerWord56 = ~lowerWord56 & LONG_56_BIT_MASK;
2376          middleWord56 = ~middleWord56 & LONG_56_BIT_MASK;
2377          highWord56 = ~highWord56 & ((1L << shift) - 1);
2378        }
2379      }
2380    }
2381 
2382    if (!doBinaryToDecimalConversion(
2383          lowerWord56, middleWord56, highWord56,
2384          FAST_HIVE_DECIMAL_TWO_POWER_56,
2385          FAST_HIVE_DECIMAL_TWO_POWER_112,    // 2^(56 + 56)
2386          fastResult)) {
2387      // Overflow.  Use slower alternate.
2388      return doAlternateSetFromBigIntegerBytesAndScale(
2389          bytes, startOffset, length, scale,
2390          fastResult);
2391    }
2392 
2393    // System.out.println("fastSetFromBigIntegerBytesAndScale fast0 " + fastResult.fast0 + " fast1 " + fastResult.fast1 + " fast2 " + fastResult.fast2);
2394    if (isNegative) {
2395      if (!doAddSameScaleSameSign(
2396          /* resultSignum */ 1,
2397          fastResult.fast0, fastResult.fast1, fastResult.fast2,
2398          1, 0, 0,
2399          fastResult)) {
2400        // Overflow.  Use slower alternate.
2401        return doAlternateSetFromBigIntegerBytesAndScale(
2402            bytes, startOffset, length, scale,
2403            fastResult);
2404      }
2405    }
2406 
2407    if (fastResult.fast0 == 0 && fastResult.fast1 == 0 && fastResult.fast2 == 0) {
2408      fastResult.fastSignum = 0;
2409    } else {
2410      fastResult.fastSignum = (isNegative ? -1 : 1);
2411      fastResult.fastScale = scale;
2412      final int rawPrecision = fastRawPrecision(fastResult);
2413      fastResult.fastIntegerDigitCount = Math.max(0, rawPrecision - scale);
2414 
2415      /*
2416       * Just in case we deserialize a decimal with trailing zeroes...
2417       */
2418      final int resultTrailingZeroCount =
2419          fastTrailingDecimalZeroCount(
2420              fastResult.fast0, fastResult.fast1, fastResult.fast2,
2421              fastResult.fastIntegerDigitCount, fastResult.fastScale);
2422      if (resultTrailingZeroCount > 0) {
2423        doFastScaleDown(
2424            fastResult,
2425            resultTrailingZeroCount,
2426            fastResult);
2427 
2428        fastResult.fastScale -= resultTrailingZeroCount;
2429      }
2430    }
2431 
2432    return true;
2433  }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private static void getResultTrailingZeroCount(int scale, FastHiveDecimal fastResult, boolean isNegative) {
    fastResult.fastSignum = (isNegative ? -1 : 1);
    fastResult.fastScale = scale;
    final int rawPrecision = fastRawPrecision(fastResult);
    fastResult.fastIntegerDigitCount = Math.max(0, rawPrecision - scale);

    /*
    * Just in case we deserialize a decimal with trailing zeroes...
    */
    final int resultTrailingZeroCount =
        fastTrailingDecimalZeroCount(
            fastResult.fast0, fastResult.fast1, fastResult.fast2,
            fastResult.fastIntegerDigitCount, fastResult.fastScale);
    if (resultTrailingZeroCount > 0) {
      doFastScaleDown(
          fastResult,
          resultTrailingZeroCount,
          fastResult);

      fastResult.fastScale -= resultTrailingZeroCount;
    }
  }

49@Override
50    public Processor wrapProcessorInInterceptors(
51            final CamelContext context,
52            final NamedNode definition,
53            final Processor target,
54            final Processor nextTarget)
55            throws Exception {
56 
57        final AsyncProcessor asyncProcessor = AsyncProcessorConverterHelper.convert(target);
58 
59        return new AsyncProcessor() {
60 
61            @Override
62            public boolean process(Exchange exchange, AsyncCallback callback) {
63                Map<String, String> previousContext = MDC.getCopyOfContextMap();
64                mdcService.setMDC(exchange);
65                return asyncProcessor.process(exchange, doneSync -> {
66                    try {
67                        callback.done(doneSync);
68                    } finally {
69                        mdcService.unsetMDC(exchange);
70                        if (previousContext != null) {
71                            MDC.setContextMap(previousContext);
72                        } else {
73                            MDC.clear();
74                        }
75                    }
76                });
77            }
78 
79            @Override
80            public void process(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {
81                Map<String, String> previousContext = MDC.getCopyOfContextMap();
82                mdcService.setMDC(exchange);
83                try {
84                    asyncProcessor.process(exchange);
85                } finally {
86                    mdcService.unsetMDC(exchange);
87                    if (previousContext != null) {
88                        MDC.setContextMap(previousContext);
89                    } else {
90                        MDC.clear();
91                    }
92                }
93            }
94 
95            @Override
96            public CompletableFuture<Exchange> processAsync(Exchange exchange) {
97                AsyncCallbackToCompletableFutureAdapter<Exchange> callback
98                        = new AsyncCallbackToCompletableFutureAdapter<>(exchange);
99                process(exchange, callback);
100                return callback.getFuture();
101            }
102 
103        };
104    }

49@Override
50    public Processor wrapProcessorInInterceptors(
51            final CamelContext context,
52            final NamedNode definition,
53            final Processor target,
54            final Processor nextTarget)
55            throws Exception {
56 
57        final AsyncProcessor asyncProcessor = AsyncProcessorConverterHelper.convert(target);
58 
59        return new AsyncProcessor() {
60 
61            @Override
62            public boolean process(Exchange exchange, AsyncCallback callback) {
63                Map<String, String> previousContext = MDC.getCopyOfContextMap();
64                mdcService.setMDC(exchange);
65                return asyncProcessor.process(exchange, doneSync -> {
66                    try {
67                        callback.done(doneSync);
68                    } finally {
69                        mdcService.unsetMDC(exchange);
70                        if (previousContext != null) {
71                            MDC.setContextMap(previousContext);
72                        } else {
73                            MDC.clear();
74                        }
75                    }
76                });
77            }
78 
79            @Override
80            public void process(Exchange exchange) throws Exception {
81                Map<String, String> previousContext = MDC.getCopyOfContextMap();
82                mdcService.setMDC(exchange);
83                try {
84                    asyncProcessor.process(exchange);
85                } finally {
86                    mdcService.unsetMDC(exchange);
87                    if (previousContext != null) {
88                        MDC.setContextMap(previousContext);
89                    } else {
90                        MDC.clear();
91                    }
92                }
93            }
94 
95            @Override
96            public CompletableFuture<Exchange> processAsync(Exchange exchange) {
97                AsyncCallbackToCompletableFutureAdapter<Exchange> callback
98                        = new AsyncCallbackToCompletableFutureAdapter<>(exchange);
99                process(exchange, callback);
100                return callback.getFuture();
101            }
102 
103        };
104    }

51static SpatialVisitor getSpatialVisitor(Component2D component2D) {
52    return new SpatialVisitor() {
53      @Override
54      protected Relation relate(byte[] minTriangle, byte[] maxTriangle) {
55 
56        double minY = XYEncodingUtils.decode(NumericUtils.sortableBytesToInt(minTriangle, 0));
57        double minX =
58            XYEncodingUtils.decode(NumericUtils.sortableBytesToInt(minTriangle, ShapeField.BYTES));
59        double maxY =
60            XYEncodingUtils.decode(
61                NumericUtils.sortableBytesToInt(maxTriangle, 2 * ShapeField.BYTES));
62        double maxX =
63            XYEncodingUtils.decode(
64                NumericUtils.sortableBytesToInt(maxTriangle, 3 * ShapeField.BYTES));
65 
66        // check internal node against query
67        return component2D.relate(minX, maxX, minY, maxY);
68      }
69 
70      @Override
71      protected Predicate<byte[]> intersects() {
72        final ShapeField.DecodedTriangle scratchTriangle = new ShapeField.DecodedTriangle();
73        return triangle -> {
74          ShapeField.decodeTriangle(triangle, scratchTriangle);
75 
76          switch (scratchTriangle.type) {
77            case POINT:
78              {
79                double y = decode(scratchTriangle.aY);
80                double x = decode(scratchTriangle.aX);
81                return component2D.contains(x, y);
82              }
83            case LINE:
84              {
85                double aY = decode(scratchTriangle.aY);
86                double aX = decode(scratchTriangle.aX);
87                double bY = decode(scratchTriangle.bY);
88                double bX = decode(scratchTriangle.bX);
89                return component2D.intersectsLine(aX, aY, bX, bY);
90              }
91            case TRIANGLE:
92              {
93                double aY = decode(scratchTriangle.aY);
94                double aX = decode(scratchTriangle.aX);
95                double bY = decode(scratchTriangle.bY);
96                double bX = decode(scratchTriangle.bX);
97                double cY = decode(scratchTriangle.cY);
98                double cX = decode(scratchTriangle.cX);
99                return component2D.intersectsTriangle(aX, aY, bX, bY, cX, cY);
100              }
101            default:
102              throw new IllegalArgumentException(
103                  "Unsupported triangle type :[" + scratchTriangle.type + "]");
104          }
105        };
106      }
107 
108      @Override
109      protected Predicate<byte[]> within() {
110        final ShapeField.DecodedTriangle scratchTriangle = new ShapeField.DecodedTriangle();
111        return triangle -> {
112          ShapeField.decodeTriangle(triangle, scratchTriangle);
113 
114          switch (scratchTriangle.type) {
115            case POINT:
116              {
117                double y = decode(scratchTriangle.aY);
118                double x = decode(scratchTriangle.aX);
119                return component2D.contains(x, y);
120              }
121            case LINE:
122              {
123                double aY = decode(scratchTriangle.aY);
124                double aX = decode(scratchTriangle.aX);
125                double bY = decode(scratchTriangle.bY);
126                double bX = decode(scratchTriangle.bX);
127                return component2D.containsLine(aX, aY, bX, bY);
128              }
129            case TRIANGLE:
130              {
131                double aY = decode(scratchTriangle.aY);
132                double aX = decode(scratchTriangle.aX);
133                double bY = decode(scratchTriangle.bY);
134                double bX = decode(scratchTriangle.bX);
135                double cY = decode(scratchTriangle.cY);
136                double cX = decode(scratchTriangle.cX);
137                return component2D.containsTriangle(aX, aY, bX, bY, cX, cY);
138              }
139            default:
140              throw new IllegalArgumentException(
141                  "Unsupported triangle type :[" + scratchTriangle.type + "]");
142          }
143        };
144      }
145 
146      @Override
147      protected Function<byte[], Component2D.WithinRelation> contains() {
148        final ShapeField.DecodedTriangle scratchTriangle = new ShapeField.DecodedTriangle();
149        return triangle -> {
150          ShapeField.decodeTriangle(triangle, scratchTriangle);
151 
152          switch (scratchTriangle.type) {
153            case POINT:
154              {
155                double y = decode(scratchTriangle.aY);
156                double x = decode(scratchTriangle.aX);
157                return component2D.withinPoint(x, y);
158              }
159            case LINE:
160              {
161                double aY = decode(scratchTriangle.aY);
162                double aX = decode(scratchTriangle.aX);
163                double bY = decode(scratchTriangle.bY);
164                double bX = decode(scratchTriangle.bX);
165                return component2D.withinLine(aX, aY, scratchTriangle.ab, bX, bY);
166              }
167            case TRIANGLE:
168              {
169                double aY = decode(scratchTriangle.aY);
170                double aX = decode(scratchTriangle.aX);
171                double bY = decode(scratchTriangle.bY);
172                double bX = decode(scratchTriangle.bX);
173                double cY = decode(scratchTriangle.cY);
174                double cX = decode(scratchTriangle.cX);
175                return component2D.withinTriangle(
176                    aX,
177                    aY,
178                    scratchTriangle.ab,
179                    bX,
180                    bY,
181                    scratchTriangle.bc,
182                    cX,
183                    cY,
184                    scratchTriangle.ca);
185              }
186            default:
187              throw new IllegalArgumentException(
188                  "Unsupported triangle type :[" + scratchTriangle.type + "]");
189          }
190        };
191      }
192    };
193  }

68static SpatialVisitor getSpatialVisitor(Component2D component2D) {
69    return new SpatialVisitor() {
70      @Override
71      protected Relation relate(byte[] minTriangle, byte[] maxTriangle) {
72        double minLat =
73            GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(NumericUtils.sortableBytesToInt(minTriangle, 0));
74        double minLon =
75            GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(
76                NumericUtils.sortableBytesToInt(minTriangle, ShapeField.BYTES));
77        double maxLat =
78            GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(
79                NumericUtils.sortableBytesToInt(maxTriangle, 2 * ShapeField.BYTES));
80        double maxLon =
81            GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(
82                NumericUtils.sortableBytesToInt(maxTriangle, 3 * ShapeField.BYTES));
83 
84        // check internal node against query
85        return component2D.relate(minLon, maxLon, minLat, maxLat);
86      }
87 
88      @Override
89      protected Predicate<byte[]> intersects() {
90        final ShapeField.DecodedTriangle scratchTriangle = new ShapeField.DecodedTriangle();
91        return triangle -> {
92          ShapeField.decodeTriangle(triangle, scratchTriangle);
93 
94          switch (scratchTriangle.type) {
95            case POINT:
96              {
97                double alat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.aY);
98                double alon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.aX);
99                return component2D.contains(alon, alat);
100              }
101            case LINE:
102              {
103                double alat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.aY);
104                double alon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.aX);
105                double blat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.bY);
106                double blon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.bX);
107                return component2D.intersectsLine(alon, alat, blon, blat);
108              }
109            case TRIANGLE:
110              {
111                double alat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.aY);
112                double alon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.aX);
113                double blat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.bY);
114                double blon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.bX);
115                double clat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.cY);
116                double clon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.cX);
117                return component2D.intersectsTriangle(alon, alat, blon, blat, clon, clat);
118              }
119            default:
120              throw new IllegalArgumentException(
121                  "Unsupported triangle type :[" + scratchTriangle.type + "]");
122          }
123        };
124      }
125 
126      @Override
127      protected Predicate<byte[]> within() {
128        final ShapeField.DecodedTriangle scratchTriangle = new ShapeField.DecodedTriangle();
129        return triangle -> {
130          ShapeField.decodeTriangle(triangle, scratchTriangle);
131 
132          switch (scratchTriangle.type) {
133            case POINT:
134              {
135                double alat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.aY);
136                double alon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.aX);
137                return component2D.contains(alon, alat);
138              }
139            case LINE:
140              {
141                double alat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.aY);
142                double alon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.aX);
143                double blat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.bY);
144                double blon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.bX);
145                return component2D.containsLine(alon, alat, blon, blat);
146              }
147            case TRIANGLE:
148              {
149                double alat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.aY);
150                double alon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.aX);
151                double blat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.bY);
152                double blon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.bX);
153                double clat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.cY);
154                double clon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.cX);
155                return component2D.containsTriangle(alon, alat, blon, blat, clon, clat);
156              }
157            default:
158              throw new IllegalArgumentException(
159                  "Unsupported triangle type :[" + scratchTriangle.type + "]");
160          }
161        };
162      }
163 
164      @Override
165      protected Function<byte[], Component2D.WithinRelation> contains() {
166        final ShapeField.DecodedTriangle scratchTriangle = new ShapeField.DecodedTriangle();
167        return triangle -> {
168          ShapeField.decodeTriangle(triangle, scratchTriangle);
169 
170          switch (scratchTriangle.type) {
171            case POINT:
172              {
173                double alat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.aY);
174                double alon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.aX);
175                return component2D.withinPoint(alon, alat);
176              }
177            case LINE:
178              {
179                double alat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.aY);

182                double blon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.bX);
183                return component2D.withinLine(alon, alat, scratchTriangle.ab, blon, blat);
184              }

188                double alon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.aX);

204            default:

210    };
211  }
