68static SpatialVisitor getSpatialVisitor(Component2D component2D) {
69    return new SpatialVisitor() {
70      @Override
71      protected Relation relate(byte[] minTriangle, byte[] maxTriangle) {
72        double minLat =
73            GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(NumericUtils.sortableBytesToInt(minTriangle, 0));
74        double minLon =
75            GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(
76                NumericUtils.sortableBytesToInt(minTriangle, ShapeField.BYTES));
77        double maxLat =
78            GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(
79                NumericUtils.sortableBytesToInt(maxTriangle, 2 * ShapeField.BYTES));
80        double maxLon =
81            GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(
82                NumericUtils.sortableBytesToInt(maxTriangle, 3 * ShapeField.BYTES));
83 
84        // check internal node against query
85        return component2D.relate(minLon, maxLon, minLat, maxLat);
86      }
87 
88      @Override
89      protected Predicate<byte[]> intersects() {
90        final ShapeField.DecodedTriangle scratchTriangle = new ShapeField.DecodedTriangle();
91        return triangle -> {
92          ShapeField.decodeTriangle(triangle, scratchTriangle);
93 
94          switch (scratchTriangle.type) {
95            case POINT:
96              {
97                double alat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.aY);
98                double alon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.aX);
99                return component2D.contains(alon, alat);
100              }
101            case LINE:
102              {
103                double alat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.aY);
104                double alon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.aX);
105                double blat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.bY);
106                double blon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.bX);
107                return component2D.intersectsLine(alon, alat, blon, blat);
108              }
109            case TRIANGLE:
110              {
111                double alat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.aY);
112                double alon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.aX);
113                double blat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.bY);
114                double blon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.bX);
115                double clat = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLatitude(scratchTriangle.cY);
116                double clon = GeoEncodingUtils.decodeLongitude(scratchTriangle.cX);
117                return component2D.intersectsTriangle(alon, alat, blon, blat, clon, clat);
118              }
119            default:
120              throw new IllegalArgumentException(
121                  "Unsupported triangle type :[" + scratchTriangle.type + "]");
122          }
123        };
124      }
125

131

217private MethodHandle ensureTarget4() {
218        MethodHandle target4;
219        if (!initialized4) {
220            Supplier<MethodHandle> maker4 = this.maker4;
221            if (maker4 == null) {
222                target4 = null;
223            } else {
224                target4 = maker4.get();
225            }
226            this.target4 = target4;
227            initialized4 = true;
228            this.maker4 = null;
229        }
230        return this.target4;
231    }

199private MethodHandle ensureTarget3() {
200        MethodHandle target3;
201        if (!initialized3) {
202            Supplier<MethodHandle> maker3 = this.maker3;
203            if (maker3 == null) {
204                target3 = adaptSpecificToVarargs(ensureTarget4(), 3);
205            } else {
206                target3 = maker3.get();
207            }
208            this.target3 = target3;
209            this.maker3 = null;
210            initialized3 = true;
211        } else {
212            target3 = this.target3;
213        }
214        return target3;
215    }

749private void handleSaveEmitter() {
750        try {
751            // Read ExtensionConfig
752            int len = input.readInt();
753            byte[] bytes = new byte[len];
754            input.readFully(bytes);
755            
756            ExtensionConfig config;
757            try (ObjectInputStream ois = new ObjectInputStream(new UnsynchronizedByteArrayInputStream(bytes))) {
758                config = (ExtensionConfig) ois.readObject();
759            }
760            
761            // Save the emitter
762            emitterManager.saveEmitter(config);
763            LOG.debug("pipesClientId={}: saved emitter '{}'", pipesClientId, config.id());
764            
765            // Send success response
766            output.writeByte(0); // success
767            String msg = "Emitter saved successfully";
768            byte[] msgBytes = msg.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
769            output.writeInt(msgBytes.length);
770            output.write(msgBytes);
771            output.flush();
772            
773        } catch (Exception e) {
774            LOG.error("pipesClientId={}: error saving emitter", pipesClientId, e);
775            try {
776                output.writeByte(1); // error
777                String msg = ExceptionUtils.getStackTrace(e);
778                byte[] msgBytes = msg.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
779                output.writeInt(msgBytes.length);
780                output.write(msgBytes);
781                output.flush();
782            } catch (IOException ioe) {
783                LOG.error("pipesClientId={}: failed to send error response", pipesClientId, ioe);
784                exit(1);
785            }
786        }
787    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(Exception e) {
        LOG.error("pipesClientId={}: error saving emitter", pipesClientId, e);
        try {
            output.writeByte(1); // error
            String msg = ExceptionUtils.getStackTrace(e);
            byte[] msgBytes = msg.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
            output.writeInt(msgBytes.length);
            output.write(msgBytes);
            output.flush();
        } catch (IOException ioe) {
            LOG.error("pipesClientId={}: failed to send error response", pipesClientId, ioe);
            exit(1);
        }
    }

886private void handleSavePipesIterator() {
887        try {
888            // Read ExtensionConfig
889            int len = input.readInt();
890            byte[] bytes = new byte[len];
891            input.readFully(bytes);
892            
893            ExtensionConfig config;
894            try (ObjectInputStream ois = new ObjectInputStream(new UnsynchronizedByteArrayInputStream(bytes))) {
895                config = (ExtensionConfig) ois.readObject();
896            } catch (ClassNotFoundException e) {
897                throw new IOException("Failed to deserialize ExtensionConfig", e);
898            }
899            
900            // Save to ConfigStore
901            configStore.put(PIPES_ITERATOR_PREFIX + config.id(), config);
902            
903            // Send success response
904            output.writeByte(0); // success
905            byte[] msgBytes = "OK".getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
906            output.writeInt(msgBytes.length);
907            output.write(msgBytes);
908            output.flush();
909            
910            LOG.debug("pipesClientId={}: saved pipes iterator '{}'", pipesClientId, config.id());
911            
912        } catch (Exception e) {
913            LOG.error("pipesClientId={}: error saving pipes iterator", pipesClientId, e);
914            try {
915                output.writeByte(1); // error
916                byte[] msgBytes = e.getMessage().getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
917                output.writeInt(msgBytes.length);
918                output.write(msgBytes);
919                output.flush();
920            } catch (IOException ioException) {
921                LOG.error("pipesClientId={}: error sending error response", pipesClientId, ioException);
922            }
923        }
924    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(Exception e) {
        LOG.error("pipesClientId={}: error saving pipes iterator", pipesClientId, e);
        try {
            output.writeByte(1); // error
            byte[] msgBytes = e.getMessage().getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
            output.writeInt(msgBytes.length);
            output.write(msgBytes);
            output.flush();
        } catch (IOException ioException) {
            LOG.error("pipesClientId={}: error sending error response", pipesClientId, ioException);
        }
    }

346@Override public final void onKernalStart(boolean active) throws IgniteCheckedException {
347        for (final IgniteSpi spi : spis) {
348            try {
349                spi.onContextInitialized(new IgniteSpiContext() {
350                    @Override public boolean isStopping() {
351                        return ctx.isStopping();
352                    }
353 
354                    @Override public Collection<ClusterNode> remoteNodes() {
355                        return ctx.discovery().remoteNodes();
356                    }
357 
358                    @Override public Collection<ClusterNode> nodes() {
359                        return ctx.discovery().allNodes();
360                    }
361 
362                    @Override public ClusterNode localNode() {
363                        return ctx.discovery().localNode();
364                    }
365 
366                    @Nullable @Override public ClusterNode node(UUID nodeId) {
367                        A.notNull(nodeId, "nodeId");
368 
369                        return ctx.discovery().node(nodeId);
370                    }
371 
372                    @Override public boolean pingNode(UUID nodeId) {
373                        A.notNull(nodeId, "nodeId");
374 
375                        try {
376                            return ctx.discovery().pingNode(nodeId);
377                        }
378                        catch (IgniteCheckedException e) {
379                            throw U.convertException(e);
380                        }
381                    }
382 
383                    @Override public void send(ClusterNode node, Object msg, String topic)
384                        throws IgniteSpiException {
385                        A.notNull(node, "node");
386                        A.notNull(msg, "msg");
387                        A.notNull(topic, "topic");
388 
389                        try {
390                            if (msg instanceof Message)
391                                ctx.io().sendToCustomTopic(node, topic, (Message)msg, SYSTEM_POOL);
392                            else
393                                ctx.io().sendUserMessage(Collections.singletonList(node), msg, topic, false, 0, false);
394                        }
395                        catch (IgniteCheckedException e) {
396                            throw unwrapException(e);
397                        }
398                    }
399 
400                    @Override public void addLocalMessageListener(Object topic, IgniteBiPredicate<UUID, ?> p) {
401                        A.notNull(topic, "topic");
402                        A.notNull(p, "p");
403 
404                        ctx.io().addUserMessageListener(topic, p);
405                    }
406 
407                    @Override public void removeLocalMessageListener(Object topic, IgniteBiPredicate<UUID, ?> p) {
408                        A.notNull(topic, "topic");
409                        A.notNull(topic, "p");
410 
411                        ctx.io().removeUserMessageListener(topic, p);
412                    }
413 
414                    @Override public void addMessageListener(GridMessageListener lsnr, String topic) {
415                        A.notNull(lsnr, "lsnr");
416                        A.notNull(topic, "topic");
417 
418                        ctx.io().addMessageListener(topic, lsnr);
419                    }
420 
421                    @Override public boolean removeMessageListener(GridMessageListener lsnr, String topic) {
422                        A.notNull(lsnr, "lsnr");
423                        A.notNull(topic, "topic");
424 
425                        return ctx.io().removeMessageListener(topic, lsnr);
426                    }
427 
428                    @Override public void addLocalEventListener(GridLocalEventListener lsnr, int... types) {
429                        A.notNull(lsnr, "lsnr");
430 
431                        ctx.event().addLocalEventListener(lsnr, types);
432                    }
433 
434                    @Override public boolean removeLocalEventListener(GridLocalEventListener lsnr) {
435                        A.notNull(lsnr, "lsnr");
436 
437                        return ctx.event().removeLocalEventListener(lsnr);
438                    }
439 
440                    @Override public boolean isEventRecordable(int... types) {
441                        for (int t : types)
442                            if (!ctx.event().isRecordable(t))
443                                return false;
444 
445                        return true;
446                    }
447 
448                    @Override public void recordEvent(Event evt) {
449                        A.notNull(evt, "evt");
450 
451                        if (ctx.event().isRecordable(evt.type()))
452                            ctx.event().record(evt);
453                    }
454 
455                    @Override public void registerPort(int port, IgnitePortProtocol proto) {
456                        ctx.ports().registerPort(port, proto, spi.getClass());
457                    }
458 
459                    @Override public void deregisterPort(int port, IgnitePortProtocol proto) {
460                        ctx.ports().deregisterPort(port, proto, spi.getClass());
461                    }
462 
463                    @Override public void deregisterPorts() {
464                        ctx.ports().deregisterPorts(spi.getClass());
465                    }
466 
467                    @Nullable @Override public <K, V> V get(String cacheName, K key) {
468                        return ctx.cache().<K, V>jcache(cacheName).get(key);
469                    }
470 
471                    @Nullable @Override public <K, V> V put(String cacheName, K key, V val, long ttl) {
472                        try {
473                            if (ttl > 0) {
474                                ExpiryPolicy plc = new TouchedExpiryPolicy(new Duration(MILLISECONDS, ttl));
475

346@Override public final void onKernalStart(boolean active) throws IgniteCheckedException {
347        for (final IgniteSpi spi : spis) {
348            try {
349                spi.onContextInitialized(new IgniteSpiContext() {
350                    @Override public boolean isStopping() {
351                        return ctx.isStopping();
352                    }
353

355                        return ctx.discovery().remoteNodes();
356                    }

359                        return ctx.discovery().allNodes();
360                    }

367                        A.notNull(nodeId, "nodeId");
368

374

383                    @Override public void send(ClusterNode node, Object msg, String topic)
384                        throws IgniteSpiException {
385                        A.notNull(node, "node");
386                        A.notNull(msg, "msg");
387                        A.notNull(topic, "topic");
388 
389                        try {
390                            if (msg instanceof Message)
391                                ctx.io().sendToCustomTopic(node, topic, (Message)msg, SYSTEM_POOL);
392                            else
393                                ctx.io().sendUserMessage(Collections.singletonList(node), msg, topic, false, 0, false);
394                        }
395                        catch (IgniteCheckedException e) {
396                            throw unwrapException(e);
397                        }
398                    }

817private QueryNode createFunction(SimpleNode node, QueryNode queryNode) {
818        // find out function name
819        String tmp = ((SimpleNode) node.jjtGetChild(0)).getValue();
820        String fName = tmp.substring(0, tmp.length() - 1);
821        try {
822            Name funName = resolver.getQName(fName);
823 
824            if (FN_NOT.equals(funName) || FN_NOT_10.equals(funName)) {
825                if (queryNode instanceof NAryQueryNode) {
826                    QueryNode not = factory.createNotQueryNode(queryNode);
827                    ((NAryQueryNode) queryNode).addOperand(not);
828                    // @todo is this needed?
829                    queryNode = not;
830                    // traverse
831                    if (node.jjtGetNumChildren() == 2) {
832                        node.jjtGetChild(1).jjtAccept(this, queryNode);
833                    } else {
834                        exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("fn:not only supports one expression argument"));
835                    }
836                } else {
837                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for function fn:not"));
838                }
839            } else if (XS_DATETIME.equals(funName)) {
840                // check arguments
841                if (node.jjtGetNumChildren() == 2) {
842                    if (queryNode instanceof RelationQueryNode) {
843                        RelationQueryNode rel = (RelationQueryNode) queryNode;
844                        SimpleNode literal = (SimpleNode) node.jjtGetChild(1).jjtGetChild(0);
845                        if (literal.getId() == JJTSTRINGLITERAL) {
846                            String value = literal.getValue();
847                            // strip quotes
848                            value = value.substring(1, value.length() - 1);
849                            Calendar c = ISO8601.parse(value);
850                            if (c == null) {
851                                exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unable to parse string literal for xs:dateTime: " + value));
852                            } else {
853                                rel.setDateValue(c.getTime());
854                            }
855                        } else {
856                            exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong argument type for xs:dateTime"));
857                        }
858                    } else {
859                        exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for function xs:dateTime"));
860                    }
861                } else {
862                    // wrong number of arguments
863                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong number of arguments for xs:dateTime"));
864                }
865            } else if (JCR_CONTAINS.equals(funName)) {
866                // check number of arguments
867                if (node.jjtGetNumChildren() == 3) {
868                    if (queryNode instanceof NAryQueryNode) {
869                        SimpleNode literal = (SimpleNode) node.jjtGetChild(2).jjtGetChild(0);
870                        if (literal.getId() == JJTSTRINGLITERAL) {
871                            TextsearchQueryNode contains = factory.createTextsearchQueryNode(
872                                    queryNode, unescapeQuotes(literal.getValue()));
873                            // assign property name
874                            SimpleNode path = (SimpleNode) node.jjtGetChild(1);
875                            path.jjtAccept(this, contains);
876                            ((NAryQueryNode) queryNode).addOperand(contains);
877                        } else {
878                            exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong argument type for jcr:contains"));
879                        }
880                    }
881                } else {
882                    // wrong number of arguments
883                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong number of arguments for jcr:contains"));
884                }
885            } else if (JCR_LIKE.equals(funName)) {
886                // check number of arguments
887                if (node.jjtGetNumChildren() == 3) {
888                    if (queryNode instanceof NAryQueryNode) {
889                        RelationQueryNode like = factory.createRelationQueryNode(
890                                queryNode, RelationQueryNode.OPERATION_LIKE);
891                        ((NAryQueryNode) queryNode).addOperand(like);
892 
893                        // assign property name
894                        node.jjtGetChild(1).jjtAccept(this, like);
895                        // check property name
896                        if (like.getRelativePath() == null) {
897                            exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong first argument type for jcr:like"));
898                        }
899 
900                        SimpleNode literal = (SimpleNode) node.jjtGetChild(2).jjtGetChild(0);
901                        if (literal.getId() == JJTSTRINGLITERAL) {
902                            like.setStringValue(unescapeQuotes(literal.getValue()));
903                        } else {
904                            exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong second argument type for jcr:like"));
905                        }
906                    } else {
907                        exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for function jcr:like"));
908                    }
909                } else {
910                    // wrong number of arguments
911                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong number of arguments for jcr:like"));
912                }
913            } else if (FN_TRUE.equals(funName)) {
914                if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_RELATION) {
915                    RelationQueryNode rel = (RelationQueryNode) queryNode;
916                    rel.setStringValue("true");
917                } else {
918                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for true()"));
919                }
920            } else if (FN_FALSE.equals(funName)) {
921                if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_RELATION) {
922                    RelationQueryNode rel = (RelationQueryNode) queryNode;
923                    rel.setStringValue("false");
924                } else {
925                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for false()"));
926                }
927            } else if (FN_POSITION.equals(funName)) {
928                if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_RELATION) {
929                    RelationQueryNode rel = (RelationQueryNode) queryNode;
930                    if (rel.getOperation() == RelationQueryNode.OPERATION_EQ_GENERAL) {
931                        // set dummy value to set type of relation query node
932                        // will be overwritten when the tree is further parsed.
933                        rel.setPositionValue(1);
934                        rel.addPathElement(PATH_FACTORY.createElement(FN_POSITION_FULL));
935                    } else {
936                        exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported expression with position(). Only = is supported."));
937                    }
938                } else {
939                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for position()"));
940                }
941            } else if (FN_FIRST.equals(funName)) {
942                if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_RELATION) {
943                    ((RelationQueryNode) queryNode).setPositionValue(1);
944                } else if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_LOCATION) {
945                    ((LocationStepQueryNode) queryNode).setIndex(1);
946                } else {
947                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for first()"));
948                }
949            } else if (FN_LAST.equals(funName)) {
950                if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_RELATION) {
951                    ((RelationQueryNode) queryNode).setPositionValue(LocationStepQueryNode.LAST);
952                } else if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_LOCATION) {
953                    ((LocationStepQueryNode) queryNode).setIndex(LocationStepQueryNode.LAST);
954                } else {
955                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for last()"));
956                }
957            } else if (JCR_DEREF.equals(funName)) {
958                // check number of arguments
959                if (node.jjtGetNumChildren() == 3) {
960                    boolean descendant = false;
961                    if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_LOCATION) {
962                        LocationStepQueryNode loc = (LocationStepQueryNode) queryNode;
963                        // remember if descendant axis
964                        descendant = loc.getIncludeDescendants();
965                        queryNode = loc.getParent();
966                        ((NAryQueryNode) queryNode).removeOperand(loc);
967                    }
968                    if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_PATH) {
969                        PathQueryNode pathNode = (PathQueryNode) queryNode;
970 
971                        pathNode.addPathStep(createDerefQueryNode(node, descendant, pathNode));
972                    } else if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_RELATION) {
973                        RelationQueryNode relNode = (RelationQueryNode) queryNode;
974                        DerefQueryNode deref = createDerefQueryNode(node, descendant, relNode.getRelativePath());
975                        relNode.getRelativePath().addPathStep(deref);
976                    } else {
977                        exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for jcr:deref()"));
978                    }
979                }
980            } else if (JCR_SCORE.equals(funName)) {
981                if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_ORDER) {
982                    setOrderSpecPath(node, (OrderQueryNode) queryNode);
983                } else {
984                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for jcr:score()"));
985                }
986            } else if (FN_LOWER_CASE.equals(funName)) {
987                if (node.jjtGetNumChildren() == 2) {
988                    if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_RELATION) {
989                        RelationQueryNode relNode = (RelationQueryNode) queryNode;
990                        relNode.addOperand(factory.createPropertyFunctionQueryNode(
991                                relNode, PropertyFunctionQueryNode.LOWER_CASE));
992                        // get property name
993                        node.jjtGetChild(1).jjtAccept(this, relNode);
994                    } else if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_ORDER) {
995                        ((OrderQueryNode) queryNode).setFunction(FN_LOWER_CASE.getLocalName());
996                        node.childrenAccept(this, queryNode);
997                    } else {
998                        exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for fn:lower-case()"));
999                    }
1000                } else {
1001                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong number of argument for fn:lower-case()"));
1002                }
1003            } else if (FN_UPPER_CASE.equals(funName)) {
1004                if (node.jjtGetNumChildren() == 2) {
1005                    if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_RELATION) {
1006                        RelationQueryNode relNode = (RelationQueryNode) queryNode;
1007                        relNode.addOperand(factory.createPropertyFunctionQueryNode(
1008                                relNode, PropertyFunctionQueryNode.UPPER_CASE));
1009                        // get property name
1010                        node.jjtGetChild(1).jjtAccept(this, relNode);
1011                    } else if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_ORDER) {
1012                        ((OrderQueryNode) queryNode).setFunction(FN_UPPER_CASE.getLocalName());
1013                        node.childrenAccept(this, queryNode);
1014                    } else {
1015                        exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for fn:upper-case()"));
1016                    }
1017                } else {
1018                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong number of argument for fn:upper-case()"));
1019                }
1020            } else if (REP_NORMALIZE.equals(funName)) {
1021                if (node.jjtGetNumChildren() == 2) {
1022                    if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_ORDER) {
1023                        ((OrderQueryNode) queryNode).setFunction(REP_NORMALIZE.getLocalName());
1024                        node.childrenAccept(this, queryNode);
1025                    } else {
1026                        exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for rep:normalize()"));
1027                    }
1028                } else {
1029                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong number of argument for rep:normalize()"));
1030                }
1031            } else if (REP_SIMILAR.equals(funName)) {
1032                if (node.jjtGetNumChildren() == 3) {
1033                    if (queryNode instanceof NAryQueryNode) {
1034                        NAryQueryNode parent = (NAryQueryNode) queryNode;
1035                        RelationQueryNode rel = factory.createRelationQueryNode(
1036                                parent, RelationQueryNode.OPERATION_SIMILAR);
1037                        parent.addOperand(rel);
1038                        // assign path
1039                        node.jjtGetChild(1).jjtAccept(this, rel);
1040 
1041                        // get path string
1042                        node.jjtGetChild(2).jjtAccept(this, rel);
1043                        // check if string is set
1044                        if (rel.getStringValue() == null) {
1045                            exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException(
1046                                    "Second argument for rep:similar() must be of type string"));
1047                        }
1048                    } else {
1049                        exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException(
1050                                "Unsupported location for rep:similar()"));
1051                    }
1052                } else {
1053                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException(
1054                            "Wrong number of arguments for rep:similar()"));
1055                }
1056            } else if (REP_SPELLCHECK.equals(funName)
1057                    && queryNode.getType() != QueryNode.TYPE_PATH) {
1058                if (node.jjtGetNumChildren() == 2) {
1059                    if (queryNode instanceof NAryQueryNode) {
1060                        NAryQueryNode parent = (NAryQueryNode) queryNode;
1061                        RelationQueryNode rel = factory.createRelationQueryNode(
1062                                parent, RelationQueryNode.OPERATION_SPELLCHECK);
1063                        parent.addOperand(rel);
1064 
1065                        // get string to check
1066                        node.jjtGetChild(1).jjtAccept(this, rel);
1067                        // check if string is set
1068                        if (rel.getStringValue() == null) {
1069                            exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException(
1070                                    "Argument for rep:spellcheck() must be of type string"));
1071                        }
1072 
1073                        // set a dummy property name
1074                        rel.addPathElement(PATH_FACTORY.createElement(NameConstants.JCR_PRIMARYTYPE));
1075                    } else {
1076                        exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException(
1077                                "Unsupported location for rep:spellcheck()"));
1078                    }
1079                } else {
1080                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException(
1081                            "Wrong number of arguments for rep:spellcheck()"));
1082                }
1083            } else if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_RELATION) {
1084                // use function name as name of a pseudo property in a relation
1085                try {
1086                    Name name = resolver.getQName(fName + "()");
1087                    Path.Element element = PATH_FACTORY.createElement(name);
1088                    RelationQueryNode relNode = (RelationQueryNode) queryNode;
1089                    relNode.addPathElement(element);
1090                } catch (NameException e) {
1091                    exceptions.add(e);
1092                }
1093            } else if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_PATH) {
1094                // use function name as name of a pseudo property in select clause
1095                try {
1096                    Name name = resolver.getQName(fName + "()");
1097                    root.addSelectProperty(name);
1098                } catch (NameException e) {
1099                    exceptions.add(e);
1100                }
1101            } else {
1102                exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported function: " + fName));
1103            }
1104        } catch (NamespaceException e) {
1105            exceptions.add(e);
1106        } catch (IllegalNameException e) {
1107            exceptions.add(e);
1108        }
1109        return queryNode;
1110    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(SimpleNode node, QueryNode queryNode) {
        if (node.jjtGetNumChildren() == 3) {
            if (queryNode instanceof NAryQueryNode) {
                RelationQueryNode like = factory.createRelationQueryNode(
                        queryNode, RelationQueryNode.OPERATION_LIKE);
                ((NAryQueryNode) queryNode).addOperand(like);

                // assign property name
                node.jjtGetChild(1).jjtAccept(this, like);
                // check property name
                if (like.getRelativePath() == null) {
                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong first argument type for jcr:like"));
                }

                SimpleNode literal = (SimpleNode) node.jjtGetChild(2).jjtGetChild(0);
                if (literal.getId() == JJTSTRINGLITERAL) {
                    like.setStringValue(unescapeQuotes(literal.getValue()));
                } else {
                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong second argument type for jcr:like"));
                }
            } else {
                exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for function jcr:like"));
            }
        } else {
            // wrong number of arguments
            exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong number of arguments for jcr:like"));
        }
    }

817private QueryNode createFunction(SimpleNode node, QueryNode queryNode) {
818        // find out function name
819        String tmp = ((SimpleNode) node.jjtGetChild(0)).getValue();
820        String fName = tmp.substring(0, tmp.length() - 1);
821        try {
822            Name funName = resolver.getQName(fName);
823 
824            if (FN_NOT.equals(funName) || FN_NOT_10.equals(funName)) {
825                if (queryNode instanceof NAryQueryNode) {
826                    QueryNode not = factory.createNotQueryNode(queryNode);
827                    ((NAryQueryNode) queryNode).addOperand(not);
828                    // @todo is this needed?
829                    queryNode = not;
830                    // traverse
831                    if (node.jjtGetNumChildren() == 2) {
832                        node.jjtGetChild(1).jjtAccept(this, queryNode);
833                    } else {
834                        exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("fn:not only supports one expression argument"));
835                    }
836                } else {
837                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for function fn:not"));
838                }
839            } else if (XS_DATETIME.equals(funName)) {
840                // check arguments
841                if (node.jjtGetNumChildren() == 2) {
842                    if (queryNode instanceof RelationQueryNode) {
843                        RelationQueryNode rel = (RelationQueryNode) queryNode;
844                        SimpleNode literal = (SimpleNode) node.jjtGetChild(1).jjtGetChild(0);
845                        if (literal.getId() == JJTSTRINGLITERAL) {
846                            String value = literal.getValue();
847                            // strip quotes
848                            value = value.substring(1, value.length() - 1);
849                            Calendar c = ISO8601.parse(value);
850                            if (c == null) {
851                                exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unable to parse string literal for xs:dateTime: " + value));
852                            } else {
853                                rel.setDateValue(c.getTime());
854                            }
855                        } else {
856                            exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong argument type for xs:dateTime"));
857                        }
858                    } else {
859                        exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for function xs:dateTime"));
860                    }
861                } else {
862                    // wrong number of arguments
863                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong number of arguments for xs:dateTime"));
864                }
865            } else if (JCR_CONTAINS.equals(funName)) {
866                // check number of arguments
867                if (node.jjtGetNumChildren() == 3) {
868                    if (queryNode instanceof NAryQueryNode) {
869                        SimpleNode literal = (SimpleNode) node.jjtGetChild(2).jjtGetChild(0);
870                        if (literal.getId() == JJTSTRINGLITERAL) {
871                            TextsearchQueryNode contains = factory.createTextsearchQueryNode(
872                                    queryNode, unescapeQuotes(literal.getValue()));
873                            // assign property name
874                            SimpleNode path = (SimpleNode) node.jjtGetChild(1);
875                            path.jjtAccept(this, contains);
876                            ((NAryQueryNode) queryNode).addOperand(contains);
877                        } else {
878                            exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong argument type for jcr:contains"));
879                        }
880                    }
881                } else {
882                    // wrong number of arguments
883                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong number of arguments for jcr:contains"));
884                }
885            } else if (JCR_LIKE.equals(funName)) {
886                // check number of arguments
887                if (node.jjtGetNumChildren() == 3) {
888                    if (queryNode instanceof NAryQueryNode) {
889                        RelationQueryNode like = factory.createRelationQueryNode(
890                                queryNode, RelationQueryNode.OPERATION_LIKE);
891                        ((NAryQueryNode) queryNode).addOperand(like);
892 
893                        // assign property name
894                        node.jjtGetChild(1).jjtAccept(this, like);
895                        // check property name
896                        if (like.getRelativePath() == null) {
897                            exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong first argument type for jcr:like"));
898                        }
899 
900                        SimpleNode literal = (SimpleNode) node.jjtGetChild(2).jjtGetChild(0);
901                        if (literal.getId() == JJTSTRINGLITERAL) {
902                            like.setStringValue(unescapeQuotes(literal.getValue()));
903                        } else {
904                            exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong second argument type for jcr:like"));
905                        }
906                    } else {
907                        exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for function jcr:like"));
908                    }
909                } else {
910                    // wrong number of arguments
911                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Wrong number of arguments for jcr:like"));
912                }
913            } else if (FN_TRUE.equals(funName)) {
914                if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_RELATION) {
915                    RelationQueryNode rel = (RelationQueryNode) queryNode;
916                    rel.setStringValue("true");
917                } else {
918                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for true()"));
919                }
920            } else if (FN_FALSE.equals(funName)) {
921                if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_RELATION) {
922                    RelationQueryNode rel = (RelationQueryNode) queryNode;
923                    rel.setStringValue("false");
924                } else {
925                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for false()"));
926                }
927            } else if (FN_POSITION.equals(funName)) {
928                if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_RELATION) {
929                    RelationQueryNode rel = (RelationQueryNode) queryNode;
930                    if (rel.getOperation() == RelationQueryNode.OPERATION_EQ_GENERAL) {
931                        // set dummy value to set type of relation query node
932                        // will be overwritten when the tree is further parsed.
933                        rel.setPositionValue(1);
934                        rel.addPathElement(PATH_FACTORY.createElement(FN_POSITION_FULL));
935                    } else {
936                        exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported expression with position(). Only = is supported."));
937                    }
938                } else {
939                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for position()"));
940                }
941            } else if (FN_FIRST.equals(funName)) {
942                if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_RELATION) {
943                    ((RelationQueryNode) queryNode).setPositionValue(1);
944                } else if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_LOCATION) {
945                    ((LocationStepQueryNode) queryNode).setIndex(1);
946                } else {
947                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for first()"));
948                }
949            } else if (FN_LAST.equals(funName)) {
950                if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_RELATION) {
951                    ((RelationQueryNode) queryNode).setPositionValue(LocationStepQueryNode.LAST);
952                } else if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_LOCATION) {
953                    ((LocationStepQueryNode) queryNode).setIndex(LocationStepQueryNode.LAST);
954                } else {
955                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for last()"));
956                }
957            } else if (JCR_DEREF.equals(funName)) {
958                // check number of arguments
959                if (node.jjtGetNumChildren() == 3) {
960                    boolean descendant = false;
961                    if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_LOCATION) {
962                        LocationStepQueryNode loc = (LocationStepQueryNode) queryNode;
963                        // remember if descendant axis
964                        descendant = loc.getIncludeDescendants();
965                        queryNode = loc.getParent();
966                        ((NAryQueryNode) queryNode).removeOperand(loc);
967                    }
968                    if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_PATH) {
969                        PathQueryNode pathNode = (PathQueryNode) queryNode;
970 
971                        pathNode.addPathStep(createDerefQueryNode(node, descendant, pathNode));
972                    } else if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_RELATION) {
973                        RelationQueryNode relNode = (RelationQueryNode) queryNode;
974                        DerefQueryNode deref = createDerefQueryNode(node, descendant, relNode.getRelativePath());
975                        relNode.getRelativePath().addPathStep(deref);
976                    } else {
977                        exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for jcr:deref()"));
978                    }
979                }
980            } else if (JCR_SCORE.equals(funName)) {
981                if (queryNode.getType() == QueryNode.TYPE_ORDER) {
982                    setOrderSpecPath(node, (OrderQueryNode) queryNode);
983                } else {
984                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException("Unsupported location for jcr:score()"));
985                }
986            } else if (FN_LOWER_CASE.equals(funName)) {

999                    }
1000                } else {

1002                }
1003            } else if (FN_UPPER_CASE.equals(funName)) {

Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(SimpleNode node, QueryNode queryNode) {
        if (node.jjtGetNumChildren() == 2) {
            if (queryNode instanceof NAryQueryNode) {
                NAryQueryNode parent = (NAryQueryNode) queryNode;
                RelationQueryNode rel = factory.createRelationQueryNode(
                        parent, RelationQueryNode.OPERATION_SPELLCHECK);
                parent.addOperand(rel);

                // get string to check
                node.jjtGetChild(1).jjtAccept(this, rel);
                // check if string is set
                if (rel.getStringValue() == null) {
                    exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException(
                            "Argument for rep:spellcheck() must be of type string"));
                }

                // set a dummy property name
                rel.addPathElement(PATH_FACTORY.createElement(NameConstants.JCR_PRIMARYTYPE));
            } else {
                exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException(
                        "Unsupported location for rep:spellcheck()"));
            }
        } else {
            exceptions.add(new InvalidQueryException(
                    "Wrong number of arguments for rep:spellcheck()"));
        }
    }

1180@Override
1181        protected void doEndElement(String uri, String name, String qName) {
1182            if (in("CopyObjectResult") || in("CopyPartResult")) {
1183                if (name.equals("LastModified")) {
1184                    result.setLastModifiedDate(ServiceUtils.parseIso8601Date(getText()));
1185                } else if (name.equals("ETag")) {
1186                    result.setETag(ServiceUtils.removeQuotes(getText()));
1187                }
1188            } else if (in("Error")) {
1189                if (name.equals("Code")) {
1190                    errorCode = getText();
1191                } else if (name.equals("Message")) {
1192                    errorMessage = getText();
1193                } else if (name.equals("RequestId")) {
1194                    errorRequestId = getText();
1195                } else if (name.equals("HostId")) {
1196                    errorHostId = getText();
1197                }
1198            }
1199        }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(String name) {
    if (name.equals("Code")) {
        errorCode = getText();
    } else if (name.equals("Message")) {
        errorMessage = getText();
    } else if (name.equals("RequestId")) {
        errorRequestId = getText();
    } else if (name.equals("HostId")) {
        errorHostId = getText();
    }
}

1627@Override
1628        protected void doEndElement(String uri, String name, String qName) {
1629            if (atTopLevel()) {
1630                if (name.equals("Error")) {
1631                    if (ase != null) {
1632                        ase.setErrorCode(errorCode);
1633                        ase.setRequestId(requestId);
1634                        ase.setExtendedRequestId(hostId);
1635                    }
1636                }
1637            } else if (in("CompleteMultipartUploadResult")) {
1638                if (name.equals("Location")) {
1639                    result.setLocation(getText());
1640                } else if (name.equals("Bucket")) {
1641                    result.setBucketName(getText());
1642                } else if (name.equals("Key")) {
1643                    result.setKey(getText());
1644                } else if (name.equals("ETag")) {
1645                    result.setETag(ServiceUtils.removeQuotes(getText()));
1646                }
1647            } else if (in("Error")) {
1648                if (name.equals("Code")) {
1649                    errorCode = getText();
1650                } else if (name.equals("Message")) {
1651                    ase = new AmazonS3Exception(getText());
1652                } else if (name.equals("RequestId")) {
1653                    requestId = getText();
1654                } else if (name.equals("HostId")) {
1655                    hostId = getText();
1656                }
1657            }
1658        }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(String name) {
    if (name.equals("Code")) {
        errorCode = getText();
    } else if (name.equals("Message")) {
        ase = new AmazonS3Exception(getText());
    } else if (name.equals("RequestId")) {
        requestId = getText();
    } else if (name.equals("HostId")) {
        hostId = getText();
    }
}

Original Clone: 
35public static ActionRequestValidationException validate(
36        RoleDescriptor roleDescriptor,
37        ActionRequestValidationException validationException
38    ) {
39        if (roleDescriptor.getName() == null) {
40            validationException = addValidationError("role name is missing", validationException);
41        }
42        if (roleDescriptor.getClusterPrivileges() != null) {
43            for (String cp : roleDescriptor.getClusterPrivileges()) {
44                try {
45                    ClusterPrivilegeResolver.resolve(cp);
46                } catch (IllegalArgumentException ile) {
47                    validationException = addValidationError(ile.getMessage(), validationException);
48                }
49            }
50        }
51        if (roleDescriptor.getIndicesPrivileges() != null) {
52            for (RoleDescriptor.IndicesPrivileges idp : roleDescriptor.getIndicesPrivileges()) {
53                try {
54                    IndexPrivilege.resolveBySelectorAccess(Set.of(idp.getPrivileges()));
55                } catch (IllegalArgumentException ile) {
56                    validationException = addValidationError(ile.getMessage(), validationException);
57                }
58                for (final String indexName : idp.getIndices()) {
59                    validationException = validateIndexNameExpression(indexName, validationException);
60                }
61            }
62        }
63        final RoleDescriptor.RemoteIndicesPrivileges[] remoteIndicesPrivileges = roleDescriptor.getRemoteIndicesPrivileges();
64        for (RoleDescriptor.RemoteIndicesPrivileges ridp : remoteIndicesPrivileges) {
65            if (Arrays.asList(ridp.remoteClusters()).contains("")) {
66                validationException = addValidationError("remote index cluster alias cannot be an empty string", validationException);
67            }
68            try {
69                Set<IndexPrivilege> privileges = IndexPrivilege.resolveBySelectorAccess(Set.of(ridp.indicesPrivileges().getPrivileges()));
70                if (privileges.stream().anyMatch(p -> p.getSelectorPredicate() == IndexComponentSelectorPredicate.FAILURES)) {
71                    validationException = addValidationError(
72                        "remote index privileges cannot contain privileges that grant access to the failure store",
73                        validationException
74                    );
75                }
76            } catch (IllegalArgumentException ile) {
77                validationException = addValidationError(ile.getMessage(), validationException);
78            }
79            for (String indexName : ridp.indicesPrivileges().getIndices()) {
80                validationException = validateIndexNameExpression(indexName, validationException);
81            }
82        }
83        if (roleDescriptor.hasRemoteClusterPermissions()) {
84            try {
85                roleDescriptor.getRemoteClusterPermissions().validate();
86            } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
87                validationException = addValidationError(e.getMessage(), validationException);
88            }
89        }
90        if (roleDescriptor.getApplicationPrivileges() != null) {
91            for (RoleDescriptor.ApplicationResourcePrivileges privilege : roleDescriptor.getApplicationPrivileges()) {
92                try {
93                    ApplicationPrivilege.validateApplicationNameOrWildcard(privilege.getApplication());
94                } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
95                    validationException = addValidationError(e.getMessage(), validationException);
96                }
97                for (String privilegeName : privilege.getPrivileges()) {
98                    try {
99                        ApplicationPrivilege.validatePrivilegeOrActionName(privilegeName);
100                    } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
101                        validationException = addValidationError(e.getMessage(), validationException);
102                    }
103                }
104            }
105        }
106        if (roleDescriptor.getMetadata() != null && MetadataUtils.containsReservedMetadata(roleDescriptor.getMetadata())) {
107            validationException = addValidationError(
108                "role descriptor metadata keys may not start with [" + MetadataUtils.RESERVED_PREFIX + "]",
109                validationException
110            );
111        }
112        if (roleDescriptor.hasWorkflowsRestriction()) {
113            for (String workflowName : roleDescriptor.getRestriction().getWorkflows()) {
114                try {
115                    WorkflowResolver.resolveWorkflowByName(workflowName);
116                } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
117                    validationException = addValidationError(e.getMessage(), validationException);
118                }
119            }
120        }
121        if (roleDescriptor.hasDescription()) {
122            Validation.Error error = Validation.Roles.validateRoleDescription(roleDescriptor.getDescription());
123            if (error != null) {
124                validationException = addValidationError(error.toString(), validationException);
125            }
126        }
127        return validationException;
128    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private static ActionRequestValidationException extracted(RoleDescriptor roleDescriptor, ActionRequestValidationException validationException) {
    if (roleDescriptor.getClusterPrivileges() != null) {
        for (String cp : roleDescriptor.getClusterPrivileges()) {
            try {
                ClusterPrivilegeResolver.resolve(cp);
            } catch (IllegalArgumentException ile) {
                validationException = addValidationError(ile.getMessage(), validationException);
            }
        }
    }
    return validationException;
}

35public static ActionRequestValidationException validate(
36        RoleDescriptor roleDescriptor,
37        ActionRequestValidationException validationException
38    ) {
39        if (roleDescriptor.getName() == null) {
40            validationException = addValidationError("role name is missing", validationException);
41        }
42        if (roleDescriptor.getClusterPrivileges() != null) {
43            for (String cp : roleDescriptor.getClusterPrivileges()) {
44                try {
45                    ClusterPrivilegeResolver.resolve(cp);
46                } catch (IllegalArgumentException ile) {
47                    validationException = addValidationError(ile.getMessage(), validationException);
48                }
49            }
50        }
51        if (roleDescriptor.getIndicesPrivileges() != null) {
52            for (RoleDescriptor.IndicesPrivileges idp : roleDescriptor.getIndicesPrivileges()) {
53                try {
54                    IndexPrivilege.resolveBySelectorAccess(Set.of(idp.getPrivileges()));
55                } catch (IllegalArgumentException ile) {
56                    validationException = addValidationError(ile.getMessage(), validationException);
57                }
58                for (final String indexName : idp.getIndices()) {
59                    validationException = validateIndexNameExpression(indexName, validationException);
60                }
61            }
62        }
63        final RoleDescriptor.RemoteIndicesPrivileges[] remoteIndicesPrivileges = roleDescriptor.getRemoteIndicesPrivileges();
64        for (RoleDescriptor.RemoteIndicesPrivileges ridp : remoteIndicesPrivileges) {
65            if (Arrays.asList(ridp.remoteClusters()).contains("")) {
66                validationException = addValidationError("remote index cluster alias cannot be an empty string", validationException);
67            }
68            try {
69                Set<IndexPrivilege> privileges = IndexPrivilege.resolveBySelectorAccess(Set.of(ridp.indicesPrivileges().getPrivileges()));
70                if (privileges.stream().anyMatch(p -> p.getSelectorPredicate() == IndexComponentSelectorPredicate.FAILURES)) {
71                    validationException = addValidationError(
72                        "remote index privileges cannot contain privileges that grant access to the failure store",
73                        validationException
74                    );
75                }
76            } catch (IllegalArgumentException ile) {
77                validationException = addValidationError(ile.getMessage(), validationException);
78            }
79            for (String indexName : ridp.indicesPrivileges().getIndices()) {
80                validationException = validateIndexNameExpression(indexName, validationException);
81            }
82        }
83        if (roleDescriptor.hasRemoteClusterPermissions()) {
84            try {
85                roleDescriptor.getRemoteClusterPermissions().validate();
86            } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
87                validationException = addValidationError(e.getMessage(), validationException);
88            }
89        }
90        if (roleDescriptor.getApplicationPrivileges() != null) {
91            for (RoleDescriptor.ApplicationResourcePrivileges privilege : roleDescriptor.getApplicationPrivileges()) {
92                try {
93                    ApplicationPrivilege.validateApplicationNameOrWildcard(privilege.getApplication());
94                } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
95                    validationException = addValidationError(e.getMessage(), validationException);
96                }
97                for (String privilegeName : privilege.getPrivileges()) {
98                    try {
99                        ApplicationPrivilege.validatePrivilegeOrActionName(privilegeName);
100                    } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
101                        validationException = addValidationError(e.getMessage(), validationException);
102                    }
103                }
104            }
105        }
106        if (roleDescriptor.getMetadata() != null && MetadataUtils.containsReservedMetadata(roleDescriptor.getMetadata())) {
107            validationException = addValidationError(
108                "role descriptor metadata keys may not start with [" + MetadataUtils.RESERVED_PREFIX + "]",
109                validationException
110            );
111        }
112        if (roleDescriptor.hasWorkflowsRestriction()) {
113            for (String workflowName : roleDescriptor.getRestriction().getWorkflows()) {
114                try {
115                    WorkflowResolver.resolveWorkflowByName(workflowName);
116                } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
117                    validationException = addValidationError(e.getMessage(), validationException);
118                }
119            }
120        }
121        if (roleDescriptor.hasDescription()) {
122            Validation.Error error = Validation.Roles.validateRoleDescription(roleDescriptor.getDescription());
123            if (error != null) {
124                validationException = addValidationError(error.toString(), validationException);
125            }
126        }
127        return validationException;
128    }

private static ActionRequestValidationException extracted(RoleDescriptor roleDescriptor, ActionRequestValidationException validationException) {
    if (roleDescriptor.hasWorkflowsRestriction()) {
        for (String workflowName : roleDescriptor.getRestriction().getWorkflows()) {
            try {
                WorkflowResolver.resolveWorkflowByName(workflowName);
            } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                validationException = addValidationError(e.getMessage(), validationException);
            }
        }
    }
    return validationException;
}

400@Override
401    public ChannelHandlerContext fireChannelWritabilityChanged() {
402        AbstractChannelHandlerContext next = findContextInbound(MASK_CHANNEL_WRITABILITY_CHANGED);
403        if (next.executor().inEventLoop()) {
404            if (next.invokeHandler()) {
405                try {
406                    // DON'T CHANGE
407                    // Duplex handlers implements both out/in interfaces causing a scalability issue
408                    // see https://bugs.openjdk.org/browse/JDK-8180450
409                    final ChannelHandler handler = next.handler();
410                    final DefaultChannelPipeline.HeadContext headContext = pipeline.head;
411                    if (handler == headContext) {
412                        headContext.channelWritabilityChanged(next);
413                    } else if (handler instanceof ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter) {
414                        ((ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter) handler).channelWritabilityChanged(next);
415                    } else {
416                        ((ChannelInboundHandler) handler).channelWritabilityChanged(next);
417                    }
418                } catch (Throwable t) {
419                    next.invokeExceptionCaught(t);
420                }
421            } else {
422                next.fireChannelWritabilityChanged();
423            }
424        } else {
425            next.executor().execute(getInvokeTasks().fireChannelWritabilityChangedTask);
426        }
427        return this;
428    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(AbstractChannelHandlerContext next) {
        if (next.invokeHandler()) {
            try {
                // DON'T CHANGE
                // Duplex handlers implements both out/in interfaces causing a scalability issue
                // see https://bugs.openjdk.org/browse/JDK-8180450
                final ChannelHandler handler = next.handler();
                final DefaultChannelPipeline.HeadContext headContext = pipeline.head;
                if (handler == headContext) {
                    headContext.channelWritabilityChanged(next);
                } else if (handler instanceof ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter) {
                    ((ChannelInboundHandlerAdapter) handler).channelWritabilityChanged(next);
                } else {
                    ((ChannelInboundHandler) handler).channelWritabilityChanged(next);
                }
            } catch (Throwable t) {
                next.invokeExceptionCaught(t);
            }
        } else {
            next.fireChannelWritabilityChanged();
        }
    }

370@Override
371    public ChannelHandlerContext fireChannelReadComplete() {
372        AbstractChannelHandlerContext next = findContextInbound(MASK_CHANNEL_READ_COMPLETE);
373        if (next.executor().inEventLoop()) {
374            if (next.invokeHandler()) {
375                try {
376                    // DON'T CHANGE
377                    // Duplex handlers implements both out/in interfaces causing a scalability issue
378                    // see https://bugs.openjdk.org/browse/JDK-8180450
379                    final ChannelHandler handler = next.handler();
380                    final DefaultChannelPipeline.HeadContext headContext = pipeline.head;
381                    if (handler == headContext) {
382                        headContext.channelReadComplete(next);
383                    } else if (handler instanceof ChannelDuplexHandler) {
384                        ((ChannelDuplexHandler) handler).channelReadComplete(next);
385                    } else {
386                        ((ChannelInboundHandler) handler).channelReadComplete(next);
387                    }
388                } catch (Throwable t) {
389                    next.invokeExceptionCaught(t);
390                }
391            } else {
392                next.fireChannelReadComplete();
393            }
394        } else {
395            next.executor().execute(getInvokeTasks().fireChannelReadCompleteTask);
396        }
397        return this;
398    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void extracted(AbstractChannelHandlerContext next) {
        if (next.invokeHandler()) {
            try {
                // DON'T CHANGE
                // Duplex handlers implements both out/in interfaces causing a scalability issue
                // see https://bugs.openjdk.org/browse/JDK-8180450
                final ChannelHandler handler = next.handler();
                final DefaultChannelPipeline.HeadContext headContext = pipeline.head;
                if (handler == headContext) {
                    headContext.channelReadComplete(next);
                } else if (handler instanceof ChannelDuplexHandler) {
                    ((ChannelDuplexHandler) handler).channelReadComplete(next);
                } else {
                    ((ChannelInboundHandler) handler).channelReadComplete(next);
                }
            } catch (Throwable t) {
                next.invokeExceptionCaught(t);
            }
        } else {
            next.fireChannelReadComplete();
        }
    }

331private static Map<StreamId, StreamCheckpoint> getSliceColumnCheckpoints(
332            int column,
333            int sequence,
334            ColumnEncodingKind encoding,
335            boolean compressed,
336            Set<StreamKind> availableStreams,
337            ColumnPositionsList positionsList)
338    {
339        ImmutableMap.Builder<StreamId, StreamCheckpoint> checkpoints = ImmutableMap.builder();
340 
341        if (availableStreams.contains(IN_MAP)) {
342            checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, IN_MAP), new BooleanStreamCheckpoint(compressed, positionsList));
343        }
344 
345        if (availableStreams.contains(PRESENT)) {
346            checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, PRESENT), new BooleanStreamCheckpoint(compressed, positionsList));
347        }
348 
349        if (encoding == DIRECT || encoding == DIRECT_V2) {
350            if (availableStreams.contains(DATA)) {
351                checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, DATA), new ByteArrayStreamCheckpoint(compressed, positionsList));
352            }
353 
354            if (availableStreams.contains(LENGTH)) {
355                checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, LENGTH), createLongStreamCheckpoint(encoding, compressed, positionsList));
356            }
357        }
358        else if (encoding == DICTIONARY || encoding == DICTIONARY_V2) {
359            // DWRF has rules inconsistent with the ORC style
360            if (availableStreams.contains(IN_DICTIONARY)) {
361                if (availableStreams.contains(ROW_GROUP_DICTIONARY)) {
362                    checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, ROW_GROUP_DICTIONARY), new ByteArrayStreamCheckpoint(compressed, positionsList));
363                }
364 
365                checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, ROW_GROUP_DICTIONARY_LENGTH), new RowGroupDictionaryLengthStreamCheckpoint(compressed, positionsList));
366 
367                if (availableStreams.contains(DATA)) {
368                    checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, DATA), createLongStreamCheckpoint(encoding, compressed, positionsList));
369                }
370 
371                checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, IN_DICTIONARY), new BooleanStreamCheckpoint(compressed, positionsList));
372            }
373            else {
374                if (availableStreams.contains(DATA)) {
375                    checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, DATA), createLongStreamCheckpoint(encoding, compressed, positionsList));
376                }
377            }
378        }
379        else {
380            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Unsupported encoding for slice column: " + encoding);
381        }
382 
383        return checkpoints.build();
384    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private static void extracted(int column, int sequence, ColumnEncodingKind encoding, boolean compressed, Set<StreamKind> availableStreams, ColumnPositionsList positionsList) {
    if (availableStreams.contains(IN_DICTIONARY)) {
        if (availableStreams.contains(ROW_GROUP_DICTIONARY)) {
            checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, ROW_GROUP_DICTIONARY), new ByteArrayStreamCheckpoint(compressed, positionsList));
        }

        checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, ROW_GROUP_DICTIONARY_LENGTH), new RowGroupDictionaryLengthStreamCheckpoint(compressed, positionsList));

        if (availableStreams.contains(DATA)) {
            checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, DATA), createLongStreamCheckpoint(encoding, compressed, positionsList));
        }

        checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, IN_DICTIONARY), new BooleanStreamCheckpoint(compressed, positionsList));
    }
    else {
        if (availableStreams.contains(DATA)) {
            checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, DATA), createLongStreamCheckpoint(encoding, compressed, positionsList));
        }
    }
}

331private static Map<StreamId, StreamCheckpoint> getSliceColumnCheckpoints(
332            int column,
333            int sequence,
334            ColumnEncodingKind encoding,
335            boolean compressed,
336            Set<StreamKind> availableStreams,
337            ColumnPositionsList positionsList)
338    {

340 
341        if (availableStreams.contains(IN_MAP)) {
342            checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, IN_MAP), new BooleanStreamCheckpoint(compressed, positionsList));
343        }
344

346            checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, PRESENT), new BooleanStreamCheckpoint(compressed, positionsList));
347        }
348

351                checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, DATA), new ByteArrayStreamCheckpoint(compressed, positionsList));
352            }
353 
354            if (availableStreams.contains(LENGTH)) {
355                checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, LENGTH), createLongStreamCheckpoint(encoding, compressed, positionsList));
356            }
357        }
358        else if (encoding == DICTIONARY || encoding == DICTIONARY_V2) {
359            // DWRF has rules inconsistent with the ORC style
360            if (availableStreams.contains(IN_DICTIONARY)) {
361                if (availableStreams.contains(ROW_GROUP_DICTIONARY)) {

363                }

private static void extracted(int column, int sequence, ColumnEncodingKind encoding, boolean compressed, Set<StreamKind> availableStreams, ColumnPositionsList positionsList) {
    if (availableStreams.contains(ROW_GROUP_DICTIONARY)) {
        checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, ROW_GROUP_DICTIONARY), new ByteArrayStreamCheckpoint(compressed, positionsList));
    }

    checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, ROW_GROUP_DICTIONARY_LENGTH), new RowGroupDictionaryLengthStreamCheckpoint(compressed, positionsList));

    if (availableStreams.contains(DATA)) {
        checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, DATA), createLongStreamCheckpoint(encoding, compressed, positionsList));
    }

    checkpoints.put(new StreamId(column, sequence, IN_DICTIONARY), new BooleanStreamCheckpoint(compressed, positionsList));
}

484protected String getFilterPathFromAnnotation(boolean isServlet)
485	{
486		String[] patterns = null;
487 
488		if (isServlet)
489		{
490			WebServlet servlet = getClass().getAnnotation(WebServlet.class);
491			if (servlet != null)
492			{
493				if (servlet.urlPatterns().length > 0)
494				{
495					patterns = servlet.urlPatterns();
496				}
497				else
498				{
499					patterns = servlet.value();
500				}
501			}
502		}
503		else
504		{
505			WebFilter filter = getClass().getAnnotation(WebFilter.class);
506			if (filter != null)
507			{
508				if (filter.urlPatterns().length > 0)
509				{
510					patterns = filter.urlPatterns();
511				}
512				else
513				{
514					patterns = filter.value();
515				}
516			}
517		}
518 
519		if (patterns != null && patterns.length > 0)
520		{
521			String pattern = patterns[0];
522			if (patterns.length > 1)
523			{
524				log.warn(
525						"Multiple url patterns defined for Wicket filter/servlet, using the first: {}",
526						pattern);
527			}
528 
529			if ("/*".equals(pattern))
530			{
531				pattern = "";
532			}
533 
534			if (pattern.endsWith("*"))
535			{
536				pattern = pattern.substring(0, pattern.length() - 1);
537			}
538			return pattern;
539		}
540		return null;
541	}
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private String[] extracted(String[] patterns) {
    WebServlet servlet = getClass().getAnnotation(WebServlet.class);
    if (servlet != null) {
        if (servlet.urlPatterns().length > 0) {
            patterns = servlet.urlPatterns();
        } else {
            patterns = servlet.value();
        }
    }
    return patterns;
}

484protected String getFilterPathFromAnnotation(boolean isServlet)
485	{
486		String[] patterns = null;
487

489		{

492			{

Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private String[] extracted(String[] patterns) {
    WebFilter filter = getClass().getAnnotation(WebFilter.class);
    if (filter != null) {
        if (filter.urlPatterns().length > 0) {
            patterns = filter.urlPatterns();
        } else {
            patterns = filter.value();
        }
    }
    return patterns;
}

private String[] extracted(String[] patterns) {
