64@Override
65    public Integer doProcessWatchCall() throws Exception {
66        List<Row> rows = new ArrayList<>();
67 
68        List<Long> pids = findPids(name);
69        ProcessHandle.allProcesses()
70                .filter(ph -> pids.contains(ph.pid()))
71                .forEach(ph -> {
72                    JsonObject root = loadStatus(ph.pid());
73                    if (root != null) {
74                        Row row = new Row();
75                        row.pid = Long.toString(ph.pid());
76                        JsonObject context = (JsonObject) root.get("context");
77                        if (context == null) {
78                            return;
79                        }
80                        row.name = context.getString("name");
81                        if ("CamelJBang".equals(row.name)) {
82                            row.name = ProcessHelper.extractName(root, ph);
83                        }
84                        JsonObject vaults = (JsonObject) root.get("vaults");
85                        if (vaults != null) {
86                            JsonObject aws = (JsonObject) vaults.get("aws-secrets");
87                            if (aws != null) {
88                                row.vault = "AWS";
89                                row.region = aws.getString("region");
90                                row.lastCheck = aws.getLongOrDefault("lastCheckTimestamp", 0);
91                                row.lastReload = aws.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
92                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) aws.get("secrets");
93                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
94                                    if (i > 0) {
95                                        // create a copy for 2+ secrets
96                                        row = row.copy();
97                                    }
98                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
99                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
100                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
101                                    rows.add(row);
102                                }
103                            }
104                            JsonObject gcp = (JsonObject) vaults.get("gcp-secrets");
105                            if (gcp != null) {
106                                row.vault = "GCP";
107                                row.lastCheck = gcp.getLongOrDefault("lastCheckTimestamp", 0);
108                                row.lastReload = gcp.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
109                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) gcp.get("secrets");
110                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
111                                    if (i > 0) {
112                                        // create a copy for 2+ secrets
113                                        row = row.copy();
114                                    }
115                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
116                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
117                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
118                                    rows.add(row);
119                                }
120                            }
121                            JsonObject azure = (JsonObject) vaults.get("azure-secrets");
122                            if (azure != null) {
123                                row.vault = "Azure";
124                                row.lastCheck = azure.getLongOrDefault("lastCheckTimestamp", 0);
125                                row.lastReload = azure.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
126                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) azure.get("secrets");
127                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
128                                    if (i > 0) {
129                                        // create a copy for 2+ secrets
130                                        row = row.copy();
131                                    }
132                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
133                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
134                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
135                                    rows.add(row);
136                                }
137                            }
138 
139                            JsonObject kubernetes = (JsonObject) vaults.get("kubernetes-secrets");
140                            if (kubernetes != null) {
141                                row.vault = "Kubernetes";
142                                row.lastCheck = kubernetes.getLongOrDefault("startCheckTimestamp", 0);
143                                row.lastReload = kubernetes.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
144                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) kubernetes.get("secrets");
145                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
146                                    if (i > 0) {
147                                        // create a copy for 2+ secrets
148                                        row = row.copy();
149                                    }
150                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
151                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
152                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
153                                    rows.add(row);
154                                }
155                            }
156 
157                            JsonObject hashicorp = (JsonObject) vaults.get("hashicorp-secrets");
158                            if (hashicorp != null) {
159                                row.vault = "Hashicorp";
160                                row.lastCheck = hashicorp.getLongOrDefault("startCheckTimestamp", 0);
161                                row.lastReload = hashicorp.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
162                                rows.add(row);
163                            }
164 
165                            JsonObject cmKubernetes = (JsonObject) vaults.get("kubernetes-configmaps");
166                            if (cmKubernetes != null) {
167                                row.vault = "Kubernetes-cm";
168                                row.lastCheck = cmKubernetes.getLongOrDefault("startCheckTimestamp", 0);
169                                row.lastReload = cmKubernetes.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
170                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) cmKubernetes.get("configmap");
171                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
172                                    if (i > 0) {
173                                        // create a copy for 2+ configmap
174                                        row = row.copy();
175                                    }
176                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
177                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
178                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
179                                    rows.add(row);
180                                }
181                            }
182                        }
183                    }
184                });
185 
186        // sort rows
187        rows.sort(this::sortRow);
188 
189        if (!rows.isEmpty()) {
190            printer().println(AsciiTable.getTable(AsciiTable.NO_BORDERS, rows, Arrays.asList(
191                    new Column().header("PID").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.CENTER).with(r -> r.pid),
192                    new Column().header("NAME").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).maxWidth(40, OverflowBehaviour.ELLIPSIS_RIGHT)
193                            .with(r -> r.name),
194                    new Column().header("VAULT").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).with(r -> r.vault),
195                    new Column().header("REGION").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).with(r -> r.region),
196                    new Column().header("SECRET").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).maxWidth(40, OverflowBehaviour.ELLIPSIS_RIGHT)
197                            .with(r -> r.secret),
198                    new Column().header("AGE").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.CENTER).with(this::getAgo),
199                    new Column().header("UPDATE").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).with(this::getReloadAgo),
200                    new Column().header("CHECK").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).with(this::getCheckAgo))));
201        }
202 
203        return 0;
204    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void processKubernetesVault(JsonObject kubernetes, Row row, List<Row> rows) {
    if (kubernetes != null) {
        row.vault = "Kubernetes";
        row.lastCheck = kubernetes.getLongOrDefault("startCheckTimestamp", 0);
        row.lastReload = kubernetes.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
        JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) kubernetes.get("secrets");
        for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
            if (i > 0) {
                row = row.copy();
            }
            JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
            row.secret = jo.getString("name");
            row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
            rows.add(row);
        }
    }
}

64@Override
65    public Integer doProcessWatchCall() throws Exception {
66        List<Row> rows = new ArrayList<>();
67 
68        List<Long> pids = findPids(name);
69        ProcessHandle.allProcesses()
70                .filter(ph -> pids.contains(ph.pid()))
71                .forEach(ph -> {
72                    JsonObject root = loadStatus(ph.pid());
73                    if (root != null) {
74                        Row row = new Row();
75                        row.pid = Long.toString(ph.pid());
76                        JsonObject context = (JsonObject) root.get("context");
77                        if (context == null) {
78                            return;
79                        }
80                        row.name = context.getString("name");
81                        if ("CamelJBang".equals(row.name)) {
82                            row.name = ProcessHelper.extractName(root, ph);
83                        }
84                        JsonObject vaults = (JsonObject) root.get("vaults");
85                        if (vaults != null) {
86                            JsonObject aws = (JsonObject) vaults.get("aws-secrets");
87                            if (aws != null) {
88                                row.vault = "AWS";
89                                row.region = aws.getString("region");
90                                row.lastCheck = aws.getLongOrDefault("lastCheckTimestamp", 0);
91                                row.lastReload = aws.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
92                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) aws.get("secrets");
93                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
94                                    if (i > 0) {
95                                        // create a copy for 2+ secrets
96                                        row = row.copy();
97                                    }
98                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
99                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
100                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
101                                    rows.add(row);
102                                }
103                            }
104                            JsonObject gcp = (JsonObject) vaults.get("gcp-secrets");
105                            if (gcp != null) {
106                                row.vault = "GCP";
107                                row.lastCheck = gcp.getLongOrDefault("lastCheckTimestamp", 0);
108                                row.lastReload = gcp.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
109                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) gcp.get("secrets");
110                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
111                                    if (i > 0) {
112                                        // create a copy for 2+ secrets
113                                        row = row.copy();
114                                    }
115                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
116                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
117                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
118                                    rows.add(row);
119                                }
120                            }
121                            JsonObject azure = (JsonObject) vaults.get("azure-secrets");
122                            if (azure != null) {
123                                row.vault = "Azure";
124                                row.lastCheck = azure.getLongOrDefault("lastCheckTimestamp", 0);
125                                row.lastReload = azure.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
126                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) azure.get("secrets");
127                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
128                                    if (i > 0) {
129                                        // create a copy for 2+ secrets
130                                        row = row.copy();
131                                    }
132                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
133                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
134                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
135                                    rows.add(row);
136                                }
137                            }
138 
139                            JsonObject kubernetes = (JsonObject) vaults.get("kubernetes-secrets");
140                            if (kubernetes != null) {
141                                row.vault = "Kubernetes";
142                                row.lastCheck = kubernetes.getLongOrDefault("startCheckTimestamp", 0);
143                                row.lastReload = kubernetes.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
144                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) kubernetes.get("secrets");
145                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
146                                    if (i > 0) {
147                                        // create a copy for 2+ secrets
148                                        row = row.copy();
149                                    }
150                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
151                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
152                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
153                                    rows.add(row);
154                                }
155                            }
156 
157                            JsonObject hashicorp = (JsonObject) vaults.get("hashicorp-secrets");
158                            if (hashicorp != null) {
159                                row.vault = "Hashicorp";
160                                row.lastCheck = hashicorp.getLongOrDefault("startCheckTimestamp", 0);
161                                row.lastReload = hashicorp.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
162                                rows.add(row);
163                            }
164 
165                            JsonObject cmKubernetes = (JsonObject) vaults.get("kubernetes-configmaps");
166                            if (cmKubernetes != null) {
167                                row.vault = "Kubernetes-cm";
168                                row.lastCheck = cmKubernetes.getLongOrDefault("startCheckTimestamp", 0);
169                                row.lastReload = cmKubernetes.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
170                                JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) cmKubernetes.get("configmap");
171                                for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
172                                    if (i > 0) {
173                                        // create a copy for 2+ configmap
174                                        row = row.copy();
175                                    }
176                                    JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
177                                    row.secret = jo.getString("name");
178                                    row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
179                                    rows.add(row);
180                                }
181                            }
182                        }
183                    }
184                });
185 
186        // sort rows
187        rows.sort(this::sortRow);
188 
189        if (!rows.isEmpty()) {
190            printer().println(AsciiTable.getTable(AsciiTable.NO_BORDERS, rows, Arrays.asList(
191                    new Column().header("PID").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.CENTER).with(r -> r.pid),
192                    new Column().header("NAME").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).maxWidth(40, OverflowBehaviour.ELLIPSIS_RIGHT)
193                            .with(r -> r.name),
194                    new Column().header("VAULT").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).with(r -> r.vault),
195                    new Column().header("REGION").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).with(r -> r.region),
196                    new Column().header("SECRET").dataAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).maxWidth(40, OverflowBehaviour.ELLIPSIS_RIGHT)
197                            .with(r -> r.secret),
198                    new Column().header("AGE").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.CENTER).with(this::getAgo),
199                    new Column().header("UPDATE").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).with(this::getReloadAgo),
200                    new Column().header("CHECK").headerAlign(HorizontalAlign.LEFT).with(this::getCheckAgo))));
201        }
202 
203        return 0;
204    }
Ground Truth(Refatoring with VS Code): 
private void processKubernetesCmVault(JsonObject cmKubernetes, Row row, List<Row> rows) {
    if (cmKubernetes != null) {
        row.vault = "Kubernetes-cm";
        row.lastCheck = cmKubernetes.getLongOrDefault("startCheckTimestamp", 0);
        row.lastReload = cmKubernetes.getLongOrDefault("lastReloadTimestamp", 0);
        JsonArray arr = (JsonArray) cmKubernetes.get("configmap");
        for (int i = 0; arr != null && i < arr.size(); i++) {
            if (i > 0) {
                row = row.copy();
            }
            JsonObject jo = (JsonObject) arr.get(i);
            row.secret = jo.getString("name");
            row.timestamp = jo.getLongOrDefault("timestamp", 0);
            rows.add(row);
        }
    }
}
